name: Katy Frisch
subject: Nate Silver was wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63627478/407433408/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGM5MDI0Yy0zNGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XI6QzUdaedOczSOT82AS86nk-jTZ7AK772LJWkheyA=&emci=011a3ccf-29f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2dc9024c-34f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63627479/407433409/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGM5MDI0Yy0zNGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XI6QzUdaedOczSOT82AS86nk-jTZ7AK772LJWkheyA=&emci=011a3ccf-29f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2dc9024c-34f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.
Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”
Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63627480/407433410/1610638071?refcode=em20230521pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=2dc9024c-34f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGM5MDI0Yy0zNGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XI6QzUdaedOczSOT82AS86nk-jTZ7AK772LJWkheyA=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**
Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he _listened_.
Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you chip in $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign and help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63627481/407433411/1610638071?refcode=em20230521pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=2dc9024c-34f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGM5MDI0Yy0zNGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9XI6QzUdaedOczSOT82AS86nk-jTZ7AK772LJWkheyA=)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

With the help of this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers and holding onto every single majority. **But we can’t stop now.**
We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats have a slew of special elections in the next month, and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November. No matter how vicious the attacks become, YOU are my courage, my hope, and my unbreakable resolve to SAVE AMERICA.
**Together, we can, we will, and we MUST win in 2024, because if we lose, we don’t just lose an election, we lose our country to Marxist tyranny.**

name: Joe Biden
subject: Here’s the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m writing you while returning from Japan, where I attended the G7. You all might have heard a lot about the current conversations in Washington on how to prevent a default. I wanted to update you. | | |
---
I’m writing you while returning from Japan, where I attended the G7. You all might have heard a lot about the current conversations in Washington on how to prevent a default. I wanted to update you. Earlier today, I spoke with Speaker McCarthy about the latest on our budget negotiations. We’re meeting again when I get back to Washington. As you may know, if Congress doesn’t pass a bill to prevent default, it will lead to a catastrophe for working families. Eight million people could lose jobs, millions more would see huge impacts on their retirement savings, and it could set off an international financial crisis the likes of which we’ve never seen. Republicans have attached all kinds of strings to any attempt to prevent a default -- devastating cuts to teachers, Meals on Wheels, public safety, taking away health care for millions of Americans, and threatening food assistance. Their latest offer was a set of extreme partisan demands that could never pass Congress. I fundamentally disagree with the idea that we should accept Republicans’ conditions for doing the basic work of paying our bills. I began a process of hearing out the Republican proposals to reduce the deficit and limit spending. Republicans provided their ideas, and we provided ours. We felt like we were close and getting closer. But, in recent days, Republicans have started to listen more and more to their MAGA extremist colleagues and are back to demanding unreasonable, slashing cuts. These guys are talking a big game about “fiscal responsibility,” but that is, as I often say, “malarkey.” I’ve got a pretty good record on deficit reduction. In the first two years in office, I’ve reduced the deficit by $1.7 trillion -- all while rebuilding our economy from the middle out and the bottom up. Then, earlier this year, I released a budget that would reduce the deficit by nearly $3 trillion over ten years by cutting wasteful spending on Big Oil and Pharma and by raising revenue through closing loopholes that benefit the wealthy and large corporations. In this negotiation, I’ve offered $1 trillion in spending cuts. But here’s the truth and what you really need to know: **There is a path forward to reach a reasonable bipartisan agreement. But, to get there, Republicans have to come back to the table to negotiate in good faith.** I will not let MAGA Republicans hold the economy hostage to check boxes on their wishlist, but I welcome a serious conversation about how to reduce the deficit. I remain a congenital optimist. We’re not far apart. There’s a deal here if the Speaker wants it. We just need him to get there. I will remain personally involved here and will keep you updated on the latest. More soon, Joe Joe Biden

|

Eight million people could lose jobs, millions more would see huge impacts on their retirement savings, and it could set off an international financial crisis the likes of which we’ve never seen. Republicans have attached all kinds of strings to any attempt to prevent a default -- devastating cuts to teachers, Meals on Wheels, public safety, taking away health care for millions of Americans, and threatening food assistance. At the beginning of the Civil War, Army 1st Lt. Francis Edwin Brownell avenged the death of his unit's colonel by taking out his killer. Those actions made Brownell a hero to the Union and were the first of the war to merit the newly created Medal of Honor.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| |
Peter,

Every year at the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards, I honor everyday heroes who are making a difference in their communities – and I need your help selecting this year’s awardees!
**Do you know someone who has faced a challenge, and not only met it, but made sure other people in their community didn’t have to go through that same thing?[If so, nominate them to be recognized at the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63628004/407461483/245599329?refcode=jtk40-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2I2NTMxMi00NWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HLGljYsP0NYYSDD3mF_giDTO43iyhFqu8w24XnS9b0E=&emci=b6b69634-2cf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bcb65312-45f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
When I was told I couldn’t make a difference for my community – because I was “just a mom in tennis shoes” – I didn’t let that stop me. And I know there are so many others across Washington state who are doing the same each and every day.

Maybe you know someone who didn’t have much of his own, but still dedicated his time and resources to helping those in his community experiencing homelessness. Or a widow who lost her husband to suicide but then turned that grief into action to address mental health at the state and local level. Or even young women of color who felt excluded from outdoor sports, so they created an inclusive organization specifically for women of color seeking adventure in sports.
We all know people in our communities who go above and beyond like this. **[Nominate them for the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63628005/407461484/245599329?refcode=jtk40-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2I2NTMxMi00NWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HLGljYsP0NYYSDD3mF_giDTO43iyhFqu8w24XnS9b0E=&emci=b6b69634-2cf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bcb65312-45f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
Thank you,

Patty Murray
**[P.S. If you haven't already, reserve your spot at the Golden Tennis Shoe Awards on June 9 – I'd love to see you there!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63628006/407461485/-1020496242?refcode=jtk40-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2I2NTMxMi00NWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HLGljYsP0NYYSDD3mF_giDTO43iyhFqu8w24XnS9b0E=&emci=b6b69634-2cf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=bcb65312-45f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

# **
The Fed's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. subject: What can you do in your own backyard?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vscZ4z3DN2

Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our
country's difficulties.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscZ4z3DN2

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our
country's difficulties.

They were
especially concerned about critical race theory and how
"progressives" are pushing this dangerous ideology into American
schools, businesses, and even the military.

They kept
asking me, "what can I do?"

That may
be a question you're asking yourself right now as well.

My answer
is always the same-EDUCATION!

That's
because education is our surest defense against radical
ideologies like critical race theory.

By
supporting our educational outreach efforts, you're reaching and
teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

But, if
you want to do something closer to home, we've recently printed
thousands of copies of our issue of Imprimis, "Critical Race
Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It," for you to share with
your family, friends, neighbors, and colleagues.

That's
because there's a good chance that your neighbors have never
heard critical race theory, even if it's happening in your local
schools.

To make
it easier for you, we've wrapped the copies in packs of ten, and
we'll send you one for your generous tax-deductible gift of any
amount today.

The print
issue is perfect for leaving at a doctor's office or sending to
teachers in your local schools.

So, not
only will you support the expansion of effective outreach efforts
like free online courses, classical K-12 education, and of
course, Imprimis, with your gift, but you can also have an effect
in your neighborhood.

To give a
gift and receive your ten copies of Imprimis, "Critical Race
Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It," to hand out, visit the
secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61830875:scZ4z3DN2:m:3:2532013465:87CBE9F89A0D0D3C585B84AA4A4F7697:r

Please
allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks for everything you do to
preserve and defend liberty for future generations.

You're
countering the far-Left's aggressive efforts to destroy informed
patriotism nationwide and in your own backyard. We greatly
appreciate what you're doing!

With
gratitude,

Bill Gray

Class of
2001
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

name: Hearing Aid Advice
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade yet...
body:
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college.

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi490l7269lq84fp8jbgmt52kegi2rn1ard46klo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cthm0ob6clh2bs)
---
| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z15qja9teqc56t348oos3jonpi2bl4ad39fqgmeo_rp22sh2s8i66o71cthm0ob6clh2bs)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zolork7perjv3el83gohfn7s18vph3gh7q1udg6o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cthm0ob6clh2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z154f2mg8rq7gank8k8eruihv9cmqo402vdq0jk0_rp22sh2s8i66o71cthm0ob6clh2bs)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgrdr9ltk34941d5g3mlf9h7fmavsjnjbio4ve2o_rp22sh2s8i66o71cthm0ob6clh2bs)

Deroy Murdock

subject: They’re already attacking us

body:
We have a huge mission ahead of us, and we cannot wait until January.

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsqSwZ3DiN

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest
Christians.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osqSwZ3DiN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

I've
always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted
to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed.
I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the
complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap
in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and
spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest
online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May
23.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today
using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61831466:sqSwZ3DiN:m:3:2532013465:3838F33CCD36ED8002C3F922F140F647:r

I hope
you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the
first Christians.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

name: Kash Patel
subject: US government accusing me of crimes I did not commit
disclaimer_text: paid for by Kash Patel
body:
Here's the full story:

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=585466f039c74d2593a94f8fd24438d2&_e=yUE2Lgmt7x1xQnP4Pbsktl1QxenHTAK5XTfmw4updLwKrSMoFn6sx8WU03ksk5swVbg_OjWq85HYJOM7OsrgJYdatRPBYd2KJ2VGV0fC67Vb0-SdOOqGmKHjRpVLBNaKLONHSvTeERRyNxwpqOhMmKU6Nta1iNzW3LpUFdADgOzntzU2tFM_mdkPFpS0Vi2A4sGfUUD-RZwYe7rVoaARfUhbbd-U3sHIBYj1-aXX7XPA6KPY5PjFHcGVhGWmEwfJ)

Hello Friend,

Members of the U.S. Congress are accusing me of buying and paying for FBI whistleblowers.

**Here 's the full story: **

Congressman Dan Goldman, aka Silverspoon, aka Schiff Jr., is lying when he says I bought and paid for FBI whistleblowers.

This is FALSE, and he knows it. Only Adam Schiff could have taught him lying is the best way to make a living. We will not stand idly by.

Here is a post that about sums it up:
Breaking: Congressman Dan Goldman (D) claims the FBI whistleblowers were bought and paid for by Kash Patel. The reality is the witnesses had their lives destroyed and Patel set up a fund for them to they could feed their families after the FBI suspended them without pay and left them unable to afford groceries...

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=585466f039c74d2593a94f8fd24438d2&_e=yUE2Lgmt7x1xQnP4Pbsktl1QxenHTAK5XTfmw4updLwKrSMoFn6sx8WU03ksk5swVbg_OjWq85HYJOM7OsrgJYdatRPBYd2KJ2VGV0fC67X1XurGKqRcSSy2z4puhOxww37C6qNBaDQ6aBOI2OY9jiK3DxSMCOhlhVl8aHTiXIUY_6fWw3yxSRHr-ai2nBi7gbtSFZzfkWa-Dj5i9EpjVLWMFm2cQ658djMpm4s2nhU2otk7VWNilKhPrdqP9GKR)

_These brave patriots decided to put their lives and careers on the line for their country by exposing the truth about corruption within the FBI_.

## Tim Scott Ready to Take on Trump
Tim Scott, the only Black Republican in the US Senate, is expected to [officially announce](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u8zAMAJ_G3hTIlGRZg4ZvyZZv7WiwFJWwkH9gEwn69kU6dzzccriP23xDabLe_-PCWes2I6k8ebbBABhwM_QlV2Zg13MexsnHEH3y_SPHEpzlkaDSpw9oMY4JoGKItXCi0ksGC84GgMG6waVLYmLnMcXJjxASdd5yEd2Oy9cmqz64tu_tyceFtqVv-aG6n53718G1gyvuK7_Ot3rDoUKNO7iqLOakTdWABW_2g08pvKpgM4TLjnJfzRCgAPM4WUqYJo61WAQcqDqY2FF_5LK_pDU5x9h5e19Q2m-F_j3lJwAA___6lmIP) his candidacy for the presidency today. He says he wants to build a [coalition of traditional](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuhSAUgOGnwQ1zOKDIwNCF7XbtaAgerqdBMUqu6ds3t3P3P_mS_-sxPyIX3p-fcSPfcp1javyiGQaJKFHP2C0-EyHpjrwaJ2MHa5zpVm-szjFGUqMylEGpRedkYMrZgMvT0rFHQA0DogKttOsdJdImOjuZEQeXhAFauNWz_668t5Vy-akvOvtUt674tbXjEvpDYBAY7vvuj1q4carvQGDY6b4EhrciMMAgMCgnMDTe5JVqaxIBjTxOunihvXEs8oyJJAA4O9mpO_1y3FwKX6MVBp5b5PKnt_9n_AYAAP__BV1dZg) conservatives, evangelical Christians, and moderate Republicans to beat Donald Trump for the GOP nomination. John Thune, the No. 2 Senate Republican, [will join Scott](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAQheGnwR3WMGADBcVt3O1tU1oOjNesMKzsyVp5-2hTpzvFkT7p_7jNtyWXXO__l50Cr21eIucXzTBIRIl6xi6FlQhJdxTU6IwdrPGm28KnA2vAr-PqkzFuBKeiTSrRoh2S1l0OCKhhQFSglfa9p0jaLN46M-LgozBAKXM7-kfLlTday3d70dHHtnclbMzPU-h_AieB03Vd_bOVzDm290HgVOk6BU5vReAEw3srgdOjbVXy9lVJct7lGRuzpJracZIEAO_Aqu4I6XnlUvI5WmHgvi-5_Mr8d4ifAAAA__8hqVv-) in South Carolina today for the announcement, making Thune the highest-ranking legislative leader to back Scott.
## Marine Vet Raises $2.7 Million
Daniel Penny, the Marine veteran charged with killing Jordan Neely on a NY subway, [has raised $2.7 million](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFztCAQgOFfox0OLopaWHyN3X1tSmeFhdsMgiOc5v59JqnTv8U7z8djfSAHjv4_7jQXl1Y0hS9aZS8ABKgVajs7IiBV09zqsRv6oZu6-jlvctqcGshIjaM2Wo6Tgg1GrVsYEW3NM0hQsgdopWrV1ExkSHU4DWOnoZ9M1UmyXNLZfCaO5UkuvNNFZ2PSXof5WcqRK_WvgqWC5b7vxqWv7ZU5Us4_TQWLIyyvk3IFy44nRxIXFWExMgVxUIxv4fmiTNH6JAJ5DMKSo5hJuFe0InOhLDKZFK3Y2HvKRRjcD2Qf63O2x80hcNZD1Um_I4ffu_I31ncAAAD__-TDbtI) for his legal defense on the donation platform GiveSendGo. That's the second-highest amount ever raised on GiveSendGo, donated by [55,000 supporters,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL3unDAQxJ8Guj3B2hxQUKShu7Qp0WIveC_GRrZ1J94-IvW_nQ9p5vfntbxIvIT9Nx08lS0uZIp8eGk6QARUC9Z22piRVc1T-xx03_V61LWbrLaDXbve0Kq7lfvWbIMakbXhcWg7XcuEDaqmQ2wb1arxMbJhpWnsB_3EbjSVbthKienxjhKK481f8cPpYeJR-8mVcuZK_apwrnDeY3F0SC63W-Ec-JsrnC0FYQ8nh3CBcZR2tvCV4uCv-PsZvGOyFCAw-wskw04Sbv1MdHHKcNy5GDJIABtDTGCj95QyrLJDoIMzUGJw7E8Je50me37vTn72lW72g8T_X1x-BvgvAAD__3zZdpg) including conservative celebrities such as GOP presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy and musician Kid Rock. The site bills itself as "No. 1 free Christian fund-raising site." The highest amount it ever raised, $10 million, was for Canadian truckers on strike over Canadian Covid vaccine requirements.
## Koepka Wins PGA Championship
Brooks Koepka [won the 2023 PGA](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSqyAUgOGnwQ4HDxi0oLgNXW67pUPkoCdBYYCJk7ff2a23_pt_vq_7cncU6dz-uwNNC2lxa6M3LmLkABzkAp03ARFQdmiG26T0qNWsut24IL0AGLRHDNOqZRi1D48Bg3iISauODAiQYgQYhBzk3M-4olRu1pO6wTivTAn01FLpn4nOtmOIn_TG0q_p6KLZW8uVyX8MLAN7XVePNZ8_kYHdUgwMbG2pfBjYhYElz8BKrYWEQTCwkd78UVJ6Vf5KmF-OX3RWnjfH190dmdJZd8p8bDs_3DMV3qhF7Irx-aIYqd40U2I7HMXfpfa30HcAAAD__xBoZ4U) Championship Sunday--one year after leaving the PGA tour to join the controversial LIV tour. His victory challenges the idea that golfers on the Saudi-backed LIV tour are losing their edge. Since its creation, LIV has been locked in a [bitter legal and business battle](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1vwyAQxvFPgzcsOMAvA0MXtnTtaF3g7FxFgmVorHz7Kp27Pnqkn_T_uiwX5MyP7RPv5NtaFoyNn7QoJwEkmAW65FciINOR18NkRzfa2XY3Hwc3uesV02QiJnRpgDVNaSYdr8kQdexBgVEOQCujzdzPFMlYnMfJDuDmKKyixK0c_XfhR7vRml_lSUcfy73L_tbaXoX5EBAEhPM8-7qXo3Es74OAkPEUEPCB-VW5Cghv773zU24lr3LfULbyc8iIlaQGY0etrbICQnf4tJ-cM9dhFFZtd-T8B7f_O_wGAAD__3vuXZE) with the PGA. The win also marks a personal triumph for Koepka, who was a big tour winner years ago and then fell into a long slump. This is his first major win in four years.

Daniel Penny, the Marine veteran charged with killing Jordan Neely on a NY subway, has raised $2.7 million for his legal defense on the donation platform GiveSendGo. | | | | | | Monday, May 22, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering a Marine veteran's successful fundraising for legal fees, Brittany Griner changing her tune on the national anthem after a stint in Russian prison, and a heck of a golf shot. Today is National Sherlock Holmes Day 🕵️, but you don’t need to be an expert detective to figure out what’s happening around you. Just read The Flyover : It’s elementary! If this is your first time reading, and never miss an edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. Finally, please check out our sponsor for today, . This makes it possible for us to deliver The Flyover for free! | Tim Scott Ready to Take on Trump Tim Scott, the only Black Republican in the US Senate, is expected to his candidacy for the presidency today. He says he wants to build a conservatives, evangelical Christians, and moderate Republicans to beat Donald Trump for the GOP nomination. John Thune, the No. 2 Senate Republican, - in South Carolina today for the announcement, making Thune the highest-ranking legislative leader to back Scott. Marine Vet Raises $2.7 Million Daniel Penny, the Marine veteran charged with killing Jordan Neely on a NY subway, for his legal defense on the donation platform GiveSendGo. That's the second-highest amount ever raised on GiveSendGo, donated by including conservative celebrities such as GOP presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy and musician Kid Rock. The site bills itself as "No. 1 free Christian fund-raising site." The highest amount it ever raised, $10 million, was for Canadian truckers on strike over Canadian Covid vaccine requirements. Koepka Wins PGA Championship Brooks Koepka Championship Sunday--one year after leaving the PGA tour to join the controversial LIV tour. His victory challenges the idea that golfers on the Saudi-backed LIV tour are losing their edge. Since its creation, LIV has been locked in a with the PGA. The win also marks a personal triumph for Koepka, who was a big tour winner years ago and then fell into a long slump. This is his first major win in four years. ➤ President Biden has declared himself "blameless" for responsibility if he and Congress fail to reach an agreement in the tense debt ceiling negotiations. "I've done my part," said Biden from Japan, where he's attending an international conference. () ➤ ChatGPT is getting a right-wing counterpart, dubbed GIPRR in honor of the Gipper, Ronald Reagan. The new GIPPR chatbot was created specifically to counter the left-wing bias that some conservatives believe is built into ChatGPT. () ➤ The NAACP issued an official travel advisory for Florida this weekend, warning that the state has become "hostile to Black Americans." name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop fracking on public lands
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1784231?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Majestic birds strut across sagebrush plains -- suddenly they SCATTER as a massive metallic rig JETS HIGH-PRESSURE WATER and SAND into the ground! It shakes the Earth and screeches through the morning air.[Take action to PROTECT public lands!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1784232?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** The iconic Greater sage-grouse relies on these sagebrush plains for the most important time of its life, Friend. Here, male sage-grouses perform unique courtship displays, dancing and clucking away to grab the attention of a mate and give way to a new generation. **But fracking is DESTROYING this critical habitat and SHRINKING the sagebrush plains, driving sage-grouse to the brink. ** Fracking threatens us too. People living near fracking can face increased risk of **cardiac problems, birth defects, and other health issues.** The process also produces nausea-inducing odors that can trigger splitting headaches. But the Department of Interior is about to lease land to greedy companies eager to FRACK in and around our communities and sage-grouse habitat. **This is your LAST CHANCE to stop the lease sale before it’s approved and a greedy polluter SCARS our public lands. [STOP fracking in this critical wildlife habitat and surrounding public lands before it’s too late!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1784233?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1784234?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
There’s more to the dangers of fracking, Friend. Its wastewater can sometimes contain **RADIOACTIVE WASTE** and could contaminate local drinking water. Sometimes fracking can even **trigger earthquakes. **
So much is at risk, Friend. Our public lands, nearby communities, threatened wildlife, and our entire planet. But the DOI is moving forward anyway. **YOU CAN CHANGE THAT, but we need you to act now! [We need 4,198 more people to send a message to the Department of Interior to reach our goal and help PROTECT people, public lands, and wildlife from fracking! Please, Friend, add your name by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1784235?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1784234?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

Nicole Ghio

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Majestic birds strut across sagebrush plains -- suddenly they SCATTER as a massive metallic rig JETS HIGH-PRESSURE WATER and SAND into the ground! It shakes the Earth and screeches through the morning air.== The iconic Greater sage-grouse relies on these sagebrush plains for the most important time of its life, Friend. Here, male sage-grouses perform unique courtship displays, dancing and clucking away to grab the attention of a mate and give way to a new generation. But fracking is DESTROYING this critical habitat and SHRINKING the sagebrush plains, driving sage-grouse to the brink. Fracking threatens us too. People living near fracking can face increased risk of cardiac problems, birth defects, and other health issues. The process also produces nausea-inducing odors that can trigger splitting headaches. But the Department of Interior is about to lease land to greedy companies eager to FRACK in and around our communities and sage-grouse habitat. This is your LAST CHANCE to stop the lease sale before it’s approved and a greedy polluter SCARS our public lands. == | == There’s more to the dangers of fracking, Friend. Its wastewater can sometimes contain RADIOACTIVE WASTE and could contaminate local drinking water. Sometimes fracking can even trigger earthquakes. So much is at risk, Friend. Our public lands, nearby communities, threatened wildlife, and our entire planet. But the DOI is moving forward anyway. YOU CAN CHANGE THAT, but we need you to act now! == == Standing with you, Nicole Ghio Fossil fuels program manager, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

body:

| | | | | Peter, **_FIRST:_** North Carolina Republicans rushed through an extreme abortion ban. **_THEN:_** Our Democratic Governor Roy Cooper VETOED this harmful legislation. **_NOW:_** Republicans in the legislature just voted to override the Governor’s veto. This harmful legislation doesn’t represent the will of the people, and it doesn’t represent North Carolina values. That is why I—and the entire North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus—will continue to fight for reproductive rights. [**We aren’t done fighting. Can you split a $5 donation between North Carolina Senate Democrats and Blue Amp Action to fight back against these extreme Republicans and their attacks on reproductive rights?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7f76af08-eb32-4a00-adeb-41cac75d8906/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing with us, _Sydney Batch_ _NC Senate District 17_

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:

# Biden's 'Genius' Answer To USD Collapse Is... A Govt-Controlled Digital Dollar!

[**ALERT: The USD is on life support ...**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f6b3325cc9a847eeb3777519796b3244&_e=f43U6YsQvBCeNBtwOSsCW_u5X8_hXD5DniT0UKXBBqXtjGka_t5MTJGLOfZlB41TWUt-GJDItEMLnBNunbJzNQJcchPO7PfH48XIz9rso-pgZbi207-8mDRTfmJuIVFl7_ChXZyBbD5I3AJMrNYd7e9gxq3hU24_8KK2zg4Gc18eGLtnPSnK4gtB-ylWj3mcYUKWmGPKL_MyygSb6JvtmIvNTT-SJQJCVe-OT3k5LSfoJfRHPdutK6GaLAQsGMacgiNqvKiYO9USIctbwKX7jZA4C0KmzN8ufyj6j1qb_4ToE8AdbtPJU8BpwqwPBbYGD1XO3Vu0avBjHfRU1dMmMoVhVdRgR6j6c3w2EXJ2pe7v75fUlNyZwH5pUtRmKTVRIxCapNqYGEVEIcG10oTPtID4s3hEUn_1VeK062AilU7f7hLXQnWXvtTaivyUaTuwci_Nts3_cbxNMRI2Q8D7PSxUFox7aq5zWuX1drc8qFTPJuqN77wPYJ3zk55gGwritwVYI-2_cAE9Cl2t4WbUkA%3D%3D)

And your IRA and 401(k) could pay a steep price.

See...
* Russia is amassing unprecedented gold reserves so as to undercut Biden's weaponized greenback...

* China is pushing for a new, IMF-backed currency...

* And now Saudi Arabia has vowed to finally dethrone the petrodollar - even if it means getting in bed with its sworn enemy, Iran.

Folks, once the mighty US Dollar loses its reserve status...

The value of your retirement savings could plummet.

**But you know the worst part?**

Instead of fighting back now while we still can...

[**President Biden 's "genius" answer has been to enact a digital dollar...**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f6b3325cc9a847eeb3777519796b3244&_e=f43U6YsQvBCeNBtwOSsCW_u5X8_hXD5DniT0UKXBBqXtjGka_t5MTJGLOfZlB41TWUt-GJDItEMLnBNunbJzNQJcchPO7PfH48XIz9rso-pgZbi207-8mDRTfmJuIVFl7_ChXZyBbD5I3AJMrNYd7e9gxq3hU24_8KK2zg4Gc18eGLtnPSnK4gtB-ylWj3mcYUKWmGPKL_MyygSb6JvtmIvNTT-SJQJCVe-OT3k5LSfoJfRHPdutK6GaLAQsGMacgiNqvKiYO9USIctbwKX7jZA4C0KmzN8ufyj6j1qb_4ToE8AdbtPJU8BpwqwPBbYGqkUmAyu1nPNmgS4gLrPbAtpsUl4I_NByx6ID1ltVoDuLN-87EW1DQRQ5HA48mQWRvJu9FskN0mWjdrRrEESkwA1ZyypEnfgEvgX6h1wJ3ZB_KivHH5XKhnMnO8sagt7oC995f78TEBte0gzVn0bx3GBrQyItmbwf_BmaLyWGMbMiPX9dtmp51TqWaTvBFKAK9DPb6Za8X9RRMf_etUzLKg%3D%3D)

**Something that the unelected bureaucrats in Washington can trace,** turn off, and move around whenever they like.

Already, America's top banks have started issuing the very first digital dollars...

But replacing the collapsing US Dollar with **a government-controlled digital asset could hurl you into a nightmare that's ...**

Far worse than what you went through in the 2008 financial crisis.

And ask yourself:

When [**Biden finally gives the go-ahead to convert your IRA and 401(k) savings into nothing more than a computer code ...**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f6b3325cc9a847eeb3777519796b3244&_e=f43U6YsQvBCeNBtwOSsCW_u5X8_hXD5DniT0UKXBBqXtjGka_t5MTJGLOfZlB41TWUt-GJDItEMLnBNunbJzNQJcchPO7PfH48XIz9rso-pgZbi207-8mDRTfmJuIVFl7_ChXZyBbD5I3AJMrNYd7e9gxq3hU24_8KK2zg4Gc18eGLtnPSnK4gtB-ylWj3mcYUKWmGPKL_MyygSb6JvtmIvNTT-SJQJCVe-OT3k5LSfoJfRHPdutK6GaLAQsGMacgiNqvKiYO9USIctbwKX7jZA4C0KmzN8ufyj6j1qb_4ToE8AdbtPJU8BpwqwPBbYGpyJHsNg8vi_eTnQ9pxrIWim1g6QQ8Xx6ktSFfzkN2blAndeXoCYIvlCaeMp5HubAxHSHrvKLQQjUb2RJX1XPLszxiOmnvFRZHKNWkqfq_5-vKo69VcCf_rBFqT5lSgJtvZD0EQQ-MrB_6hBLhkNl2kkvbJPYsqUgeIoD-dF3PxNakLTRGxgw-uwWkAK4Wlao5-vFdGgpjudNofPQvHpuSA%3D%3D)

What will stop Russian and Chinese agents from hacking into your account and running off with your money? Nothing!

**But here 's the good news:**

You can protect your IRA and 401(k) savings by claiming a 100% FREE copy of our 25-page wealth-protection guide.

**This IRS Loophole was deliberately left open in the dying days of the previous administration ...**

And Biden has so far been powerless to close it...

So don't be a sitting duck waiting for the hammer to drop.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: How you can help me get a prime spot on the debate stage
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsiXbX3DNO

Vivek 2024

If we want to make the debate stage in August, we need to
secure unique donors to our grassroots campaign.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osiXbX3DNO

Fellow American -

I have a clear vision for how to
win the White House in 2024: a grassroots, bottom-up campaign
made of people just like you.

We're about to hit a major
campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of
campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking
under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this
movement.

So here's what I am asking of you
today: will you be one of the unique donors I need to get a prime
spot on the debate stage? Make it a small donation - every
dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to planning our
"Great Uprising."

As I have traveled the country,
I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually,
truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually
ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

Be a part of our movement, Fellow
American, by becoming our 35,000th donor!

Thank you,

Vivek Ramaswamy

JOIN THE MOVEMENT
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

body:

---

It's Jim Jordan.

For too long, Democrats' ROGUE agencies have ABUSED their power to INTIMIDATE and SILENCE their political adversaries & everyday Americans.

_They SPY on our campaigns ...
They CENSOR our voices...
They HARASS concerned parents...
They TARGET America First patriots like YOU...
& they INDICTED President Trump!_

Now: Democrats are FURIOUS.

Now that House Republicans are finally uncovering their corruption and working to DRAIN the Swamp, the Democrat money machine is working overtime to silence us yet again. They will do ANYTHING to stop us.

And if they succeed, our work will all be for nothing. They will get away with their schemes, and continue to weaponize the federal government against conservatives.
**So, I 'm humbly asking: if you support our efforts to drain the swamp, please consider chipping in just $10 or $25 to make sure we can finish the job.**

name: American Update
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667895%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n7rF2kBOzCrkoEQ%2bROS8Lw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we’ve produced our newest online course, “Ancient Christianity,” which we’ll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c667896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o7AhSoTWe5SyUzMvpAG80Q&sysid=1)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Update

| | | Fellow conservative, My parents risked their lives coming to America to escape communism in Cuba. _But now, socialist Democrats are trying to bring the SAME agenda to America._ _Let me be clear: I will NEVER let America become a socialist country._
**I can’t defend our country from socialism alone.**[**Sign our “Stop Socialism” petition today and take a stand against the socialist, Democrat agenda!**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=79dae2d8ac874995a9defd93fe37d212&_e=I01pbyRzf5OGpn6ph8Lf9dSEOgZY7qri9FRYxTWPK9WSk1ib6uLkpDZkkMjEoNGGIVV7MT3jfumeWRmLLqnNU_6HAy2jJmOhfCLhcd3R8yL_HkYkAvKEeWFVbsid7Zj-HaP6vJZsL7bib7HbHD188HLpF93f8w6jtjF8MocxUAlhhOli9lLntjRuprl4EziU7iSCDTu_FAdXZh-jqlPGy4WtvI5-GTN9gs54DIos3Vre-ezVucxd_sEMlm3OQpje2573EEyDqqpMzKffoP6Dg6hsvwLUNZHDGcscECvrB0lKLTdfVcvodE5K-T3dJ_bPTyZnN2RngIhJBje5EKN4E1mHM8gBHNKnJCgq-wn6_bqg5MQuZSLiIIbxFq1Ycm8rrVLgl7yvQUuGoaC68uYdRA%3D%3D)

Dear Friends,

We have a few updates to share with you. The Chesterfield County Republican Committee meeting, which was scheduled for tonight, Monday, May 22, will not take place.

This week our focus is to hit as many doors as we possibly can. I'll be out walking every day this week and I need volunteers to join me. Sign up today for an afternoon shift, [chris@chaseforva.com](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com).

Tonight, Monday, May 22, I'll be speaking at the Colonial Heights Republican Committee meeting at 7pm at Life Christian Academy, located at 1221 Boulevard, Colonial Heights, VA 23834. We would really appreciate if supporters could attend this meeting.

We have a Meet & Greet at the Highlands on June 1st, and we are having a Special Event on June 8th with Bishop E.W. Jackson. More information to follow.

Come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: I'm running to defeat George Santos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish.

He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City.

He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats.

**_These claims were lies – all of them. _**

And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected.

**George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63631941/407474691/-1594784076?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2623-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5ZWYwZTQ4LWExZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2uKMjFiR6OHHFha2TivsQMfLewmtWe__i9Br-sZc134=)
**So today, I’m announcing my intention to run for Congress to replace him.**

**My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support.[ Will you pitch in $25 or more – split with American Bridge PAC – to help me send George Santos into political retirement? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63631943/407474697/-1594784076?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2623-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5ZWYwZTQ4LWExZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2uKMjFiR6OHHFha2TivsQMfLewmtWe__i9Br-sZc134=)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63631953/407474704/-1594784076?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2623-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5ZWYwZTQ4LWExZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2uKMjFiR6OHHFha2TivsQMfLewmtWe__i9Br-sZc134=)
I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when – or if – they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures.

I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them.

Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns.
**Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. **

**Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November.**

**[But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between American Bridge PAC and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63631956/407474713/-1594784076?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk2623-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5ZWYwZTQ4LWExZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2uKMjFiR6OHHFha2TivsQMfLewmtWe__i9Br-sZc134=)**

My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values.

Let’s win this thing,
Anna Kaplan

clean_body: | | | Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish. He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies – all of them. And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. = So today, I’m announcing my intention to run for Congress to replace him. My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support.= = I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when – or if – they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Anna Kaplan and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values. Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan | | | | | | | | | | | From taking down Trump in 2020 to expanding the Senate majority in 2022, American Bridge is working around the clock to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them by making sure Democrats around the country are elected up and down the ballot. A monthly donation is the most impactful way to power our critical work. Please, will you make a monthly recurring donation right now? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: Is there ANYTHING at all that I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
What if I told you we are a week away from our May fundraising deadline and are short of the goals we set for this period of the race?
#

I need you here, Peter.
Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to make a contribution to my Senate campaign today? I obviously don't expect you to donate to every email we send, but I hope you can give to THIS one.
Let me explain:
What if I told you we are a week away from our May fundraising deadline and are short of the goals we set for this period of the race?
And what if I told you that these goals are not arbitrary, they are well-planned numbers we need to reach along the way in order to WIN?
And what if I told you we just haven't had enough first-time donors contribute this month, so I am reaching out to you to help me close this gap?
Please. Sinema is stacking up cash from Republicans and hedge fund managers. Kari Lake will raise a ton when she gets in.
I need you. It's our only way. So with time running out before this May deadline, I am asking:
[**Can you please contribute $3 to my Senate campaign today? Help us close the gap on our May fundraising goals before time runs out and it's too late.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230522-1&t=1&akid=646%2E734936%2EQ-S2xm)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: [WATCH] A message from Jon Hamm to Missouri about Manhood, courage, Josh Hawley, and this U.S. Senate race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — Jon Hamm's got a message for Missouri. [**See it in our latest ad:**](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33419?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh)
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33419?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh)
**_[Click here to watch a special message to Missouri from Jon Hamm, then chip in $10 or more to help me replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33419?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh)_**
Any born-and-raised Missourian will tell you: This is the Show Me State.
But the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us during his time in the U.S. Senate is how to be a fraud and a coward — from skittering away from the same mob he raised his fist for outside the Capitol on January 6th to using his own power to strip away rights for everyday people in Missouri and all across the country.
**This election is our opportunity to defeat him.** Hawley won his last race with only 51% of the vote. In the years since, his approval has dropped to just 42% — and in Missouri’s last Senate race during a presidential election, the margin was only 2.7%.
That doesn’t mean it’s going to be easy — after all, GOP insiders at the NRSC haven’t stopped attacking me since the day I got into this race — but we really can win this.
**[So Peter, will you help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your first donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign today? Your support right now gives us the resources to keep delivering this message to voters every day between now and Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33419?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33420?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33420?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33420?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33420?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33420?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33420?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33419?refcode=em20230522-3156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh)
---
It’s about time Missourians had a U.S. Senator who will actually stand up and look out for them — not a fraud who’s obsessed with defining what it means to be a man.
Thanks for standing with me,
Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230522-3156-footer&t=12&refcode2=3156_614464_3hJIwh&akid=3156%2E614464%2E3hJIwh)**

| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=6c08862f69214530aeb6535df53e91ed&_e=VVRqgIzvESHnum6nia8gFSn70wWrBMd8bp70U9uh-LZ2eM2PFMRUPeFI0HlntqN333meQhHcRZcpwsiNWZs2fMi4_UWHSsn9QfutdeJ28cTjuzvfpwr8g41QVgeCRivT-OdHXavqXQkpztJ7A0j28zggpSu0aqV8q5PHNnB3TtORMnMavxt2Oxz0yx0NJqmmtxCwvav9-BjnOzK_O0rlC0QcHw3EI6fpfKcLfVh1W8IDnhOm9xgbPfq_GcnvxmgjOJsRFvun_b8Xznp2vm_hfQyGDPx1mfNDVJ8sjv2156Gut2GL6nut1eBYoxNofMN27W6RPB-XhlCLNZI71Oj7ydJ02-qVOigmceNCINc9CG0%3D)

Russian collusion was a lie, and Democrats like Adam Schiff were complicit in perpetuating that lie across America.

They framed a rightfully elected President for fake crimes. And even worse, they tried to take away the voices of the hardworking Americans who voted for him.

name: Gloucester County GOP
subject: Join us for our 2nd Annual Baskets & Bullets - Sporting Clay Tournament!
body:
Get your tickets today! June 17th, 2023 - Starting at 8:30AM
| | | | JOIN US FOR OUR 2ND ANNUAL BASKETS & BULLETS SPORTING CLAY TOURNAMENT
---
All participants will be required to complete a Release of Liability & Assumption of Risk Form as well as an Emergency Contact Form. To make the check-in process as smooth as possible, you will get an email from the GCGOP Secretary, Samantha Sammons, with both forms that you can print, complete, and brought with you to the event.
Any participants sending payment in the form of a check must also send the Donation Form below.
If you already have a group of 4 or 5 in mind, please send an email with the names of those who will be in your group.
*** All participants are encouraged to bring their who shotgun(s) and ammo.***
If you would like to donate a basket, please let us know.
If you have any questions, please contact [GCGOPSecretary@gmail.com](mailto:gcgopsecretary@gmail.com) or Call Samantha at [856-535-7113](tel:856-535-7113).

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Kids need to learn about the American Revolution
body:
The Tuttle Twin American History Curriculum book covers 1215-1776 and fills the void in teaching children the ideas behind the Revolution.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhig6qf88qf5m95esdv50j9pko2rofspoq0i0rbg_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctjm6or6cth2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Hello Friend,

The ideas behind the American Revolution are complex. Even some adults have trouble understanding why fighting for the ideas of liberty was so important to the Founders that they were willing to challenge the most powerful country at the time over them.

_**You can imagine how difficult it can be for children to learn these lessons.**_

I had that struggle when I was teaching my kids about the founding of our country. That's why I came up with the _Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum_.

My name is Connor Boyack, the author of the _Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum_. These books on American history are unlike any other. While other history books ignore the events and ideas that led to the Revolution, our book focuses on them.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z53qmuo8hblgbceu9hij5q6q5g3773trr02fh55g_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctjm6or6cth2bs)
The _Tuttle Twin American History Curriculum_ book covers 1215-1776 and fills the void in teaching children the ideas behind the Revolution.

Will you help me get these books into the hands of more kids? My goal is to distribute 5,000 copies of the _Tuttle Twins History Curriculum_ to charter schools and home school families.

[You can share the inspiring events and powerful ideas behind the founding of America with a child today. Click here to donate >>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm07icet6l49rtoe1u2iep0k82e4pkavglfhliug_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctjm6or6cth2bs)

Existing Kindergarten to 8th-grade American history books lack context and relevance, making it hard for young people to understand why the ideas of liberty that inspired America's founding are still important today.

The _Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum_ resolves this issue so that young people today can appreciate history and apply its lessons.

**And the best part? Children love the Tuttle Twins!**

These books help them connect complex ideas in fun ways. These are not just a textbook but a resource full of activities and useful extras for a child or a classroom.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgic4a03kh6pteefi95iun8p0gdu7vaqcjo0l8pg_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctjm6or6cth2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi9ueulmvij6anetsbaptsu8ntp4gh7umoquef50_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctjm6or6cth2bs)
I am proud to tell you about the upcoming launch of the 2nd volume of the _Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum_. This second history book comes out in July and focuses on the founding years, 1776 to 1791.

**You and I know that some really exciting events happen in the years following, but I want kids to understand and be excited about them as well!**

These books are essential for any family who wants their children to learn about America's past and develop an appreciation for the ideas that led to the founding of America.

I've set a goal to distribute 5,000 copies to families and schools this year. _**But I can 't do it without your support.**_

Anything you can chip in helps us put these factual history textbooks in the hands of America's future. **Click any link below to donate >>>**
[Donate $10 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv02hnqg0no7d32t56kucq709b02kc3hjs7k27oo_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctjm6or6cth2bs)

clean_body: The Tuttle Twin American History Curriculum book covers 1215-1776 and fills the void in teaching children the ideas behind the Revolution. "Tuttle Twins" Hello Friend, The ideas behind the American Revolution are complex. Even some adults have trouble understanding why fighting for the ideas of liberty was so important to the Founders that they were willing to challenge the most powerful country at the time over them. You can imagine how difficult it can be for children to learn these lessons. I had that struggle when I was teaching my kids about the founding of our country. That's why I came up with the Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum. My name is Connor Boyack, the author of the Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum. These books on American history are unlike any other. While other history books ignore the events and ideas that led to the Revolution, our book focuses on them. The Tuttle Twin American History Curriculum book covers 1215-1776 and fills the void in teaching children the ideas behind the Revolution. Will you help me get these books into the hands of more kids? My goal is to distribute 5,000 copies of the Tuttle Twins History Curriculum to charter schools and home school families. Existing Kindergarten to 8th-grade American history books lack context and relevance, making it hard for young people to understand why the ideas of liberty that inspired America's founding are still important today. The Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum resolves this issue so that young people today can appreciate history and apply its lessons. And the best part? Children love the Tuttle Twins! These books help them connect complex ideas in fun ways. These are not just a textbook but a resource full of activities and useful extras for a child or a classroom. I am proud to tell you about the upcoming launch of the 2nd volume of the Tuttle Twins American History Curriculum. This second history book comes out in July and focuses on the founding years, 1776 to 1791. You and I know that some really exciting events happen in the years following, but I want kids to understand and be excited about them as well! These books are essential for any family who wants their children to learn about America's past and develop an appreciation for the ideas that led to the founding of America. I've set a goal to distribute 5,000 copies to families and schools this year. But I can 't do it without your support. Anything you can chip in helps us put these factual history textbooks in the hands of America's future. Click any link below to donate >>> Thank you, Connor Boyack President, Libertas Institute Author, Tuttle Twins American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Joe Biden
subject: I first ran for President because I believed we were in a battle for the soul of this nation. I still believe that to be true.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help build a winning campaign from the ground up and stop MAGA Republicans from taking this country backward. | | |
---
Peter, In 2020, 81 million Americans voted to move our country forward. Since then, we’ve helped create over 12 million jobs, lowered prescription drug prices for millions of seniors, and passed the largest effort to tackle the climate crisis in our history. But we’ve got a lot more to do. And there is so much at stake. MAGA forces are determined to take this country backward -- backward to an America where there is no right to choose, no right to privacy, no right to contraception, and no right to marry who you love. _That’s not who we are._ MAGA Republicans believe that for them to succeed, everyone else has to fail. **I believe America is big enough for all of us to succeed. That is the nation we’re building: a nation where no one is left behind.** **[If you agree, Peter, please consider making a contribution to our campaign today. There’s a choice ahead of us. Do we continue to build a future full of opportunities for you and families like yours? Or will we turn the clock back? Here’s the honest truth: I’m more optimistic than I’ve ever been. And it’s because I’ve seen what this team can do when it comes together.

clean_body: I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help build a winning campaign from the ground up and stop MAGA Republicans from taking this country backward. | | | Peter, In 2020, 81 million Americans voted to move our country forward. Since then, we’ve helped create over 12 million jobs, lowered prescription drug prices for millions of seniors, and passed the largest effort to tackle the climate crisis in our history. But we’ve got a lot more to do. And there is so much at stake. MAGA forces are determined to take this country backward -- backward to an America where there is no right to choose, no right to privacy, no right to contraception, and no right to marry who you love. That’s not who we are. MAGA Republicans believe that for them to succeed, everyone else has to fail. I believe America is big enough for all of us to succeed. That is the nation we’re building: a nation where no one is left behind. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | There’s a choice ahead of us. Do we continue to build a future full of opportunities for you and families like yours? Or will we turn the clock back? Here’s the honest truth: I’m more optimistic than I’ve ever been. And it’s because I’ve seen what this team can do when it comes together. In 2020, more than 6 million grassroots supporters just like you helped propel our campaign to victory. You can use this link to donate: Thanks for all that you do, Peter. All my best, Joe Joe Biden | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

But with a slew of upcoming special elections, this fall’s races in Virginia, and 2024 fast approaching, we’re counting on the support of our membership team. name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m the most vulnerable Democrat running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Folks, it's official.

Roll Call just ranked me as the most vulnerable Democratic Senator running
for reelection in 2024.

That’s why Mitch McConnell has made this race his top target and national
Republicans are already hammering me with attacks. I know we can win in
Montana, but it won’t be easy.

Look—I’m not panicking, but I am sounding the alarm. A wave of outside
money and attacks are about to flood into Montana. This will be the most
important Senate election in the country, and it’s up to us to build a
team strong enough to win.

Montana is a top battleground and could decide whether or not Democrats
hold our narrow majority. That’s why I’m personally counting on you to
make a donation today.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18963?t=1001&akid=3259%2E346206%2EuExS18 ]Split a donation of $25 or more between Charles Booker and my campaign
to help my team respond to future attacks and ensure we have the resources
to reach voters and keep Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate
majority.

CHIP IN →

So much is on the line: building an economy that works for all of us,
getting dark money out of politics, protecting a woman’s right to make her
own health care decisions, and much more.

With your help, we can get it done.

— Jon

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: RELEASE: Painters And Allied Trades Endorse Dave Min
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
The Working Men And Women Of Painters & Allied Trades Join Min's Impressive Coalition Of Support | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2e74ce2d4e46/release-painters-and-allied-trades-endorse-dave-min-15655683?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** May 22, 2023
**Contact:** [press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**Painters And Allied Trades Endorse Dave Min** _Days After The Largest Local Law Enforcement Association In CA Endorsed Min, The Working Men And Women Of Painters & Allied Trades Join Impressive Coalition Of Support_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, the International Union of Painters and Allied Trades (IUPAT) District Council 36, joined over 125 local, state, and federal leaders, Police Officers, SEIU, the California Federation of Teachers and the Congressional Asian Pacific Islander Caucus’ ASPIRE PAC in endorsing Dave Min for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. **“State Senator Dave Min has the backs of working men and women and we are proud to endorse him,”** said Robert Smith, Political Director of IUPAT District Council 36.**“The son of immigrants, Dave has dedicated his career to standing up to corporate greed on Wall Street, fighting for worker protections in the State Senate, and bringing costs down for Orange County families, to ensure everyone has a fair shot at the American Dream.”** The endorsement is just the latest in a long string of decisive endorsements for California State Senator Dave Min, who launched his campaign for CA-47 in January with the support of incumbent Congresswoman Katie Porter, and recently announced his campaign’s early endorsement by the Service Employees International Union (SEIU) and the California Federation of Teachers. Last week, the largest local law enforcement association in the state, LAPPL, representing over 9,200 police officers, and professional sworn members, endorsed Min for his record on public safety. In just over three months into his campaign, Senator Min has built a coalition of support that includes over 125 local, state, and federal officials, including California Lt. Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, and three other California statewide elected officials, AAPI Victory Fund, Asian American Action Fund, the Asian American and Pacific Islander Congressional Caucus’s ASPIRE PAC, which represents 21 members of Congress, and many others. A full endorsement list is available[ here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=5e9a86ec5b&e=7017cc100e). Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min, who was formerly a law professor at UC Irvine School of Law and has three children in Irvine public schools, also serves on the Senate’s Budget Subcommittee for Education, which oversees all budget funding for California’s public schools, community colleges, the California State University system, and the University of California system. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on [hate crimes](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=c99b3cd106&e=7017cc100e), [gun violence prevention](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=14815001eb&e=7017cc100e), family safety, and [women’s reproductive rights](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=be5528ab89&e=7017cc100e), and procuring over $70 million in direct appropriations for priorities in his district, including for fire response, parks and open spaces, and climate innovation. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end [offshore drilling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=df809612f6&e=7017cc100e). Min sits on two key environmental committees, chairing the Natural Resources and Water Committee and serving on the Energy and Utilities Committee, as well as the Budget Committee, the Budget Subcommittee for Education, the Judiciary Committee, and the Banking and Financial Institutions Committee. Senator Min previously served as Chair of the Select Committee on Cybersecurity. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
############

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---

---

PO Box 5959
Irvine, CA 92616

You can [update your preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=66f8453095&e=7017cc100e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=8329456f4d&e=7017cc100e).

This is serious...

I’m hearing that some Republicans are getting complacent. Voters seem to think now that we’ve won back Congress, they can just sit on the sidelines...

That is simply NOT TRUE. Dems still have the White House & the Senate, and our majority in the House is on THIN ICE.

... and they will succeed if everyone sits out.
