name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Conservative Kansas Values: Freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
Faith, Family, Freedom, Personal Responsibility | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friends,

**Kansans understand that freedom is the bedrock of America, and freedom relies on national security. Without border security and food security, however, we will never be secure as a nation. **

President Biden is failing Americans on all three of these fronts. _His OPEN BORDER POLICIES have turned every American community into a border town, and he is compromising our food security with his TAX PROPOSALS and regulatory WAR ON AGRICULTURE._

I didn’t come to Congress to be a caretaker in the slow demise of America. I came to fight back.

I voted for the Secure the Border Act of 2023 (H.R. 2), which would force the Biden Administration to:

✓ Finish the Border Wall
✓ Add Border Patrol agents
✓ End catch-and-release
✓ Protect children from human trafficking
✓ Stop fentanyl from flooding American streets

I am defending farmers, ranchers, and producers by supporting legislation that would:

✓ Preserve the stepped-up basis in the tax code
✓ Kill the Farm Killer Tax
✓ Remove the lesser prairie-chicken from the endangered species list
✓ Prevent the 30X30 land grab for the Green New Deal agenda

In allowing our southern border to fall into chaos and jeopardizing our food security with new taxes and big government overreach, President Biden is compromising America’s national security. _He even vetoed the WOTUS legislation sent to him by Congress, and he has taken no steps to fix the border crisis that he created._

**_This is a total failure of leadership, and it is unacceptable._**

You can ([Click Here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=85cd2013f3&e=a9d1410029)) or visit my website at [www.traceymann.com](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=278daa3bce&e=a9d1410029) to learn more or contribute online.

In the Fight,
Tracey Mann

P.S. I stand for Kansas, and I always will. I promise that I will do everything within my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please donate today and help take our country back.
---

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Back in my time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, Back when I was a kid, we played outside and got to know our neighbors.

But now, our kids are addicted to their phones, spending hours on TikTok without even taking a break to look up.

**Big tech isn’t just spying on Americans and censoring conservatives - they’re poisoning our kids.**

Now, we need your help to back us up.

The Kash Foundation, my America-First non-profit organization, helped provide financial assistance through a donation so these patriots wouldn't lose everything after the great sacrifice they made for their country.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: See you tomorrow in Rochester
body:
townhall event | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/townhall?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

If you're near Rochester tomorrow, please [join us for a Town Hall](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c80f50330a&e=9828080a05). The event will include discussion on how I'm suing Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison and the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice for 1st Amendment violations and the impact it could have on physicians' freedom of speech. We will also discuss what's happening in the state as Minnesota's legislative session comes to an end.

The program starts at 6:30 p.m. (doors open at 5:30 p.m.) at the [Empire Event Center](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d1dd79d246&e=9828080a05), 1517 16th St SW, Rochester, MN 55902!
---
|
---
| Hope to see you there tomorrow evening!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

name: Team HER Time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63641458/407502499/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230522_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTczYzI4N2UtYWJmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jKt5XIx85x5LzShVoaxjE9roKqYSPhPcLL5cFhZH9yU=)
---
Peter, In just a moment, we’re going to ask if you can spare $1 to help fund our efforts to elect more women to Congress. **[_If you want, you can cut to the chase by donating your four quarters right here_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63641462/407502501/-1193769910?amount=1&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230522_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTczYzI4N2UtYWJmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jKt5XIx85x5LzShVoaxjE9roKqYSPhPcLL5cFhZH9yU=),** but first, give us a chance to explain why it’s so important. We have an end-of-month deadline coming up soon, and we want to add your name to our list of supporters before it’s too late. It doesn’t take a lot to get your name on our list as an official supporter — just $1 will do the trick. $1 may not seem like a lot to you — especially compared to the billionaire mega donors and shady super PACs Republicans have in their corner — but we have the power of the grassroots on our side. $1 from every single person reading this email will add up quickly, and give us the kind of momentum we need to elect more women and take back the House majority in 2024. We already know that the more our government looks like us, the more it works for us. We need more women in positions of leadership in order to make sure our voices are heard, and that we have a seat at the table. Otherwise, we’ll never make progress on codifying abortion access, paid family leave, closing the gender pay gap, and more. clean_body: | = Peter, In just a moment, we’re going to ask if you can spare $1 to help fund our efforts to elect more women to Congress. =, but first, give us a chance to explain why it’s so important. We have an end-of-month deadline coming up soon, and we want to add your name to our list of supporters before it’s too late. It doesn’t take a lot to get your name on our list as an official supporter — just $1 will do the trick. $1 may not seem like a lot to you — especially compared to the billionaire mega donors and shady super PACs Republicans have in their corner — but we have the power of the grassroots on our side. $1 from every single person reading this email will add up quickly, and give us the kind of momentum we need to elect more women and take back the House majority in 2024. We already know that the more our government looks like us, the more it works for us. We need more women in positions of leadership in order to make sure our voices are heard, and that we have a seat at the table. Otherwise, we’ll never make progress on codifying abortion access, paid family leave, closing the gender pay gap, and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17a617c6-758d-4619-bd89-5646d1dc9acd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

PPS: to keep up with this community!! 👍 for more on what we discuss here! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Conservative Intel
subject: What does liberalism really stand for?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsBclx3DNL

What do you think of when you hear the term "liberal"? Chances
are, if someone had been posed that same question 200 years ago
they would have come up with a very different answer

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osBclx3DNL

Hello,

What do
you think of when you hear the term "liberal"?

Chances
are, if someone had been posed that same question 200 years ago
they would have come up with a very different answer!

You see,
while the political ideology so pervasive today has hijacked the
term to mean support for more centralized government at the
expense of individual freedom, that hasn't always been the case.

During
the 17th, 18th, and much of the 19th century, liberalism was an
unshakable belief that the state exists to protect individuals
from coercion by other individuals or groups and to widen the
range within which individuals can exercise their freedom.

There has
never been a more urgent time to understand this important
distinction.

That's
why the Hoover Institution has pulled from the vast archives of
famed free-market economist Milton Friedman to offer you the free
commentary, "Liberalism, Old Style."

While Dr.
Friedman originally wrote this in-depth piece back in 1955, I
know you will find it every bit as relevant in today's political
climate as it was back then.

Simply
click here to download your free copy now!

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development

Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: a coffee can in the basement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends, I’ve always been guided by the values I was raised with in Minnesota. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
My grandfather was an iron ore miner who spent his days working 1,500 feet underground. He saved what he could in a coffee can in the basement -- and he used that money to send my dad to college.
http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250 [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
I wouldn’t be here today without people like my grandfather and my dad who worked hard to build a better future. Now, it’s our turn to build a stronger future by fighting for progress on the most pressing issues facing our country. Will you split a contribution between myself and Kirsten Gillibrand today to help power the fight for progress?
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Amy Klobuchar and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
I’m working in the Senate to deliver real results to make people’s lives better, and supporters like you have already helped me make a difference. After years of fighting Big Pharma, we finally made it possible for Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices. We also capped insulin costs for millions of seniors.
But our work is far from over. From making child care more affordable to bringing high-speed internet access to rural communities, there’s much more to get done – and that’s why I’m asking for your ongoing support.
I’ll be on the ballot next year, and I’m counting on this grassroots team to power my reelection campaign so we can continue building a stronger future for our country. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand today? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
[http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
[http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_klobuchar?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Amy

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Back in my time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, Back when I was a kid, we played outside and got to know our neighbors.

But now, our kids are addicted to their phones, spending hours on TikTok without even taking a break to look up.

**Big tech isn’t just spying on Americans and censoring conservatives - they’re poisoning our kids.**

Now, we need your help to back us up.
---
**[Do you think big tech is poisoning our kids?](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=61688da27a394d328d204252b8eedbde&_e=FAajef2MwMlYMrNpDGG2izdCs5-yk_dpse3-XhwCPed6Q_zvMhde6XCExRTum3aHT_WZnU1psZBk07-K6K9aA4BxB6eOG1Grs31LFLUmZiPr_yegH21p87sskg2lq9pfZ8siuK29wPEoQusjdxKZsyED_aclu2craKC0ztQiCnCAEGLr21A_zCkKW2nFA1Io8DeTDIZerySocSJE2BRElFJojQ9beSPhPIhAgOGJkE4DOTRKDyRReKAmNjN4XUNe07ydBm_2_rsa9NIHBCP09vaQPrRmvboz2WmeF99BPZM78eGk0NGtzJiRI4au-YjPMz77w7ctRcsmPmrthqoWiqEE4rmQ_EtjEfgtkrHx9mhqSds6IjXnc6HVZrcBVCPMDzSuOqDUzANKY3KZnEKmGrN2roWO7rKeeFZTC0xnJwE%3D)**
---

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Rep. Bergman jeopardizes our national security and promotes reckless spending
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Under Rep. Jack Bergman’s guidance, our national security and military readiness have been compromised.
Rep. Bergman jeopardizes our national security and promotes reckless spending
bit.ly/FundDrBob [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
A new bombshell investigative report [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/ending-price-gouging-at-dod-would-save-taxpayers-hundreds-of-billions] by 60 Minutes revealed defense contractors have been grossly overcharging the DoD and robbing our military of needed funds. The current Representative of Michigan's First District holds serious culpability for this abuse of military contracts.
Jack Bergman sits on the Armed Forces Committee responsible for defense procurement and the Budget Committee accountable for controlling federal spending. His has also received hundreds of thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from defense contractors.
What do the people get for it?
Rep. Bergman allowed out-of-control spending to run rampant right under his nose and with his blessing. Defense contractors are overcharging the American people $100 billion [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/ending-price-gouging-at-dod-would-save-taxpayers-hundreds-of-billions] annually for products and weapons.
The new report shows Rep. Jack Bergman is not a fiscal conservative, not a guardian of our national security, and not a trusted, caring, knowledgeable representative.
If my opponent, Jack Bergman, a proclaimed "military expert," truly wanted to eliminate wasteful spending, he would have focused on ending excessive profits by private military contractors and refused their campaign contributions. Instead, he advocated for taking food stamps away from veterans, seniors, and children.
This is not fiscal conservatism. It's corruption, incompetence, or both.
Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula deserve someone in Congress brave enough to ask hard questions, stand up to excessively profitable corporations, and responsible for how we spend taxpayer money.
I share constituents' deep concerns about the scandal and as a prospective member of Congress, I pledge to stand up to any corporation pillaging taxpayer money.
# # #
Dr. Bob Lorinser is a former State Department diplomat who served 10 years overseas in Afghanistan, Korea, Pakistan, North Africa, and Iraq. He is running for the Democratic nomination for US Congress in Michigan's 1st Congressional District.
LEARN MORE [bit.ly/FundDrBob]

name: Ted Budd
subject: Welcome to Team Budd!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
So glad to have you

|
---

**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Hey Peter,

It’s Ted Budd here. I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for joining the Ted Budd Crew!

First, let me say how honored I am to win North Carolina’s trust. It’s a privilege that I take very seriously.

You can trust that I always will work hard to crush the liberal agenda.

From an early age, I learned that hard work, family, and faith are the foundations of success. As a husband, father, and business owner, I have worked hard to improve the lives of North Carolinians. I was born and raised in Davie County — I know the issues that matter to the Tar Heel State and will fight to protect your rights.

Thanks again for joining Team Budd!

Sincerely,

Ted Budd

| |

Senator Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina.
| Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate

subject: Representative Alex Ybarra Endorses Carmen Goers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
Carmen’s skills in the banking industry & as a community leader will be invaluable | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b28cff0cf88c/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13550267?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=83a387e5ca&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| **I’m delighted to announce that Representative Alex Ybarra has endorsed my candidacy to serve the people of Washington in Congress!**

Representative Ybarra has served Washingtonians in the state legislature since 2019 and has championed lower taxes, accountable government spending, parental rights and quality education.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ac6972d844&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| **Representative Ybarra shared the following statement:**

_“I am proud to endorse Carmen Goers for the 8th Congressional District. Her leadership in the community and dedication to bettering our state is exactly what we need in Washington, D.C. The 8th District has a diverse set of needs and Carmen’s skills in the banking industry and as a community leader will be invaluable. She's a strong advocate for the people in the district and will fight for their interests and accountability.”_

_**I’m deeply honored to have Representative Ybarra’s endorsement**_. Representative Ybarra knows how important it is to balance investment in our infrastructure with low taxes, and I applaud his advocacy on both for Washingtonians.

Even more important, he knows that the educational success of youth today will impact society tomorrow. I appreciate his commitment to empowering school choice, and the respect and inclusion of parents’ voices when it comes to a quality education for our children.

I’m grateful for Rep. Ybarra’s recognition of my banking expertise and my record of fighting as a community leader and look forward to utilizing both in serving Washington’s 8th Congressional District.

**To put my versatile skill set to work in DC for the people of Washington, I must amass the resources to contend with those who will do anything to maintain control over the status quo, instead of doing what’s right for the people. **

[**Your support is crucial to restore fiscal responsibility and accountability in our federal government, and even $25 today will empower me to serve as a proven public servant for Washingtonians:**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=d00a319dab&e=0e51d1e991)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: URGENT: Here is the situation we’re facing…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
Urgent message from Ted Cruz to all supporters and staff...

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7moq4qksv987731kjbp942tbk1nm09jmr8q2btg_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge4o36clh2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, **Here is the situation:** As you have heard, Rep. Colin Allred, a hardcore liberal, has just announced he is running against me in my United States Senate race in Texas. Who is he? He is a far-left Democrat. As a member of Congress, he has voted with Nancy Pelosi an astonishing 100% of the time. What that means is on every issue Texans care about, **he's voted wrong**. So he's voted for open borders over and over again. He's voted for higher taxes over and over again. He's voted for 87,000 new IRS agents. He's voted for massive new regulations. He's voted for the Biden administration's assault on oil, gas and energy production here in Texas and all over the United States. **This race is going to be one hell of a fight...** My last Senate reelection was in 2018. In 2018, it was the most expensive Senate race in the history of our nation in terms of hard money. We were outspent three to one. They absolutely flooded the zone with money and media. **And let me tell you what Democrats did in 2018--** They increased Democrat turnout in the state of Texas, from 1.8 million, all the way up to 4 million, where they more than doubled Democrat turnout in Texas. Now, we saw that coming and we leaned in hard. We increased Republican turnout from 2.8 million, all the way up to 4.2 million. But point two was the whole margin we had- we won by 200,000 votes out of more than 8 million votes cast- that shows the kind of battle it's going to be... Texas is the single biggest prize for Democrats in the country. It's not rocket science, if you're a Democrat, after Donald Trump, there is no Republican in the country you want to beat more than me. _They're going to_ __flood the state with cash__ _trying_ to flip Texas blue- and it has already begun... It's just been a few days since Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. **But he 's already raised $2 MILLION, setting a new 2024 fundraising record.** Democrats are all in. **I need your strong and generous support to fight back- just like we did in 2018. I need your help more than ever before. And I 'm asking you to please step up right now >>**
---
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY DONATION TO TED CRUZ >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpqjl5aabgoqqlouq5s0hnpphupdla9e0gsf5asg_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge4o36clh2bs)
---
Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty,
---

name: Letitia James
subject: The last line of defense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63646583/407515515/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1084-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWRmNDgwOC1iMmY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKyZ5kGcP_butZd_uAPHG8YWTpHcSlI3j9cLsRD4f90=)
---
| | **Progressive attorneys general like me are the LAST line of defense against far-right Republican state legislatures.**

**I'm going toe to toe with our nation's most ultra-conservative AGs to protect the rights of all, but I can only win this fight with your help, Peter.**
---
**[Will you rush a donation to my campaign so I can keep taking on the most far-right AGs around the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63646584/407515516/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1084-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWRmNDgwOC1iMmY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKyZ5kGcP_butZd_uAPHG8YWTpHcSlI3j9cLsRD4f90=)**
---
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63646585/407515517/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1084-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWRmNDgwOC1iMmY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKyZ5kGcP_butZd_uAPHG8YWTpHcSlI3j9cLsRD4f90=)
---
Peter, across our nation, conservative attorneys general are leading the charge _against_ our most fundamental rights.
**In Texas, the attorney general has been on a crusade against his state's LGBTQ+ community.**

In the last year, he has asked the Texas Supreme Court to allow child abuse investigations into parents of transgender children who have provided their children with gender-affirming care; said that he would _defend_ Texas' sodomy law – which effectively banned same-sex relationships; and sued the Department of Agriculture for a meal program that prohibits discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity.
**In Florida, the attorney general has made taking away reproductive freedom a key part of her work.**
When Florida lawmakers were working to author a near-complete ban on abortion, their AG urged the Florida Supreme Court to reject more than _three decades_ of legal precedents that have protected abortion rights in the state – calling the clause "clearly erroneous."
These conservative attorneys general aren't the only ones who are working around the clock to strip away our most fundamental rights. Across the nation, Republican AGs are working to ban abortion, harm LGBTQ+ people, halt gun reform, squash voting rights, and more – **_that's why it is so important to have progressive AGs like me fighting to protect the voiceless and vulnerable._**
Peter, from taking steps to ensure that New York remains a safe haven for all those seeking abortions to going toe to toe with the gun lobby and ensuring they're held accountable, I have _always_ made fighting for justice and equality a priority in my work. And you have my promise that I will continue this fight until the very end – but I'm counting on you to join me.
**So I have to ask this to help me continue my fight for our nation's most vulnerable:[Will you make a donation now to help me defend our fundamental rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63646586/407515518/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1084-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWRmNDgwOC1iMmY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zKyZ5kGcP_butZd_uAPHG8YWTpHcSlI3j9cLsRD4f90=)**

clean_body: | | | = | | Progressive attorneys general like me are the LAST line of defense against far-right Republican state legislatures. I'm going toe to toe with our nation's most ultra-conservative AGs to protect the rights of all, but I can only win this fight with your help, Peter. = | | = Peter, across our nation, conservative attorneys general are leading the charge against our most fundamental rights. In Texas, the attorney general has been on a crusade against his state's LGBTQ+ community. In the last year, he has asked the Texas Supreme Court to allow child abuse investigations into parents of transgender children who have provided their children with gender-affirming care; said that he would defend Texas' sodomy law – which effectively banned same-sex relationships; and sued the Department of Agriculture for a meal program that prohibits discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. In Florida, the attorney general has made taking away reproductive freedom a key part of her work. When Florida lawmakers were working to author a near-complete ban on abortion, their AG urged the Florida Supreme Court to reject more than three decades of legal precedents that have protected abortion rights in the state – calling the clause "clearly erroneous." These conservative attorneys general aren't the only ones who are working around the clock to strip away our most fundamental rights. Across the nation, Republican AGs are working to ban abortion, harm LGBTQ+ people, halt gun reform, squash voting rights, and more – that's why it is so important to have progressive AGs like me fighting to protect the voiceless and vulnerable. Peter, from taking steps to ensure that New York remains a safe haven for all those seeking abortions to going toe to toe with the gun lobby and ensuring they're held accountable, I have always made fighting for justice and equality a priority in my work. And you have my promise that I will continue this fight until the very end – but I'm counting on you to join me. So I have to ask this to help me continue my fight for our nation's most vulnerable:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for all of your support. Letitia | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: Here's the full story: Hello Friend, Members of the U.S. Congress are accusing me of buying and paying for FBI whistleblowers. Here 's the full story: Congressman Dan Goldman, aka Silverspoon, aka Schiff Jr., is lying when he says I bought and paid for FBI whistleblowers. This is FALSE, and he knows it. Only Adam Schiff could have taught him lying is the best way to make a living. We will not stand idly by. Here is a post that about sums it up: Breaking: Congressman Dan Goldman (D) claims the FBI whistleblowers were bought and paid for by Kash Patel. The reality is the witnesses had their lives destroyed and Patel set up a fund for them to they could feed their families after the FBI suspended them without pay and left them unable to afford groceries... These brave patriots decided to put their lives and careers on the line for their country by exposing the truth about corruption within the FBI. I did not coach them, instruct them to do this, or buy them in any way. They provided critical information to Congress, exposing massive corruption at the FBI. Then, our foundation heard about their bravery and entered the fray. The Kash Foundation, my America-First non-profit organization, helped provide financial assistance through a donation so these patriots wouldn't lose everything after the great sacrifice they made for their country. I am declaring a FUNDRAISING EMERGENCY. Members of the U.S. Government are effectively accusing me of being a felon and destroying the lives of patriots. My goal is to raise $100,000 to immediately double down on the Kash Foundation's efforts to support whistleblowers and continue exposing the Deep State. Please use one of these links to donate ANY Amount: You and I cannot let these government gangsters destroy more lives and silence our voices. | | | Tell Kevin McCarthy to hold a straight up-or-down House vote on increasing the debt limit. Republican extremists are on the verge of throwing America into default, and sending us into a deep recession. And they are demanding absurd concessions before they will raise the debt limit, and let America pay its bills. They are refusing to hold a simple vote on a straightforward increase, without all the added nonsense. If just 5 Republican House members voted with Democrats to increase the limit, we could end this nightmare. But McCarthy won't give them that chance. What is he afraid of? **[Tell Kevin McCarthy to hold a straight up-or-down House vote on increasing the debt limit.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T946315a9-2b4d-4fd0-89f0-c9cee8e93e42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| Joe Biden escalated the crisis along the Southern Border by ending Title 42, opening up our country to even more deadly fentanyl and violent cartels. That alone was bad enough.
But Friend the way his blue-state allies in New York City just responded to this move was even more shocking...
FIRST: They kicked homeless veterans onto the streets in order to make room for illegals. Seriously, they did that.
THEN: These NY Democrat politicians actually began taking over gyms at ELEMENTARY SCHOOLS in order to house single adult males who have invaded our country illegally!
You read that right. They're sacrificing children's safety and education at the behest of criminal migrants who Joe Biden has allowed to pour into our nation.
I break it all down in the video below. Please take a minute to watch, [then support House Republicans in our fight against these Open Borders Radicals who are prioritizing illegals over our children and veterans!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fVramT2ExhSnKySl91tZL-uh5WhxR58HjGO33H4tk2_CinZp_DOZHeJTD5sXF7IR0yBKxa8q_5rjtQe_PEWferhMcOzrpXp9UD0Czpx3l5apqNCZHP8k3J8jva-ylyIpP2NWjlZCoECO6ApiqrUoaNVnrchtzUHq70z_aLfFTE-TxTCG2pV1kZ2mUaD3DmE4BdG0nJcmL1nVDQsWjRvvHF5V0DguhH1vrgOwUOVLd1I=&c=74UNDMAlRmnoi-rl01vEDqhPdjd3YB0Opp1RQV2aZcTXShOZcj5iXQ==&ch=m3CPlxVXL0ZPoDjrSvDYkv0jqPJdnh7lsVj6X6UBS9UObl9La6rHaw==)

Play stupid games, win stupid prizes.
Democrats are so desperate to win elections and keep power that they will throw open our Southern Border, kick veterans to the streets, give voting rights to every illegal who storms across, and reshape our country permanently.

body:
Your 2023 Summer Census is ready for your review.

|
---
| | | |
---
Hi Friend,

Summer is almost here!

That's why we are conducting a complete Republican voter census to make sure we have the data we need to win.

This census will power our planning to expand the Majority and win big in 2024!

[**Can you please complete our 2023 Summer Census and help our strategists prepare a winning game plan?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z748nno04p1uco376eakn3fbfudqj0oku1iuicto_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pj0c9h2bs "Can you please complete our 2023 Summer Census and help our strategist prepare a winning strategy?")

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34f38088bc2746ecb6d8435e5f192675&_e=XLq5Ox2lN8Q1DlGtfu4c4fibk0M7sAvXWW_3565L26XPHD2WLy99XC_1qgYGdFwY0cKXN5YdlgMloWT7S9zIrGNhH9o9a5bwT6FSwHMjM54LN7BcxIN9L_-h2j8fbxfWQdoTlETLcX8lU6qWmXNpEr-_sCvp4if0d9O1BmKEHnO8vgejYIf4MqT7-fZcFVtOOSu63OBm_FJB2FMeP781pp6yDq231eXTFVLpZP-2i_4Y2PQiXKF9BRyxwr8P3YXLxlkBpEE5vpgLAqYChSXRxTzzicAZDuhExUUnP9Br4PdzVlTEOg0qLhJvRVot1TwfnToAhKPU9t97Aioi-oRlzrK8Epa47BhjhlPOUjVsgw97uRfHJXQ_hl2mu6s_6iX1d9zWc9LM9CviPZGCk5_qj8W6BCEIffU7jEUgIRzCCyE%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34f38088bc2746ecb6d8435e5f192675&_e=XLq5Ox2lN8Q1DlGtfu4c4fibk0M7sAvXWW_3565L26XPHD2WLy99XC_1qgYGdFwY0cKXN5YdlgMloWT7S9zIrGNhH9o9a5bwT6FSwHMjM54LN7BcxIN9L_-h2j8fbxfWQdoTlETLcX8lU6qWmXNpEr-_sCvp4if0d9O1BmKEHnO8vgejYIf4MqT7-fZcFVtOOSu63OBm_FJB2FMeP781pp6yDq231eXTFVLpZP-2i_4Y2PQiXKF9BRyxwr8P3YXLxlkBpEE5vpgLAqYChSXRxSZhwPdf4SV5uF9Fe2B1TxEtd43RuP5j36pnqP_l67ny33jnkwEEr9PeQmbvM76dzW4zVNCD8aZJXj4eYGZMtAJZmS-FsC_HBs9FwApw34iVjVazfxSGFbbwMmCmNjUrVlAjO8Y2Tu7zZxXjPf7VEss%3D)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=34f38088bc2746ecb6d8435e5f192675&_t=0oBZBkGvK9aSqaQJoDruuXaHuDV1tLRY069S7qElbvdKOAnaEktFaB2Ezqqg0Vm4FpbCL-edIu9KJYUA64-SbUHyI73CWetfRFnMfkyBWdHyeKI4-AdPQju28JhsUS-KviFkN2C4L46ZgRMekVKOiDUFcZV2fVErKpJ5HHezoP4%3D)

name: Tim [iPhone]
subject: I’ve got some news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
I’m in.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuoffime8sil41jqege4s4stssuidq40mie6asgo_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend,

**I 'm running for President of the United States!**

_I believe we live in the greatest country on God 's green Earth, Friend.
I believe that America can do for ANYONE what she has done for me.
And I believe I am living proof that America is a Land of Opportunity, not a land of oppression._

**_[If you agree with me, then I ask you to please chip in anything you can afford to help me restore faith in America and get our country back on track.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf4fnek55flbhr5jq4d7cjhlleq837cv90td0k2o_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "If you agree with me, then I ask you to please chip in anything you can afford to help me restore faith in America and get our country back on track.")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN TO HELP ME RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf689s64qd374jvi2pvsfrngvaqedddtnidbmd5o_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "CHIP IN TO HELP ME RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

No longer will we allow our kids to grow up in a culture **where everyone is a victim.**
No longer will we allow our kids to be **indoctrinated,** able bodied people to **avoid work,** and violent criminals to **roam our streets with no repercussions.**
No longer will we ignore the **necessity of individual responsibility.**

I'm determined to tell the truth, Friend, but I need your help to do it.

**_[Will you please chip in before midnight?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk552mgf0ji3d43kqhq736tahuek36a0q7jq1m68_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "Will you please chip in before midnight?")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoits674kt2pl69hdc25m9msk74qlg3fn3s67ru0_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT")
---

God Bless.
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3u0gd1q2obbo76e96cndlri3ggvc2rv234tftd0_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrccjvvqbil1d0uuj0b3crie0uburjgfoto4a7b8_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvv2ik4o6u2e25roe5mpca8k94s36gg5smplf8ng_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zppea2f8naqvcinkqhcdtr8d1gdbljjsnm5hoeoo_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgb1hkqavijkt72o3h35sn21gb6isj5osacd0ge0_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge2pr2clh2bs "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

# Register for the Loudoun County Summer Jamboree
---
| |
---
| | Friends, I hope this email finds you in good spirits and excited about the upcoming events in our campaign. I wanted to invite you to mark your calendars for a special occasion: the Loudoun County Summer Jamboree on June 2, 2023! This event promises to be a fantastic gathering with something for everyone. Your admission ticket includes a delicious BBQ dinner, refreshing drinks, lively entertainment, captivating live music, and even some line dancing to get your feet moving. It's an opportunity to relax, have fun, and connect with fellow supporters in our community. What makes this event even more significant is that they will be hosting a US SENATORIAL STRAW POLL. It's crucial for us to boost our attendance numbers and rally behind Jonathan as we aim to secure the majority of votes. With five other candidates in the race, every vote matters, and your presence will make a difference. Our campaign has taken care of the admission fee. All you need to do is register yourself, your family members, and your friends. To find all the necessary details, visit the event page [[https://www.emordforva.com/event-details/loudoun-county-summer-jamboree](https://www.emordforva.com/so/a8OX47ZpE/c?w=gqrzu5c-rvIt_AoIX8HjBJZ2OQ4ek_biGNMapmPqtBk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZW1vcmRmb3J2YS5jb20vc28vYThPWDQ3WnBFL2M_)]. Please join us in this exciting event by registering today! We appreciate your support, and your presence will undoubtedly contribute to the success of our campaign. When you register, please provide your email address, home address, and phone number for seamless communication. We're looking forward to seeing you there! Team Emord
---
| |
## 260 S. Nursery Ave., Purcellville, VA 20132, USA
---
| | |
---

## June 2, 2023

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: “pro-criminal”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
It's getting close to election season, so you're already hearing Republicans talk a lot about "crime" and "reducing crime" and even some Republicans calling Democrats "pro-criminal."

Friends -
It's getting close to election season, so you're already hearing Republicans talk a lot about "crime" and "reducing crime" and even some Republicans calling Democrats "pro-criminal."
But let's get the facts straight with a little help from Senator Chris Murphy educating Ron DeSantis:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-may-23/?express_lane=true&refcode=em230517-1-full&refcode2=1367_4767699_ekyGW8&akid=1367%2E4767699%2EekyGW8)
But let's have a look at how California stacks up where we have strong gun laws vs. states with weaker gun laws...
Florida's firearm death rate: 56% higher than California.
Texas's firearm death rate: 73% higher than California.
Tennessee's firearm death rate: 153% higher than California.
Someone should tell Governor Bill Lee since he is such a fan of "evidence-based crime prevention methods."
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-may-23/?refcode=em230517-1-full&refcode2=1367_4767699_ekyGW8&akid=1367%2E4767699%2EekyGW8)
How about Arkansas? Sarah Huckabee Sanders talks a lot about Democrats being soft on crime.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-may-23/?refcode=em230517-1-full&refcode2=1367_4767699_ekyGW8&akid=1367%2E4767699%2EekyGW8)
Arkansas's firearm death rate: 158% higher than California.
Point is, everyone knows the steps we can take to make our communities safer from gun violence.
Strong gun laws save lives. It’s true in states across this country and countries around the world.
So when you hear Republicans talk about "crime reduction" or call Democrats "pro-criminal," please know that's all they are doing: talking.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
👋🏻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-may-23/?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em230517-1-full&refcode2=1367_4767699_ekyGW8&akid=1367%2E4767699%2EekyGW8)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-may-23/?express_lane=true&refcode=em230517-1-full&refcode2=1367_4767699_ekyGW8&akid=1367%2E4767699%2EekyGW8)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1367%2E4767699%2EekyGW8).

1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Troy Newman
subject: Hurry, there isn't much time...
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Fellow American, I need to make this quick because I have an urgent meeting with my legal team. Our filing DEADLINE is May 30th, so that means there isn't much time left! I never thought I'd be in this situation, but we're facing an all-or-nothing case that could make me lose everything. To top it off, a Supreme Court ruling could destroy the work of every pro-life organization in the USA. I'm turning to you for help because I'm in a tough spot. First things first, can you please say a prayer to Almighty God for me? And secondly, I urgently need your help as we prepare to fight in the highest court in the land. [**Can I count on your most generous donation of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more, before our May 30****th****deadline?**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-bB0HoGWRc34ug)

[**Help me take on the Abortion Cartel**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Let me give you a bit of background: back in 2012, I started the Center for Medical Progress in secret. We exposed Planned Parenthood's illegal scheme of selling baby body parts for money, which caused an uproar worldwide. We took on the Goliath of the Abortion Cartel and won. Do you remember Abortionist Deborah Nucatola munching on salad and drinking wine while talking about selling babies' livers? And Abortionist Mary Gatter haggling over the bodies of poor aborted babies while demanding a Lamborghini? **We proved beyond a shadow of a doubt that Planned Parenthood was involved in an international unborn baby selling operation.** But the wrath of the Abortion Cartel didn't stop there. They turned against me and my team of pro-life warriors, and we've been locked in a legal battle since 2015. **Unfortunately, I'm facing an $18 million judgment - But the fight isn't just against us; they want to silence all dissent against abortion and lock up every pro-life person in America.** We're making a last-ditch effort for justice by going to the Supreme Court. If we fail, the lives of millions of babies hang in the balance. Planned Parenthood leaked their plans, and they want to go after the rest of the pro-life movement as they went after me. [**Hurry, there isn't much time! Please help me continue my crusade against the Abortion Cartel with your most generous donation of $25, $50, $75, $100, or more, before our May 30****th****filing deadline.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._MTSLvUsWeA)
---
[**Help me take on the Abortion Cartel**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
But don't worry, we won't back down. With your prayers, God's grace, and financial support from friends like you, we've been able to stay the course and continue to shut down abortion mills and save babies! **_In fact, abortion rates are at an all-time low in America, and there are fewer abortion mills than there were in 1973._** Planned Parenthood hates me because we're making progress, and they call me their "#1 Foe". We're in this fight to win, and I have the strength, determination, and will to fight. **All I need is your help to take the fight back to the enemy.** So, can you do me a favor and say a little prayer for the babies and this epic legal battle? And if you feel led to contribute to this righteous cause, every gift, large or small, is a "widow's mite" and another rock thrown at Goliath. I can't keep fighting without you, so please ask God if He wants you to be a part of this.
---
[**Help me take on the Abortion Cartel**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Thanks for being a part of Operation Rescue. May the Lord bless and keep you and know that I pray for you in my daily devotions. God Bless,
---
Troy Newman _Racketeer for Life_

name: Full Mag News
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f2466d3c1e6d4428a0c5a41cb71fe90d&_e=iTmHFEgtoF545va9HF3i9QZz_4zrXzW4pm1BUyUxYrYLqLA3tPgELLnWbSmWNZOFrX4xA53BKFm7RKBNBhSZe1xem_pDtK5uju8egmSM6KLcA3BWQCjyDP3RvjRaAG-YwZMTjNIrzQ5eyz87O1c3ts7AE_zChzV0wtwsSxDPV99AKGWH9dle_TTepndu9gSkD4A_C9Vd9hwMuHZ6_9YYXzB6OjwTyn_NaKGkG7QKYzlpwrRoGsvcddB5jtXLjJRdd5KG7SY8VlAQVHsmib0n5h51GVw9BwGPiUMZcz3C-4p1EU1aGSEeyhixPX1S0oq_yeR29VJIiYfYwIelSz7h63sxKQ-PpWIoaNhsJx5Bl3AIw1bCNV94P7VVedyXuKSmJQUGPiiZYtB5DtO6q184iCeBmwanVZp3qarsw_-mPeSrnP7qNMJSbYRH5787KWKk)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f2466d3c1e6d4428a0c5a41cb71fe90d&_e=iTmHFEgtoF545va9HF3i9QZz_4zrXzW4pm1BUyUxYrYLqLA3tPgELLnWbSmWNZOFrX4xA53BKFm7RKBNBhSZe1xem_pDtK5uju8egmSM6KLcA3BWQCjyDP3RvjRaAG-YwZMTjNIrzQ5eyz87O1c3ts7AE_zChzV0wtwsSxDPV99AKGWH9dle_TTepndu9gSkD4A_C9Vd9hwMuHZ6_9YYXzB6OjwTyn_NaKGkG7QKYzlpwrRoGsvcddB5jtXLjJRdd5KG7SY8VlAQVHsmib0n5t-uJ-8oDRDgBJ1mRJsb9btAPJ7BZHuZm-jRowZiS-No8QrsQlvuFManB_RH9_OAk2ZCz9-hjZnkYOx_56ZI1GZ9j81Q4pcZSR3nwJfPnKlspRbSB19OI_H2sbIZZ5yo_k-88hDfbUUBm9hA2m8AijcdnxpcNp5fPGmU-gHUIUDX)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f2466d3c1e6d4428a0c5a41cb71fe90d&_e=iTmHFEgtoF545va9HF3i9QZz_4zrXzW4pm1BUyUxYrYLqLA3tPgELLnWbSmWNZOFrX4xA53BKFm7RKBNBhSZe1xem_pDtK5uju8egmSM6KLcA3BWQCjyDP3RvjRaAG-YwZMTjNIrzQ5eyz87O1c3ts7AE_zChzV0wtwsSxDPV99AKGWH9dle_TTepndu9gSkD4A_C9Vd9hwMuHZ6_9YYXzB6OjwTyn_NaKGkG7QKYzlpwrRoGsvcddB5jtXLjJRdd5KG7SY8VlAQVHsmib0n5urdfsn0-nboGZyZfTcXsPBGRpImP8WNujMtwC2VNZbwxcA_4Qn3AjJY6XRY9gmLBZWTaj7TqoHx0EFWOlj6zFYPPC1vWEFMHUvO4slMI12wMaHH5vpmHsg_XBp0DemOeTQC-MgnMGk6oiaPIvy2xFspqsq6_mxUKFU-8Qem9Frx)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Full Mag News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Friend,

TIM. IS IN.

Today in North Charleston, South Carolina, Senator Tim Scott officially announced his candidacy for President of the United States.

Our party and our nation are at a time for choosing. And Tim is the candidate the far Left fears most.

It's time to choose freedom, hope, and opportunity over grievance and victimhood.
It's time to elect a President who believes in the greatness of our country.
It's time to restore faith in America.
**_It 's time for Tim Scott._**

"Please make an Inaugural Donation of any amount to become a Founding Member of Tim’s campaign today!" It's time for conservatives to rise up and stop the Left's attacks on our American values. It's time to choose freedom, hope, and opportunity over grievance and victimhood. It's time to elect a President who believes in the greatness of our country. It's time to restore faith in America. It 's time for Tim Scott. | | | "BECOME A FOUNDING MEMBER: DONATE NOW" Thank You and God Bless, Tim Scott for America PS - Can you forward this email to 5 friends or family members to help spread the word and grow our team nationwide? Thanks! | | | "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!" Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership. It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president. "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States." | | "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE" The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream because I have lived it. My family went from cotton to congress in a single lifetime. This isn 't going to be easy. I'll need your help to win. | "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!" "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?"** This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful. Thank you for your support! -Tim | | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: we just got word

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2284%2E5257348%2EBjMTcG ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, this is urgent:

A MAGA Republican just filed a motion to expel me from the House of
Representatives. And we just got word that it could come up for a vote as
soon as this week.

The message they’re trying to send? Stand up to Donald Trump and defend
our democracy, and you will be punished.

Kevin McCarthy and his cronies are doubling down on their attacks against
me. First McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee for
investigating Trump — now they’re trying to remove me from Congress
entirely. They will not succeed, but we need to fight back, and fight back
hard.

I just want to make one thing clear:

In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me.

**Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.”

Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs — which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.

This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change.

[We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. If you’re with me, will you split a donation between The Collective PAC and my campaign today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cyRaQq2-jdyRyVHZ2zpuyUnQYRIFjqgHlC3dPLsNlUdRJuLrNYxUyqLRRgEjmgZIYA-ZqTe6-5m4nGVMM-TRbGk0mCf8NmEAHcwl5Llnq6V8W-7eKIFzzi0HaG5QWi37xbaPYnOdyDXBTebFFHW66VwbCnGvK0l-1smNsItPlwcIjpYR7QZSewM_ENVBsGGcKp9z-U7A49CUpm5vJXdDQrbpzJCYrm75xA8NehRA2LvsN9xzSFe0BJPYh4OYVucc4yg2Pm8fYDviwYF3L3zb2-KngZ6tyMwIN0WKKXIX6JDXhwR81sDTY0yE0Jx1BfFRAm8sZ7-o30vN-C3-Fl6hlLXEAMab4_oxoJNSGgldPYyze9SBaNVgI9WdjeDA8X_-YfjMzSm3ca7z8hkO-lvjjNavBXGAC-XZUJnOsYAOEXvoYq7V5REUdK1wweCD5FF6ns_n96Rtutmp6ixSUhhFq0drAh6MLRQEkG1fBTYPLRXLS97DKtFAps9ZWPULJ8fpzqpYJxC62TdvhP8889XfFUA/3we/-RGApoQ-R1uy3BUJz6Abxw/h2/zTnkHGvvhckp4kqJ-YtFBcINnEEuDCgqm8cEqW9CkH8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Jamaal Bowman and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear: In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me. Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters. It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.” Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs — which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw. This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Jamaal Bowman and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for being on our side in this fight. name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z98aps27eb7hp86skp6gl3k4u9e4f49fc7qm2khg_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znpqmp7kk9c4d36u3c7qdmjq3g8j01vmbnknmlbo_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6esqjfni89sk9ubdp6lodgbgl0qu15d9auiqtd8_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zml4ecc54n9i1qh63mqfqrtcajcdmu0p4gjhrf90_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z45nl1vuulc3iip465sa830lui1ec586au3vue80_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z332ijjspatu9jonture4rddu4hi970stlaupe1o_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsdjcs6p2vm1bt2l5423shtcv69at3kv3d6l029o_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpjvs5s4novtfbs05igq0bscph2o70lvrgcdnq8g_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4edsqll3ftmbvus54iad7dernp20d0dfedsqag8_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znmeseg6nb04q6ujjqrair81nphqnnajr29f4go8_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziv4vgkm9vvprq5cvascg1kb3n8lfahhcpcupjn8_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5v0jv6f9j9grrr3rkdfbu06d2odneph5idopuhg_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z06iqr6ngg78bs2g5h89crbkiucga9ch1oe4i7ho_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi19bljqr9sbkm9c957i78n0phme6l0619bjahto_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf4cht6i15l3k4ad0nf5nn7i5fk67oks4ianin08_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z17c9p1or5d0pkpfpfdi4g6qe5tcqfq7m0kjajb8_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34c1ge4pj5c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkvl9b0i6qd2f70gb2t6u41qncn300gn5ct0amdo_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zem2r6mbi1ho44qutgfp29hinlkp03hjfvkg3sb8_rp22sh2s8i66o71ctge6pb6c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Mohona Chowdhury
subject: Sharice is a fighter for Kansas families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hey, it’s Mohona. I wanted to send you a quick message at the start of your week. Sharice is a fighter for Kansas families, and I want to make sure she has a birthday to remember today.

**[I’m asking all of her top supporters to sign her card to say happy birthday. Click here to sign on before we share the card with Sharice tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63650332/407530996/-32681213?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230522_PT_1.3_0_3MO_cm_NA_NA_birthdaycard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWFiZWQyMS1iZWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3lp3o50I0GGkkWb7BUYFQy8oixn6hYRfn7Eo-KFL1PY=&emci=b808771b-bef8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=45abed21-bef8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Thank you,

Mohona
_Campaign Manager_

* * *
**_Original message from our team:_**

Hi — It’s Sharice’s birthday on Monday and we want to do something special to celebrate.

Lately, Sharice has been focused on passing a new Farm Bill, a measure to lower the maternal mortality rate, and safeguarding the foundations of our economy, childhood education, veterans care, health care, the environment, and much more from House Republican attacks.

**[We’re asking our top supporters to join us in wishing Sharice a very happy birthday by signing her birthday card before Monday. body:
For too long, Democrats' ROGUE agencies have ABUSED their power

| |

| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b733f46aa7204763b28936b06d071dbd&_e=-meS_EaZUeXt6K01KAQ6KK4lrYFJfBzD1Cmgz61T4Zfqbq8dnPRtiIPsoodD4qi73NNyz-ZEWMxcX2H13bUes3dtW0ghsy6v7dPqv1foDmdSzqu4g-pX5kQMeVGAIvicZGejcjw1LmE-QFkJqQ1UdQD7Gu3xyoJM7B_mxUol8Cxd3g8ebvZaIWQ0WF87bDIzdxELcZVfpnuWauRg2M1i4OZw3uEvZbUVRt44yKCCmKPLS6awZNjuNC30eOZ8dBjwtoKv_fYNykBVFSHVn6P8dfqP3VgzIw1ySITGhuL43MnLfYZLePlro51KpY_m2dqoqAuDckJKz8dro3B5nRY0C6Mj1yL3PimJCVNxiKQNmn3C5KySKE6jG7LNdqrYtb1aXqbqu7TaMtSli5JePwbAavof0K1z827R9Nv8F0vekR0uzS4H2TLUpyGkxJwA7wdkUNZBRpCj4gUPy-sQRzqCqg%3D%3D)
---

It's Jim Jordan.

For too long, Democrats' ROGUE agencies have ABUSED their power to INTIMIDATE and SILENCE their political adversaries & everyday Americans.

_They SPY on our campaigns ...
They CENSOR our voices...
They HARASS concerned parents...
They TARGET America First patriots like YOU...
& they INDICTED President Trump!_

---
| | [DRAIN THE SWAMP](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b733f46aa7204763b28936b06d071dbd&_e=-meS_EaZUeXt6K01KAQ6KK4lrYFJfBzD1Cmgz61T4Zfqbq8dnPRtiIPsoodD4qi73NNyz-ZEWMxcX2H13bUes3dtW0ghsy6v7dPqv1foDmdSzqu4g-pX5kQMeVGAIvicZGejcjw1LmE-QFkJqQ1UdQD7Gu3xyoJM7B_mxUol8Cxd3g8ebvZaIWQ0WF87bDIzdxELcZVfpnuWauRg2M1i4OZw3uEvZbUVRt44yKCCmKPLS6awZNjuNC30eOZ8dBjwtoKv_fYNykBVFSHVn6P8dfqP3VgzIw1ySITGhuL43Mn5lKBJ90MLnTgSs83qaZEl02ArOkdYqmoGD4Urs-Ptzul6ISdR22K5qTX3JU0VwLyN_OG2yvLqkyHeD9mN_Av-VBW0Dc0sCQ1c6dU3Zq2H6ZqWejR8qoIAKCtqBNWl8_m0gn86S3dadTNeFL0KHOwnDVu3WSnoaTPO_gSC24Z22w%3D%3D)
---

Now: Democrats are FURIOUS.

Now that House Republicans are finally uncovering their corruption and working to DRAIN the Swamp, the Democrat money machine is working overtime to silence us yet again. They will do ANYTHING to stop us.

And if they succeed, our work will all be for nothing. They will get away with their schemes, and continue to weaponize the federal government against conservatives.

body:
I'm in.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37fb2677548a47e2a6d346602211edf6&_e=gcn3XNkYqtmlStTH7mOhL6XYQwPLNnKopbBP_rZv9Idba1iK7x7yVwuOKcZsMlahgZrJcEXkBD74pYqZuiAPwpd_z5lPF2rA7vqnNuCAcgX21c1WCF3D7imRtSHmU2nLKK94K7oZEmv8sLbRxE1c0Bda-vi1EJxPLE7Pfxr9SIlYc95Hgn8OYyv9fWoj7tzaoDAFgtzWksAksRKIIFHHue-6npReEHgCqFuvu9q_lfGHb-TtbBu2uropVyR5VJC5P-EOKB9p009FcCKksO2sWZjAtI84-rzVNllWBgie9Iu_bsjdg9QJYXNHbntS7rrxJcANkaKJAF-yxmXRfCVceKi9a2dP5HcgvHGNkz9ef0Gnro9yOeh8rP3NyDLnScIbdjuNRiDDD0gU2WICR8nA8y8wS9hDZi-iTjXJnKKCNoScBKljMZZFkeIil6LmTf6cMlIkbpbDBlpk7hi5tC7TlQ%3D%3D "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend,

**I 'm running for President of the United States!**

_I believe we live in the greatest country on God 's green Earth, Friend.
I believe that America can do for ANYONE what she has done for me.
And I believe I am living proof that America is a Land of Opportunity, not a land of oppression._

**_[If you agree with me, then I ask you to please chip in anything you can afford to help me restore faith in America and get our country back on track.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37fb2677548a47e2a6d346602211edf6&_e=gcn3XNkYqtmlStTH7mOhL6XYQwPLNnKopbBP_rZv9Idba1iK7x7yVwuOKcZsMlahgZrJcEXkBD74pYqZuiAPwpd_z5lPF2rA7vqnNuCAcgX21c1WCF3D7imRtSHmU2nLKK94K7oZEmv8sLbRxE1c0Bda-vi1EJxPLE7Pfxr9SIlYc95Hgn8OYyv9fWoj7tzaoDAFgtzWksAksRKIIFHHue-6npReEHgCqFuvu9q_lfGHb-TtbBu2uropVyR5VJC5P-EOKB9p009FcCKksO2sWZjAtI84-rzVNllWBgie9Is9BWs0Yx2W7_X8g93n8qxpBhGeG9AsLljUYTjXG_FgOTS_impcrHfKkEPa8UukVQ4HonRfevrQw2Qgj88dI_RVtMrp9u_-CcGi1BCw6_wTo1fr_jPepepOSRm3p8Qk32rvtPdK31yCFhLGWusks6kTajZPBU_o1OXAORpDeXgWMQ%3D%3D "If you agree with me, then I ask you to please chip in anything you can afford to help me restore faith in America and get our country back on track.")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN TO HELP ME RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37fb2677548a47e2a6d346602211edf6&_e=gcn3XNkYqtmlStTH7mOhL6XYQwPLNnKopbBP_rZv9Idba1iK7x7yVwuOKcZsMlahgZrJcEXkBD74pYqZuiAPwpd_z5lPF2rA7vqnNuCAcgX21c1WCF3D7imRtSHmU2nLKK94K7oZEmv8sLbRxE1c0Bda-vi1EJxPLE7Pfxr9SIlYc95Hgn8OYyv9fWoj7tzaoDAFgtzWksAksRKIIFHHue-6npReEHgCqFuvu9q_lfGHb-TtbBu2uropVyR5VJC5P-EOKB9p009FcCKksO2sWZjAtI84-rzVNllWBgie9ItRDzVnlgBQCZUYqMGLjtgt-BNOVdxPIlyFlbpPETvmb13Y0xWmZov1BEzc3ZNKFRz8UJNqnWeD6dWQ6llkC6Dh4563OlgTOAtfJIHQlVVd36kJNh_QZNrA5eOa3l5NbVFy0WbUKWnzWGY7L04BV7jzhGjvtEb3LXaTbsKhwlQ9Iw%3D%3D "CHIP IN TO HELP ME RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

No longer will we allow our kids to grow up in a culture **where everyone is a victim.**
No longer will we allow our kids to be **indoctrinated,** able bodied people to **avoid work,** and violent criminals to **roam our streets with no repercussions.**
No longer will we ignore the **necessity of individual responsibility.**

I'm determined to tell the truth, Friend, but I need your help to do it.

**_[Will you please chip in before midnight?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37fb2677548a47e2a6d346602211edf6&_e=gcn3XNkYqtmlStTH7mOhL6XYQwPLNnKopbBP_rZv9Idba1iK7x7yVwuOKcZsMlahgZrJcEXkBD74pYqZuiAPwpd_z5lPF2rA7vqnNuCAcgX21c1WCF3D7imRtSHmU2nLKK94K7oZEmv8sLbRxE1c0Bda-vi1EJxPLE7Pfxr9SIlYc95Hgn8OYyv9fWoj7tzaoDAFgtzWksAksRKIIFHHue-6npReEHgCqFuvu9q_lfGHb-TtbBu2uropVyR5VJC5P-EOKB9p009FcCKksO2sWZjAtI84-rzVNllWBgie9Iu1_YyBlR4_Mclw6QP0M0_WvReHtxb4g34Ogg3UNi0tYtb4oVMzXclxqzID5E_VjiarZfHesw0xZ7J8TpfgVxXZ9h5SjrthspKyJvNfpD7D4RGbi4zIAMfAmSo1HKK2s_6rlRjS_k535iPL_MMZj8Xk-Xu9tnfwk88hauO6pes9hA%3D%3D "Will you please chip in before midnight?")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37fb2677548a47e2a6d346602211edf6&_e=gcn3XNkYqtmlStTH7mOhL6XYQwPLNnKopbBP_rZv9Idba1iK7x7yVwuOKcZsMlahgZrJcEXkBD74pYqZuiAPwpd_z5lPF2rA7vqnNuCAcgX21c1WCF3D7imRtSHmU2nLKK94K7oZEmv8sLbRxE1c0Bda-vi1EJxPLE7Pfxr9SIlYc95Hgn8OYyv9fWoj7tzaoDAFgtzWksAksRKIIFHHue-6npReEHgCqFuvu9q_lfGHb-TtbBu2uropVyR5VJC5P-EOKB9p009FcCKksO2sWZjAtI84-rzVNllWBgie9IvtSflbuEGB6DAysk_kklSfSje6kjunD4ZINljUDS2JxI9Pey18Tb8ZavflSa83PODacSG-Iw0pf-bJz-O-u4XUpv8-oXB0u73_97aD2IAtx5KHmTcELdw5hH7wSygnbN1m0eQUSYcLPgJl415YRKZ1IS95LlUxAcuXiLh08w6WwQ%3D%3D "CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT")
---

God Bless.
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37fb2677548a47e2a6d346602211edf6&_e=gcn3XNkYqtmlStTH7mOhL6XYQwPLNnKopbBP_rZv9Idba1iK7x7yVwuOKcZsMlahwljmOFOILg_yQEH_W2jOvePhkM7N8AvtNmAHzEVHXfSgky01OVWmO3bv6m32lM4yZOUlXtkUtVVBHuwkVFJcaq-PfuM9wytDrmvn3yN1m_Uej0ZMGmiS3NgOfsq-dkwHB4nkgU4SM2WED4mFZsNv_hWIumOCjIbCVOUSxr1j9pdWjTDmxnVgedaK-M016td5asobv4sNwx8pW90P99XX0A4Klo7Iy_C-FUzMGZzmbzW29uZ-_yC4ZQGqfzVYyTE7wEtBhrazETdGaFBUb0Qtn5RvtB9Wbulg0IkqHuBKZ0M6w56obWWm9eKnWIAgtH0H9UCzcrBJW_v-S_Xy3b8cXj8BRQVwGpCff1STh9EgLWHPJjr8TMy1IS8EFNh00DrifpapJFjzqEvxAoTG88AH_A%3D%3D "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37fb2677548a47e2a6d346602211edf6&_e=gcn3XNkYqtmlStTH7mOhL6XYQwPLNnKopbBP_rZv9Idba1iK7x7yVwuOKcZsMlahwljmOFOILg_yQEH_W2jOvePhkM7N8AvtNmAHzEVHXfSgky01OVWmO3bv6m32lM4yZOUlXtkUtVVBHuwkVFJcaq-PfuM9wytDrmvn3yN1m_Uej0ZMGmiS3NgOfsq-dkwHB4nkgU4SM2WED4mFZsNv_hWIumOCjIbCVOUSxr1j9pdWjTDmxnVgedaK-M016td5asobv4sNwx8pW90P99XX0A4Klo7Iy_C-FUzMGZzmbzW29uZ-_yC4ZQGqfzVYyTE7ZaIydhHDgBrnmkUxaxBnWGHEFwasCH0vgtvnr2vPdCWPshKhXBla03t0ckgAMOJ6Ux0BmabORI-MPzZ3vH_0lzmna-ym3O7nILS_x7gop4e6meLynJzmJWi6Ejsu5_CSbI8pWMwpVy07FmY21zO0eA%3D%3D "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37fb2677548a47e2a6d346602211edf6&_e=gcn3XNkYqtmlStTH7mOhL6XYQwPLNnKopbBP_rZv9Idba1iK7x7yVwuOKcZsMlahwljmOFOILg_yQEH_W2jOvePhkM7N8AvtNmAHzEVHXfSgky01OVWmO3bv6m32lM4yZOUlXtkUtVVBHuwkVFJcaq-PfuM9wytDrmvn3yN1m_Uej0ZMGmiS3NgOfsq-dkwHB4nkgU4SM2WED4mFZsNv_hWIumOCjIbCVOUSxr1j9pdWjTDmxnVgedaK-M016td5asobv4sNwx8pW90P99XX0A4Klo7Iy_C-FUzMGZzmbzW29uZ-_yC4ZQGqfzVYyTE7NmLlseNcVX24W5x0jEASOj6H5hHcpwPTVgK_0-P8YD8-bVxCPn-Vnmvxd4me3nymOoN_7NA1g8yqBiVwwz1tdh7K5ggAwpmmsCIrtgFZkejdSkFmAsPTXYXh0Rjg1IEMd4KvjhZ2LuZa-TYOuyXz7A%3D%3D "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**
