Unlike Tate Reeves. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63650815/407532877/17860314?refcode=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU5YzAwMDQtYzBmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=whN3fV8BLuEelLz0pKttSaghOHBCDjimemv4UuC1Irc=)
---
Peter, I have fought tirelessly for Mississippi throughout my life — taking on tough battles to make things better for hardworking folks.

This is personal to me. I know exactly what struggling Mississippians are going through because I have lived that life.

You see, life wasn’t very easy growing up the way we did. Our house had missing and rotten floorboards where you could see straight down to the dirt, and we lived with the constant worry that our power or water would get cut off, which they did many, many times.

I've been there, and I am not the least bit ashamed of the abject poverty that I grew up in. It's made me who I am.

But corrupt politicians like Tate Reeves couldn't care less about families like ours. They're clueless about our lives and keep selling us out to the highest bidder, time and time again.

I'm sick and tired of that nonsense. Our state, and the good, hardworking people who call it home, deserve so much better.

[I'm ready to lead Mississippi forward and send Tate Reeves packing, but I can't do it without your support. Can I count on you to chip in any amount today to ensure that Mississippi has a true fighter in its corner come November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63650816/407532878/-1470085607?refcode=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU5YzAwMDQtYzBmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=whN3fV8BLuEelLz0pKttSaghOHBCDjimemv4UuC1Irc=) | **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63650817/407532879/-1470085607?amount=5&refcode=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU5YzAwMDQtYzBmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=whN3fV8BLuEelLz0pKttSaghOHBCDjimemv4UuC1Irc=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63650818/407532880/-1470085607?amount=10&refcode=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU5YzAwMDQtYzBmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=whN3fV8BLuEelLz0pKttSaghOHBCDjimemv4UuC1Irc=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63650819/407532881/-1470085607?amount=25&refcode=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8e9c0004-c0f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU5YzAwMDQtYzBmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=whN3fV8BLuEelLz0pKttSaghOHBCDjimemv4UuC1Irc=)**

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c2ffa099756542aca65728a9c1b2ba0c&_e=hOFydQPWxEVOCzIshVpQpkPifODdYozjesBjV5KGJPjs7hKE4vLWhV55O0Qg24dfc3FutaV0LbofsUTI6HlbQblnfuYNd23Kk5cailKJ3PRTyfhQReO9KV59ne03trAmTbgm7V_emZzWuogbY1eslJYbVWnhTTEOV4xG9WxOjgOdWSLgFY2ApStVzVl6Akdkobi5TTzhMX6uLM8umG1dK94oZ777i8sPYoWbMwY1-shJ9Bis7qn7LXEe4EjlGcCFUDwcXBTxankLBei7l9B1WJBombo45uH1ZPHNEKRUGeMiqSqzFbnwY0jQ_nuFGc838TwUpF6fzNvqO7qP3ox-TtwjDlXZsyxBCeqajzmiGCUcPXf5N01mvbi9MIFJOLc6a_Ip_xJuoIDk3jgQta-5h1956V5RHVBOAx67LXNxrM74OnpNMHg04naeHHgcXVduP0hazoit64Hsd1I9fSjmCg%3D%3D "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Pennsylvania Settles Voter Roll Lawsuit with Judicial Watch
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it settled its federal election integrity lawsuit against Pennsylvania and five of its counties. Pennsylvania admitted in court filings that it removed 178,258 ineligible registrations in response to communications from Judicial Watch. The settlement commits Pennsylvania and five of its counties to extensive public reporting of statistics regarding their ongoing voter roll clean-up efforts for the next five years, along with a payment to Judicial Watch of $15,000 for legal costs and fees.

| | |
---
---

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently it settled its federal election integrity lawsuit against Pennsylvania and five of its counties. Pennsylvania admitted in court filings that it removed 178,258 ineligible registrations in response to communications from Judicial Watch. The settlement commits Pennsylvania and five of its counties to extensive public reporting of statistics regarding their ongoing voter roll clean-up efforts for the next five years, along with a payment to Judicial Watch of $15,000 for legal costs and fees. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 22, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it settled its federal election integrity lawsuit against Pennsylvania and five of its counties. Pennsylvania admitted in court filings that it removed 178,258 ineligible registrations in response to communications from Judicial Watch. The settlement commits Pennsylvania and five of its counties to extensive public reporting of statistics regarding their ongoing voter roll clean-up efforts for the next five years, along with a payment to Judicial Watch of $15,000 for legal costs and fees. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it received 19-pages of records from the U.S. Department of Defense (DOD) consisting of an internal report by its Inspector General titled “Report of Investigation of Vice Admiral (VADM) Sean L. Buck, U.S. Navy, Superintendent, U.S. Naval Academy,” which concluded that Buck made false statements in discussions with senior Navy officials during disenrollment proceedings against a midshipman for perceived inappropriate tweets. ---|--- | | | | | It is not enough that American taxpayers spend billions of dollars annually to “temporarily” care for the onslaught of illegal immigrant minors that cross into the U.S. through the Mexican border until they get released to relatives or sponsors. Now the Biden administration is quietly doling out tens of millions more for long-term foster care through fiscal year 2024. The money will go to providers that will give Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC) with no family in the U.S. continuing “quality care in a community setting.” ---|--- | | | | | This is damning information. According to the Durham Report, President Obama’s CIA Director John Brennan, then-Vice President Joe Biden, former Attorney General Loretta Lynch, and the infamous former Director of the FBI James Comey were briefed in August 2016 about the plan by Hillary Clinton and the DNC to create a false narrative linking President Trump to Russia. ---|--- | | | The Washington Times “The report shows a yawning gap between what went on and the prosecutorial response,” said Tom Fitton, president of Judicial Watch, a conservative watchdog. “I think Durham dropped the ball when it came to prosecutions, and this was a glorified administrative review.” Radar Online Last month, the watchdog group Judicial Watch slapped the DOJ with a federal lawsuit for refusing to hand over FBI documents related to the controversial incident, which involved the U.S. Secret Service and the Delaware State Police. Townhall The settlement commits the commonwealth and five of its counties to publicly reporting the number of registered and eligible voters, both active and inactive, for the next five years. “[Pennsylvania] also agreed to publish the total number of address confirmation notices sent to registered voters and the number returned as undeliverable or not responded to,” according to Judicial Watch, and “the total number of voters removed from the registration rolls on account of death, or for failing to respond to an address confirmation notice and failing to vote in the two most recent federal general elections.” Additionally, Pennsylvania must cover $15,000 in Judicial Watch’s legal costs and fees. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

Peter,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=01ffccb6e0b9484bb6b922126effdee8&_e=F8UkdL6TSjgaVia5Qh8czhFDnyTQL_kMeY8rvXmAw8DU3_bMftCyKgA1tFhfZPk197hl4nm_P6vIJAG1D9dzbarOpBtf4q2wdum8xndrMxzOxl07R3LfLqQ5_l4plReG_LnbpbxASJRuxfDSeCnxD4LHnAXX71pG_q1scsCeS5GDnD9goEriXLapsR8StdMhvlMVZYFoYaSve-fvcDOQTv7v9ADgHfCjIshaIqsNL2m0TaNS6jAPKikejTotlXYuAqeKouax0oMneVIWkunKrek2ZjlTmzPuHw6D2-Gy2oMMdFAN7wnTt6THX7yRv-NhmyJQzANBdJLRnOArRkuYXdAPn3q9ZaOZAf8oUVHSuPl8ulhY5Sh6ytEkIzJ_7dt13pkmkw2ZzTh9ULjYpTvO0Byp-1JtSBmsbDxB2ukdRVPTN7mp8AEcQuBMKew4Ke36)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=01ffccb6e0b9484bb6b922126effdee8&_e=F8UkdL6TSjgaVia5Qh8czhFDnyTQL_kMeY8rvXmAw8DU3_bMftCyKgA1tFhfZPk197hl4nm_P6vIJAG1D9dzbarOpBtf4q2wdum8xndrMxzOxl07R3LfLqQ5_l4plReG_LnbpbxASJRuxfDSeCnxD4LHnAXX71pG_q1scsCeS5GDnD9goEriXLapsR8StdMhvlMVZYFoYaSve-fvcDOQTv7v9ADgHfCjIshaIqsNL2m0TaNS6jAPKikejTotlXYuAqeKouax0oMneVIWkunKrUg_Je8W8WSI9bLmVO6aW7BTweIVPpwrww667FJa-306beTlFturhh8luLEaD8BCa4Xcn10GvtzI0vxYOhigrYc1ukZzmmnKJf5OH4Q4RhnTNITaPP6mRinNR-DTI3O8Qnn6qy-YhDiAzhslZetuitCERh7sNS8sQRxCwzlUqCFq)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=01ffccb6e0b9484bb6b922126effdee8&_e=F8UkdL6TSjgaVia5Qh8czhFDnyTQL_kMeY8rvXmAw8DU3_bMftCyKgA1tFhfZPk197hl4nm_P6vIJAG1D9dzbarOpBtf4q2wdum8xndrMxzOxl07R3LfLqQ5_l4plReG_LnbpbxASJRuxfDSeCnxD4LHnAXX71pG_q1scsCeS5GDnD9goEriXLapsR8StdMhvlMVZYFoYaSve-fvcDOQTv7v9ADgHfCjIshaIqsNL2m0TaNS6jAPKikejTotlXYuAqeKouax0oMneVIWkunKrVFVCCoGOyJFkqBO8FNSAHnXEUyJ4t2gRiKyEJYbdS6Sa_6QmvH02CHgp08bkYQCLZOlMReh9vDGMpg0fJEomDZdv_DBgS0ATw8g6d-A4156pWwu_hWw8ePCsm4CPBV5ZI2puQWjo50a4BD3j3GncFP3ahvpElaHsvlCVOkVYeX-)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=01ffccb6e0b9484bb6b922126effdee8&_e=F8UkdL6TSjgaVia5Qh8czhFDnyTQL_kMeY8rvXmAw8DU3_bMftCyKgA1tFhfZPk197hl4nm_P6vIJAG1D9dzbarOpBtf4q2wdum8xndrMxzOxl07R3LfLqQ5_l4plReG_LnbpbxASJRuxfDSeCnxD4LHnAXX71pG_q1scsCeS5GDnD9goEriXLapsR8StdMhvlMVZYFoYaSve-fvcDOQTv7v9ADgHfCjIshaIqsNL2m0TaNS6jAPKikejTotlXYuAqeKouax0oMneVIWkunKrfXV8-zR2r32lz6OE1XOl5COj6xXJFbCN6ALnwR1u7klnAsYMxJ0aOlJtW71Biwv43lAwwV88aIUxm-XATedQ1DPSXhJ00CqodS49THWKKVZjfOqb1m8YjdfKdAhnmJwrSNnipNEQAsVI90vm5yYW7iChvmLuvRXttg0lOe_Q3h3)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I’m looking for founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. | | Peter, I am sending you a different type of political email - mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign. When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream. I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, but that won't work if we stay united. How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement. For The American Dream, - Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, how’s it going?
Between keeping up with my constituents at home, managing the day-to-day responsibilities of my job in Washington, D.C., joining delegations abroad, and of course, running for re-election - it’s safe to say that things are bananas over here!
Before we get to a whole host of House updates, a quick note on my re-election campaign: My team is always tracking our budget, and they reminded me that no matter how much I’d like to focus on other things, fundraising is a critical part of winning next November - so I’ve got to prioritize it. If you can, please chip in $7 - or any amount that’s meaningful to you - as we close in on our May deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
OK - now let’s talk about what’s been going on in Washington and on the House floor over the past month:
*
I
was
so
excited
to
reintroduce
my
data
privacy
bill,
the
My
Body,
My
Data
Act
-
an
essential
piece
of
legislation
that
will
protect
our
reproductive
and
sexual
health
data
from
being
weaponized
and
used
against
us.
*
I
called
on
the
Biden
Administration
to
direct
more
funds
to
local
organizations
and
partners
along
the
California-Mexico
border
to
ensure
asylum
seekers
fleeing
violence
and
bloodshed
are
treated
in
a
humane
and
orderly
way.
*
I
voted
against
H.R
2
(the
extreme
GOP
border
legislation)
that
would
end
the
asylum
system,
strip
away
all
protection
for
unaccompanied
children,
and
cement
the
very
worst
Trump
border
policies,
like
indefinite
family
detention.
*
I’m
a
proud
co-lead
of
the
Child
Care
for
Every
Community
Act
,
which
would
cap
costs
for
child
care
so
that
more
families
can
access
affordable,
quality
care.
*
I
introduced
the
bipartisan
Drug
Shortage
Prevention
Act
,
which
will
help
prevent
essential
drugs
like
children’s
Tylenol,
Motrin,
and
Adderall
from
running
out,
protecting
the
health
and
well-being
of
kids,
parents,
and
our
communities.
*
And
of
course,
I
voted
against
House
Republicans’
reckless
debt
ceiling
demands
that
would
gut
federal
services
like
Medicaid,
Medicare,
food
assistance,
preschool
and
child
care
-
while
also
increasing
costs
for
housing,
college,
and
more.
That was a lot!
Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for your support through all of this. Whether you’re reading these emails, showing up during key moments, donating when you’re able to give, or all of the above - you make a huge impact, especially when I’m getting closer and closer to next year’s election.
If you’re as energized as I am to take back the House in 2024 and keep our progress moving, please chip in to support my re-election campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If this is what we accomplished in the last few weeks – just think about all we can do together once we regain our Democratic majority!
Thank you so much for being here.
-Sara

Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Mark Takano
subject: House Republicans are holding America hostage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I am absolutely livid.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63652704/407539940/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTcxZTY4MS1jM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ElKBCHgTStgHS1E4zBQZ0GJ6QfPOil42boCUq-D6c7s=)
---
Dear Peter,

I am absolutely livid.

House Republicans are threatening to use a potentially catastrophic debt default as leverage to hold the nation hostage and push their extreme agenda, which would result in devastating cuts to working families.

The Republican Party claims to be the party of fiscal responsibility, _**yet they are willing to risk the financial stability of our country for their own political gain.**_

Their actions are shameful, unacceptable, and could have severe consequences for the American people. We cannot let them continue to hold the American people hostage.

It is time for us to take a stand and push back against their dangerous and destructive tactics.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: A quick sitrep on our work this month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We stopped them cold.
#
Derek, a lot of the work we do here at VoteVets centers on getting Veterans elected. But that’s not all of it.
We also support and advocate for Veterans. And after the GOP rolled out a disgraceful budget that would’ve cut billions of dollars in Veterans benefits, we pushed back.
We started at the Capitol, with a press conference attended by a dozen of our Congressional allies alongside Veterans we mobilized to attend.
Then, we rolled out a video targeting Lauren Boebert’s district, and it was seen by 127,000 of her constituents and more than 10,000 Veterans. That video has been seen more than a million times.
We’ve made more than 3000, calls there, too. Veterans calling Veterans, telling them about the budget she voted for.
And today, the GOP is running scared from that vote. We stopped them cold. We’ll make sure they pay a price for it, but they’re going to have a hell of a time trying to get any cuts to Veterans benefits signed into law.
That’s all because of VoteVets, and all thanks to support from people like you. So if you’re ready to keep up the fight, please: Recommit to our mission today.
[**Sign up as one of our top supporters. If you’re a Veteran, let us know. If you’re from a Military Family, let us know. Or if you just support our work and want to get involved, sign up now.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230522_vv_sign/?source=em230522-1-15&refcode2=9308.3013755.AwmMN6&akid=9308%2E3013755%2EAwmMN6)**
| [SIGN UP](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230522_vv_sign/?source=em230522-1-15&refcode2=9308.3013755.AwmMN6&akid=9308%2E3013755%2EAwmMN6)
---
Thanks for sticking with us,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=9308%2E3013755%2EAwmMN6).

name: Colin Allred
subject: Friend, this race is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.
I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/5221.png]
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/5222.png]
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/5223.jpg]
It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Serve America today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.
Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me.
So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Serve America to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

body:

**President Biden and the Democrats have FAILED to recognize the true State of the Union.**

* Prices have risen 13.7%
* U.S. gas per gallon is at an all-time high
* There have been 4.5 MILLION known border encounters
* Spending is out of control

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Yesterday, Republicans could've proven they had a shred of ethics, as a vote was held to expel George Santos from Congress. But of course, a Democrat is going to have to chase him out of government, because not one Republican voted to do the right thing.
body:
Expelling George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8bb2755-9d1f-49a2-bec8-af6238382b44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _Yesterday, Republicans could've proven they had a shred of ethics, as a vote was held to expel George Santos from Congress. Yet, as their highest power is ...power, NOT ONE GOPer voted to toss a criminal. NOT. ONE._ [**_Former State Senator Anna Kaplan, a Democrat ready to take out Santos, had something to say about this_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T39d46a6d-ab99-46d5-8f60-ef106ff57a15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) as you can probably imagine: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6600e9e5-3a0e-4240-a3ca-4818943bd2cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Kaplan knocked a Republican out of his NY State Senate, seat delivering Democrats a majority for the first time in decades. She co-sponsored bills to codify Roe and ban "ghost guns." _** [**_Santos, indicted on 13 counts of money laundering, theft of funds, fraud, etc., doesn't have the stuff to withstand a well-funded Kaplan. Will you give her $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to flip the seat and the House, sending Anna Kaplan to Congress and sending George Santos packing?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77d17673-1d3e-4840-b393-1feb9463a56f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for staying attuned to this race to make sure George Santos is gone from Congress one way or another._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T448a789d-af57-476b-a36f-2641c09a2044/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Gabe Amo
subject: Republicans are putting our Social Security, Medicare, and our entire economy at risk
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/Gabe%20Amo%20Header_V6.png]

Friend,

We are facing a critical moment for our country: the US is just one week away from defaulting on its debt for the first time in history — and it falls squarely on House Republicans.
This Republican-manufactured crisis would have devastating consequences for so many Rhode Islanders. It puts Social Security, Medicare, and other vital safety nets that many Rhode Islanders rely on at risk. Chip in to join me in y commitment to fight back: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gabe-amo-for-congress-2?refcode=email-debtceiling

The MAGA Default on America Act would:
❌Restrict Social Security and Medicare assistance for 253,400 Rhode Islanders
❌Threaten health care for 33,100 Rhode Island veterans
❌Raise housing costs for 2,400 Rhode Islanders
❌Eliminate 1,100 preschool and child care slots in Rhode Island

This is not an option.

Democrats in Congress, including Rhode Island Congressman David Cicilline, have called on President Biden to use extreme measures to pull the economy from the brink. President Biden should use every tool at his disposal to keep the economy running.

As your representative in Congress, I will always fight to protect Social Security and Medicare, and other critically important protections that Rhode Islanders deserve.
The fate of our economy hangs in the balance. You can count on me to fight back against Republican extremism in Congress and protect Rhode Island. Join our fight by chipping in today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gabe-amo-for-congress-2?refcode=email-debtceiling] .

CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gabe-amo-for-congress-2?refcode=email-debtceiling]

Thank you,
Gabe Amo

https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/gabeamoforcongress] https://twitter.com/gabeamo [https://twitter.com/gabeamo] https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/gabeamoforcongress/] https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Gabe Amo for Congress
P.O. Box 40457
Providence, RI 02940
United States

subject: One thing after another
body:
| | | | | [](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=3b89a3c678&e=84ee529f47)
---
Peter,
At the end of March – the first quarterly deadline of the year – we really turned on the jets and finished the quarter strong. And I have you to thank for that. I asked you for your support – and you came through.

I sincerely appreciate all of your help.

As you can see below, we’re going to need every donation we can get, so I am not going to be shy about asking for your help.
[](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=cf509111e4&e=84ee529f47)
We’re finding ourselves almost a million behind Aspen Adam, and the liberal Democrats have committed millions upon millions of dollars to target my district.

They want me out, and they want it bad.

The only way that we will stop them is if grassroots conservatives like you, Joey, come together to say NO to their radical woke money.

[**So as we face our May Mid-Month deadline, can I ask you to chip in a quick donation to help us get back some momentum?**](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b4c7d61ae4&e=84ee529f47)
Thank you so much for fighting for conservative values!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
Tell me who your friends are, and I’ll tell you who you are. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dZfs1eX4jiJpZGR2TLGYzhIX3IRQWi7AtAoY2Sg4Ij3qwZvWd7-NSlKBxpRQGltxrLaCM12LCwceroZgOLdEq9zGf6R6Ttf-uEawL8s-CyiJ6n_pbZHUbA8as2zZjP25-Z6niLppqHjmM4gQxegwIdvyR37FTRqgrQDO3cO5Nok439ke6RcCICmATIVbseg7s0O54how6o3hI3Yd-yxScGzaD2mFtHpsrtUD_yOWNomA/3we/7Y4fj50wRfiBL32w2tFIbA/h0/5PJ46EFd8cFl63KtyZ91SBDxKHDOmydjc-Xs3PWfKx4)
---
Last week Monica De La Cruz voted to protect George Santos — a man who lied and cheated his way into Congress AND has been charged with wire fraud, money laundering, theft of public funds, and making false statements to Congress — this week she’s rallying her supporters with attacks against Michelle. Peter, dime con quién andas, y te diré quién eres — _tell me who your friends are, and I’ll tell you who you are._ Monica is trying to convince her supporters that Michelle is some kind of extremist — meanwhile, Monica would rather see a liar and indicted criminal remain in Congress than protect our democracy, get accountability for his district, or stand up to her Republican cronies. **[Peter, we know who the REAL extremist is — and come next November, we need to make sure that Texans hold her accountable for her cowardly, undemocratic voting record. Will you chip in right now to make sure we can send a message, loud and clear, to Monica and the Republican establishment that Texas will remember this vote on Election Day?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_1LHjjUzvLDFUVZVzxqrcGnkO1SrGC9r1xJ0CAaNIJQi9yq6jy2mVOYOsty-I0hPsu0hpfj2PWFYS-noQGIJGgWCMdjMCJIyCh6IxGjbFSlpj6_fUc9snrowxYZ8RonM_Hu4YCdfiqNZd7oCPzHpbaB8UYq-1iAh2nSeBO5DXP4JnkyAwabmDGDuzPqZBVwTyX62nOmNhNddxtSUnyHKSqg8TIh69kcyoIpcyuhBEDTFwXyjkI4ZdcQX6KYwv3yDzsE-AYNFq6y1C_6OXWYOOT3Sp--vCMI0EHTag_qOu8-vqVc7fwxWw_ww-n3PB-KPU84Qjqx6n5p5eDaXfXdE4bkGDYJfTaekXov2NGphk4Foi8pK1QLPDSq5qQNQnJZzrZEEKmAmZKoy2Yr6EOiDghLl_0g77_pjPY3V9FalLAtU/3we/7Y4fj50wRfiBL32w2tFIbA/h1/uT-xuuuOs0NtRM_LDghNoCSSHBYFNEf5_K5xY6wg_bQ)** **[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_1LHjjUzvLDFUVZVzxqrcGnkO1SrGC9r1xJ0CAaNIJQgnVKsNmYOmG87tjxIEQ8J8YgWOBVZ48yO2Mm21zN3zUak0CMJ1VBRjhQth28RaLyPVz6iVU9IEtFBBilvmj0Ch9m3ReOIaQy6Iy5Dtm4N4P_N4cvthREFDKg8UrMvb3C7E79vU8_sxzEDtZXuHOcMZVYzDh_0e7BQWxMSvYMl8NSuRl01MoFzNdazn--4eMjT9SpXEdkLlkBp42dvRBZOZKKTBzOjK7F9uTci0STUqAE__jcsNxTp_tXPZUMEU3rGT_l_AmIViuCmFyg9M1wNfpa0tBp90AWej7Rj2xSMjiCwV6veU_TvMu1bDqavJGY7cOHPrH7KpMiL5i1riALwOtxrhCKeUkb9dIZdU8zuRxhLmY1Mq__8QeUc9sOQKBNM/3we/7Y4fj50wRfiBL32w2tFIbA/h2/I9-zjc4WjQGqkQV1XEgpw9PagNAah41OQgGOK5rPuy0)** Let’s not forget that Monica has always been very clear about where she stands. When she ran for Congress in 2022, she ran on a platform of “finishing what Trump started.” And since she’s gotten into the House, she’s tried to do just that. Monica’s politics are not just cruel and extremist — they’re also unpopular. Peter, the vast majority of Texans support reproductive rights for women, support protecting Medicare and Social Security, and want to see common-sense gun safety reforms enacted. But we know these attacks are just going to escalate from here. In the coming months, we can expect Monica and her GOP supporters to throw everything they’ve got at Michelle, and we need to be ready for it. **[Monica doesn’t represent TX-15 — she represents the worst side of the Republican party. And it’s time to get her out of Congress and take back the House. clean_body: Tell me who your friends are, and I’ll tell you who you are. | | | Last week Monica De La Cruz voted to protect George Santos — a man who lied and cheated his way into Congress AND has been charged with wire fraud, money laundering, theft of public funds, and making false statements to Congress — this week she’s rallying her supporters with attacks against Michelle. Peter, dime con quién andas, y te diré quién eres — tell me who your friends are, and I’ll tell you who you are. Monica is trying to convince her supporters that Michelle is some kind of extremist — meanwhile, Monica would rather see a liar and indicted criminal remain in Congress than protect our democracy, get accountability for his district, or stand up to her Republican cronies. Let’s not forget that Monica has always been very clear about where she stands. When she ran for Congress in 2022, she ran on a platform of “finishing what Trump started.” And since she’s gotten into the House, she’s tried to do just that. Monica’s politics are not just cruel and extremist — they’re also unpopular. Peter, the vast majority of Texans support reproductive rights for women, support protecting Medicare and Social Security, and want to see common-sense gun safety reforms enacted. But we know these attacks are just going to escalate from here. In the coming months, we can expect Monica and her GOP supporters to throw everything they’ve got at Michelle, and we need to be ready for it. ¡Vamos por Quince! Team Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

name: Jamaal Bowman
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene smeared me with age-old racist tropes
body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Congressman Jamaal Bowman. I just want to make one thing clear:
In her press conference in front of countless reporters Marjorie Taylor Greene said something incredibly dangerous — calling me “aggressive” and saying she feels “threatened” by me.
**Representative Greene wasn’t even using a dog whistle — it was a bullhorn, putting a racist target on my back to her MAGA supporters.** It echoes what happened with Emmett Till and with Mike Brown, and unfortunately this country has a history of characterizing Black men who are outspoken, who stand their ground, or who push back as being “threatening” or “intimidating.”
Marjorie Taylor Greene is a white supremacist. Describing somebody’s beliefs – which are clear for everybody to see — isn’t “like calling a person of color the n word,” no matter what false equivalencies she might draw.
This behavior is dangerous and reckless — but we can’t let it stop our movement for progressive change.
[**We must ALL continue to speak truth to power, and I’ll keep standing up to right-wing extremists. If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Justice Democrats and my campaign today?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134536?refcode=em20230522-29073&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=29073%2E1203867%2EUc60nJ)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134536?refcode=em20230522-29073&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=29073%2E1203867%2EUc60nJ)**
Thank you for being on our side in this fight.
Peace and love,
Jamaal Bowman
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=21&akid=29073%2E1203867%2EUc60nJ) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=22&akid=29073%2E1203867%2EUc60nJ) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230522-29073-footer&t=23&refcode2=29073_1203867_Uc60nJ&akid=29073%2E1203867%2EUc60nJ)**
---

name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: I just pulled our fundraising report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
With a holiday weekend on the horizon, I’m reaching out to Cori’s top supporters now.
#
Hi Peter, Adrastos here with a quick finance update.
My job is to make sure our fundraising and finances stay on track to keep Cori in Congress. I just pulled our digital fundraising report, here's the latest.
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230522.k-8cul&refcode=em20230522-2739&t=1&akid=2739%2E1082990%2EXFrde9)
We set a goal to raise $48,000 this month. But with just over a week left until our May 31 deadline, we're running $13,160 short. And with a long weekend on the horizon, I'm reaching out to Cori's top supporters now to help us make up the difference.
[**Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us reach this goal? Because Cori doesn't accept a dime from corporate PACs or special interests, we rely on folks like you to power our work to keep Cori in Congress.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230522.k-8cul&refcode=em20230522-2739&t=2&akid=2739%2E1082990%2EXFrde9)
Cori is up for re-election next year. And because grassroots contributions power our campaign, we have to start raising the resources we need now to build a winning campaign. That's why reaching every monthly goal is so critical.
Every dollar helps us raise critical funds for digital ads, hiring staff, and building a strong and effective organizing program.
What we raise this month will directly impact the kind of campaign we can run to keep Cori in Congress, so I have to ask again:
[**Please, will you donate $5 or more before our end-of-month deadline to help reach our $48,000 goal to help keep us on track to keep Cori in Congress?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230522.k-8cul&refcode=em20230522-2739&t=3&akid=2739%2E1082990%2EXFrde9)
**[Donate $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230522.k-8cul&refcode=em20230522-2739&t=22&akid=2739%2E1082990%2EXFrde9)**
Let's do this,
Adrastos
Campaign Manager for Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-footer?refcode=em20230522-2739-footer&t=23&refcode2=2739_1082990_XFrde9&akid=2739%2E1082990%2EXFrde9) **

name: Maine Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Do you know what’s happening in Maine next month?
body:
In less than one month voters will head to the polls in Maine for a competitive special election in the state House. | | |
---
| | **In less than one month, voters will head to the polls in Maine for a competitive special election in the state House.** This will be our 29th special election of the year, and we have the opportunity to defend a seat in the Maine House. Winning this race is vital to preventing the GOP from gaining power in this chamber, _one of their top-priority targets for the cycle._ [Will you chip in $7 and join the fight to defend our majorities and elect Democrats in states like Maine? The signature verification process in Maricopa County is a house of cards. Thanks to this ruling, my team will get the chance to topple it.

_LET'S WIN THIS ONCE AND FOR ALL!
_
I'll be in touch,

Kari Lake

name: Bob Casey HQ
subject: Here’s why we’re asking you for a contribution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
There’s no other way to say this.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=71%2E552475%2EZjTMeW)
Peter, there is no other way to say this — Senate campaigns these days are _expensive_ , particularly in states like Pennsylvania.
Mitch McConnell is targeting our race in Pennsylvania, so we know we’re going to see millions upon millions of right-wing dark money flooding into our Commonwealth.
We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back — and from traveling across the state, to putting TV ads on the air, to even buying pens and clipboards, campaign expenses add up fast.
**[That’s why we are working hard to ensure we build a campaign that is ready to take on whatever the GOP throws at us. Will you make a contribution of any amount to fund our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230522-1?refcode=em20230522-1&refcode2=71_552475_ZjTMeW&akid=71%2E552475%2EZjTMeW)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230522-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230522-1&refcode2=71_552475_ZjTMeW&akid=71%2E552475%2EZjTMeW)**
Among the Senate battleground states, Pennsylvania is a historically expensive state. With over $381 million dollars spent in the Commonwealth’s 2022 U.S. Senate race, strong grassroots support is critical to our success in 2024.
We’re building our campaign early so that we’re prepared for the long road ahead. (Remember — it wasn’t even 24 hours after Senator Casey launched his re-election campaign that Republicans released attacks!)
**[Will you make your first contribution of $5 to our campaign today? Your donation will allow us to host campaign events, air TV ads, hire more staff, and organize voters across Pennsylvania.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230522-1?refcode=em20230522-1&refcode2=71_552475_ZjTMeW&akid=71%2E552475%2EZjTMeW)**
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230522-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230522-1&refcode2=71_552475_ZjTMeW&akid=71%2E552475%2EZjTMeW)**
Thank you so much,
Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=71%2E552475%2EZjTMeW)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=71%2E552475%2EZjTMeW)

Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102

subject: The May Minuteman Honoree, Securing Our Border, and More...
body:
This month, we are proud to honor Courtney Klepfer. | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Welcome to the May edition of **The Moran Minuteman**.
This monthly newsletter is our way of recognizing extraordinary efforts in Texas Congressional District 1 and providing an inside look into what happens behind the scenes in the life of a Congressman.
---
|
---
| Most of us remember the Schoolhouse Rock video “ _**[How a Bill Becomes a Law](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=4a7785de77&e=bbce4dd6ad).**_” The storyline provides an excellent introduction to our legislative process, but many of the nuances, understandably, are left out. One of those is the idea of original cosponsors.
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=57520b409d&e=bbce4dd6ad "Schoolhouse Rock How a Bill Becomes a Law")
---
| Generally speaking, Members of Congress cosponsor legislation to signal support, and they can sign on as a cosponsor at any point from when the bill is first introduced to when it is passed by the House. However, original cosponsors of major initiatives are typically reserved for Members who took an active role in developing the legislation. Earlier this month, I was honored to be one of just eight original cosponsors - and the only freshman cosponsor - of the Secure the Border Act of 2023. My legislation, the Visa Overstays Penalty Act, was included in this important bill, which we considered in the Judiciary Committee on April 19th. The House is doing our job to secure the border - we just need the Democrats in the Senate and the President to step up and do their jobs.
---
|
---
|
## Congratulations to our May Minuteman -
When I think of East Texans, I think of the [Minutemen of the Revolutionary War](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=c18f9f4ad7&e=bbce4dd6ad). Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment’s notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. **Today’s East Texans reflect those traits.** You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better. Each month, I will recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region - someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the monthly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt.
---
| This month’s Minuteman, Courtney Klepfer, has devoted her time and energy to supporting the senior community. Through both her business and her volunteer work, Courtney has improved the lives of seniors across East Texas. Courtney was instrumental in making Tyler just the second Texas city recognized as a Dementia Friendly Community. She serves as the Chair of the Senior Resource Committee for the Tyler Area Chamber of Commerce, and she is a member of both the development committee for the Alzheimer’s Alliance of Smith County and the Alzheimer’s Support Auxiliary for People.
---
|
---
| “Courtney has an extreme passion for our seniors, and it shows through her tireless efforts to provide a high quality of life and bring joy to the elderly community across East Texas,” Stephanie Taylor, Executive Director of the Alzheimer’s Alliance of Smith County, said. “Without a doubt, Courtney always goes above and beyond to serve others and is a shining light in the East Texas community” she continued. Thank you, Courtney, for answering the call to serve in East Texas!
---
| Do you know an East Texan who would be a great next recipient? Please submit their name **[here](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=5e17f98c52&e=bbce4dd6ad).** Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt!
---
| [Nominate a Minuteman!](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=2e4fd23493&e=bbce4dd6ad "Nominate a Minuteman!")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=64710f25af&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
|
## JOIN US! _Taste of East Texas _reception with special guest, Chairman Jim Jordan
I am thrilled to extend a personal invitation to you for an exciting evening in Tyler, TX. On June 2, at 6 p.m., I will be hosting a special reception, and I'm honored to announce that Jim Jordan, Chairman of the House Judiciary Committee, will be joining us as a distinguished guest. Please join us at the new W.T. Brookshire Conference Center (2000 W. Front St. Tyler, TX), for an evening filled with lively discussions, networking opportunities, and the chance to connect with individuals who share a common vision for our country. Chairman Jordan and I are eager to meet each and every one of you, listen to your thoughts, and work together toward an even stronger future for East Texas. Together, let us defend our principles, uphold our liberties and pave the way for a better tomorrow.
---
| [Buy Tickets](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=de32d25d11&e=bbce4dd6ad "Buy Tickets")
---
|
---
|
## Delivering on Promises
When I ran for Congress, I promised transparency and to keep the First District of Texas informed of what goes on in our Congressional office. Take a listen to this KTBB segment detailing the committee mark-up process and how it works to provide the best possible policy outcome.
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=50be6be195&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| I pledge to continue to provide regular updates and share information about the processes we use to pursue the faith, family, and freedom goals you elected me to represent in Washington, DC.
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran Congressman, First District of Texas
---
|
---
|
---

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: Can I count on you to help shape Republican strategy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Use your unique link inside...Senate Republicans asked me if I could solicit help from my most loyal supporters.| | | __**Peter, this is Kellyanne Conway. **__ Senate Republicans asked me if I could solicit help from **my most loyal supporters.** _You immediately_ came to my mind, which is why I’m reaching out.
---
_I need you to tell Senate Republicans your thoughts and opinions[**by completing the survey below.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1099c81aa69d4effbb408c278c13dab9&_e=Im_PHfsZFAwXTXd9szs8zFHU66kGmEjWjs1Mg2pPrjbLYuCOuMF3DcVGU5PE6xtf7AuPLYsM9qwwkPiKg1qYvikwoa1V_mqSXepQulMYTWu7HpfXqbkEfCpL3Wmsf1Fn7JgFNL4xr8IgKQuue9KscI3XtCl1iXM5u737e2I29EZi41VHN6nO9Inuxv5Py2BYDOq33pALHnsGCbIp6do82kHOVjcB5hCk2e66bJKCI1dUzETsFzGvo-1jMZ8NwJLMi5kdsMJJuc4E8ZKMdLa4qE40jqgEg5letloDpwT6seo8euAOdXTwnhbcttOlwi1F_LUrA7YSWefvDXuHEybDFklDh2jU1HbDcYRYsd08svlxS784-PtE412tZUW88JuUpIuZRsIyKZcy3_ahKV9kynINU9gEP_pZ-kypXf_cMM9pTekDGxG0vXDLCCfah_c8JDT7X408o2TWOiPExm9ldg%3D%3D) I know you accurately represent the strong Conservative movement that many other Americans lack._

Last week, half of the
Indiana Democrat Party’s congressional delegation made their party’s
stance on the police extremely clear.

They don’t Back the Blue.
During National Police Week, Democrat Congressman André Carson voted
against a resolution that reads, Congress:

Recognizes and appreciates
the dedication and devotion demonstrated by the men and women of local
law enforcement who keep our communities safe; andCondemns calls to
defund, disband, dismantle, or abolish the police.

name: Gov. Roy Cooper
subject: It’s time to declare a state of emergency for public education in North Carolina.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I hope you’ll take just 5 minutes to watch my speech on public education today.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63658255/407556959/823540626?refcode=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGM3OWI0Yy1kM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0qmRTXRO9Sn3XXG_GnjslWku1ZjHTRB7oUNeXQ-df4=&emci=54c1d0b2-a6f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
**Peter, the GOP legislature is planning to choke the life out of public education, and you need to know what’s happening in the next few weeks.** I’d like to tell you about their plans myself, so **[you can watch my speech here, or read my message below, then sign on to fight back against their attacks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63658256/407556960/-786360086?refcode=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGM3OWI0Yy1kM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0qmRTXRO9Sn3XXG_GnjslWku1ZjHTRB7oUNeXQ-df4=&emci=54c1d0b2-a6f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63658257/407556961/-786360086?refcode=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGM3OWI0Yy1kM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0qmRTXRO9Sn3XXG_GnjslWku1ZjHTRB7oUNeXQ-df4=&emci=54c1d0b2-a6f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
---
* * *
Republicans have introduced a private school voucher scheme that will pour your tax money into unaccountable private schools and cost public schools hundreds of millions of dollars.
And while they hand out private school vouchers to send millionaires’ kids to private schools on your dime, **Republicans want to give the rich more large tax breaks, too.**
This drops an atomic bomb on public education by **shrinking the state’s budget by almost 20%,** making it almost impossible for schools to get the funds they need or teachers to get the raises they deserve.
**Not satisfied by starving public education, the Republicans in the legislature also want to bring their political culture wars into the classrooms**
If they get their way, our State Board of Education will be replaced by political hacks who can dictate what is taught — and not taught — in our public schools. Politicians will police our children’s curriculum with book bans, elimination of science courses, and more.
**Put together, these ideas spell disaster that requires emergency action.**
I’m releasing a speech today outlining my plan to fight back. **[Please, watch it here, then add your name to show your commitment to fighting for our public education system>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63658258/407556962/-786360086?refcode=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGM3OWI0Yy1kM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0qmRTXRO9Sn3XXG_GnjslWku1ZjHTRB7oUNeXQ-df4=&emci=54c1d0b2-a6f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)**
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63658259/407556963/-786360086?refcode=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGM3OWI0Yy1kM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0qmRTXRO9Sn3XXG_GnjslWku1ZjHTRB7oUNeXQ-df4=&emci=54c1d0b2-a6f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=94c79b4c-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

Gov. Roy Cooper

body:
It’s past time to pass a clean debt limit increase
#
Peter, we've got something crucial to discuss with you today.
It's about the debt ceiling, and we need your help to tackle this pressing issue.
It’s past time to pass a clean debt limit increase. Under the tenure of President Trump, it was raised _three times_ without this political drama. Now Republicans want to hold our economy hostage unless President Biden agrees to slash programs and services millions rely on.
**[Here's the deal: if we don't take action soon, our country's economy could spiral into chaos like never before. Will you sign Senator Durbin’s petition to tell the GOP to stop playing games and raise the debt ceiling?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63658437/407557752/-8812454?refcode=dd_em_230522_1_t1&ms=dd_em_230522_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDIxODJhMS1kM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5wfJv02q4PSj7_zi_1RZt9ld0-IYNspNhC6Q5oYiO_0=&emci=78148d11-cdf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=202182a1-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
Let's be real, these MAGA politicians are playing dangerous partisan games with the debt ceiling. But **together, we can show them that we prioritize the stability and prosperity of our nation over their political agendas.**
We can't afford to let the reckless policies of Republicans jeopardize our economy and the well-being of millions of Americans.
**[Your signature on this petition sends a clear message: we demand fiscal responsibility and a secure future for our country. It's time to let House conservatives know that we're watching and expecting them to act in the best interest of all Americans. Sign on now>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63658438/407557753/-8812454?refcode=dd_em_230522_1_t1&ms=dd_em_230522_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDIxODJhMS1kM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5wfJv02q4PSj7_zi_1RZt9ld0-IYNspNhC6Q5oYiO_0=&emci=78148d11-cdf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=202182a1-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
By adding your name to the petition, you'll be part of a strong movement pushing our lawmakers to make responsible choices and prevent this impending crisis.
Don't wait another moment! **[Join us in this important cause by signing the petition right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63658439/407557754/-8812454?refcode=dd_em_230522_1_t1&ms=dd_em_230522_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDIxODJhMS1kM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5wfJv02q4PSj7_zi_1RZt9ld0-IYNspNhC6Q5oYiO_0=&emci=78148d11-cdf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=202182a1-d3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974) **Together, we can make a real impact and shape the future of our economy.
Thank you for your unwavering dedication to our nation's well-being,
Team Durbin

name: NDRC Updates
subject: 3️⃣ things you need to know about upcoming state supreme court races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Last month, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a _double-digit margin_ , making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs.

**But Wisconsin was just the beginning. Here are three things you need to know about upcoming state supreme court races:** **(1) In the coming months,_more than 30_ states will hold elections for their highest courts.**

These elections could have major impacts on the future of voting rights, fair maps, abortion rights, gun safety, and more – not just in their respective states, but all across the country.

**(2) Republican strategists have called state supreme court races “the next big political frontier.”**

For years, Republicans worked to stack federal courts with justices who they believed would help advance their unpopular conservative agenda. _Those efforts are paying off._ Now, far-right donors are plotting to repeat that strategy across the country by working to elect their preferred justices to state supreme courts.

**(3) Attorney General Eric Holder said, “American life as we know it is at stake in every state judicial election.”**

That’s because, in light of recent SCOTUS decisions eliminating national protections for reproductive and voting rights, state courts are more important than ever to protect our fundamental freedoms. To preserve the future of our democracy, it’s vital that we elect fair-minded justices to our state supreme courts. **Your donation today will help power all of the NDRC’s work, including efforts to help elect leaders who will defend our democracy. Will you pitch in to the NDRC today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Last month, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin , making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs. But Wisconsin was just the beginning. Here are three things you need to know about upcoming state supreme court races: (1) In the coming months,more than 30 states will hold elections for their highest courts. These elections could have major impacts on the future of voting rights, fair maps, abortion rights, gun safety, and more – not just in their respective states, but all across the country. (2) Republican strategists have called state supreme court races “the next big political frontier.” For years, Republicans worked to stack federal courts with justices who they believed would help advance their unpopular conservative agenda. Those efforts are paying off. Now, far-right donors are plotting to repeat that strategy across the country by working to elect their preferred justices to state supreme courts. (3) Attorney General Eric Holder said, “American life as we know it is at stake in every state judicial election.” That’s because, in light of recent SCOTUS decisions eliminating national protections for reproductive and voting rights, state courts are more important than ever to protect our fundamental freedoms. To preserve the future of our democracy, it’s vital that we elect fair-minded justices to our state supreme courts. Your donation today will help power all of the NDRC’s work, including efforts to help elect leaders who will defend our democracy. Will you pitch in to the NDRC today? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. body:
I am honored to join the team here in their essential mission.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63659734/407560252/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230522EricIntro_N_EL_90do_6_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxZDA1MDgyLWQ1ZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lj6BWcQqmpyCIaQhfphRI2HTXm2jVSGWN2XEZEf5zoE=)
| How’s it going, fellow activist?

I am so excited to reach out to you all, and introduce myself as the New Pennsylvania Project’s Director of Strategic Communications!

I joined this team because I know that only when we all participate in the democratic process can we truly advocate for the issues and policies closest to our hearts.

This held true in Delaware County last week, where the voters turned out and kept a crucial Democratic majority in the Pennsylvania State House. **[Because of the hard work of NPP and dedicated grassroots supporters like you, we were able to protect fundamental freedoms such as abortion access and voting rights. This is one victory in the books, but I know there are many more to come. Will you pitch in $10 today to help us keep our victories coming by continuing to educate, register and engage voters across the state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63659735/407560253/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230522EricIntro_N_EL_90do_6_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxZDA1MDgyLWQ1ZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lj6BWcQqmpyCIaQhfphRI2HTXm2jVSGWN2XEZEf5zoE=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63659736/407560254/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230522EricIntro_N_EL_90do_6_A_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxZDA1MDgyLWQ1ZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lj6BWcQqmpyCIaQhfphRI2HTXm2jVSGWN2XEZEf5zoE=) As a former journalist and now the new Director of Strategic Communications, I know how important it is to connect with communities and ensure that all voices are being heard.

The New Pennsylvania Project’s mission is to empower and engage the Commonwealth’s historically disenfranchised Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, youth, and immigrant communities. That is why I am beyond honored to continue my work statewide here at NPP, ensuring that I do the same. **[The next election on our radar is the Municipal/Local/Judicial Election coming up in November, and our work has already begun. Our team is investing for long-term success, which is why I am asking you to make a $10 donation right now to help us continue our efforts of year-round voter registration and civic engagement through this 2023 election cycle and beyond →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63659737/407560255/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230522EricIntro_N_EL_90do_6_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAxZDA1MDgyLWQ1ZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Lj6BWcQqmpyCIaQhfphRI2HTXm2jVSGWN2XEZEf5zoE=)** |

Peter,

I wanted you to be one of the first supporters to see our campaign’s first ad of our 2024 election for California’s 41st District.

[**Check out the video here, and then I hope you’ll pitch in $3 to keep the ad running online >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63661970/407562451/-319931079?refcode=em-5.22.23-seg1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2U5ZDQ1MC1kN2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJvz_5HrdkvBjJx5ZbMKTkbHXcSkppw5zRnZEqPxMcE=)

Look, Ken Calvert’s corruption might be good for reality TV, but we all know it’s not good for us.

That’s why in 2022, we gave Ken Calvert the closest midterm he’s ever faced, and why our campaign was the only Democratic challenger campaign in California to win the independent vote.

Voters of all party affiliations know that Calvert is out for himself, and out of touch. Even a former Tea Party congressman who was Calvert’s colleague in the House tweeted out his support for our campaign this week!

We’re building a big tent campaign, Peter. And I believe that our momentum is growing rapidly.

But, we can’t take anything for granted. Ken Calvert raised over $1 million in the first three months of 2023, and the National Republican Congressional Committee is already on the attack against me.

[**That’s why I hope you’ll pitch in a few bucks today to allow us to keep this first ad running. Victory is within reach, but it’s going to require all-hands-on-deck >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63661973/407562454/1321783056?refcode=em-5.22.23-seg1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjM2U5ZDQ1MC1kN2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJvz_5HrdkvBjJx5ZbMKTkbHXcSkppw5zRnZEqPxMcE=)

clean_body: | = Peter, I wanted you to be one of the first supporters to see our campaign’s first ad of our 2024 election for California’s 41st District. = = | = Look, Ken Calvert’s corruption might be good for reality TV, but we all know it’s not good for us. That’s why in 2022, we gave Ken Calvert the closest midterm he’s ever faced, and why our campaign was the only Democratic challenger campaign in California to win the independent vote. Voters of all party affiliations know that Calvert is out for himself, and out of touch. Even a former Tea Party congressman who was Calvert’s colleague in the House tweeted out his support for our campaign this week! We’re building a big tent campaign, Peter. And I believe that our momentum is growing rapidly. But, we can’t take anything for granted. Ken Calvert raised over $1 million in the first three months of 2023, and the National Republican Congressional Committee is already on the attack against me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Will Rollins | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. name: Greg Landsman
subject: Avoiding Default
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
Friend, as I know you believe too, we CANNOT default on America.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63665646/407565063/1921099384?refcode=em_msg_2023.05.22_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWJlNzExZi1kYWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pjGx_7sGFwbqJyvTzWL0X5rXCaI2cBhitJB8hAqcy3M=)
---
Friend,

As I know you believe too, we CANNOT default on America.

Last week, I joined hundreds of my colleagues and signed a discharge petition to force a vote on a bill to protect our economy from default.

Unfortunately, many in Congress will not join this effort or support most any deal that the President and House and Senate leaders develop.

To be clear, default will be catastrophic. Millions will lose their jobs, unemployment could skyrocket to as high as 8 percent, prices would soar, and folks wouldn’t receive their Social Security checks or be able to access healthcare.

I’ll continue to be with the responsible, pragmatic leaders that will ensure we avoid default.

Greg

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Investing in Virginia's Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | Hey there- In case you don’t know me, I’m Karen Greenhalgh and I’m running for re-election to the House of Delegates in Virginia’s new 97th District. As a mom and business owner, I know firsthand the day-to-day struggles many Virginians face as they try to balance budgets, raise good kids, and invest in their communities. Donating to a political campaign right now may be the furthest thing from your mind - and that’s certainly understandable! **But when you chip in to a local campaign like mine, it’s like making an investment in your family’s future and in our Commonwealth. Here’s why: **** **
* We need to keep the House of Delegates firmly in Republican hands this fall. I’m running in a new swing district that Democrats would love to flip this year. If they succeed, it’ll put Governor Youngkin’s pro-growth, freedom-forward agenda at risk.
* The safety of our community is one of my top priorities. Democrats in Richmond have voted against common sense proposals like stricter penalties for drug dealers. House Democrats even supported a bill that would have prevented schools from being required to report crimes to the police. If you care about safe streets like I do, we need to elect the right leaders.
* Our kids are the future. It may sound like a cliche, but it’s true. That’s why I spend so much time working on making sure every child has access to a good education - regardless of their zip code. Yes, parents should have a say in what goes on in the classroom. And no, schools should not be teaching progressive ideologies.

Those are just a few reasons why investing in my political campaign is worth it in the long run. I’m building my campaign right now from the ground up with grassroots support, and your contribution will make a powerful difference. [If it makes sense for your budget right now, will you pitch in today so we can get our message out there?](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/d994bbc03460a30b/0e8c6eef96101491c3d6b838967d376c/37923) Thank you!
