name: Replace Sinema
subject: Arizonans are literally laughing at Sinema
body:
Sinema is trying to raise money off the people she betrayed | | | Peter – As if taking millions in checks from Wall Street, billionaires, pharma, and Republicans weren’t enough to pad her war chest–Sinema is STILL trying to fundraise off hard working, everyday Arizonans. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zx7oqECsSOyZ_494QGwvgRdfEDuRnSHze3Q4O3V5KFB-ZvQJ0NrKTF7vzZRtlBSbQsGLVibwxH891h26jpQlaYVOHjaav4FcdyV8oDhAixGR-QNcZOoKguDFHM3tSLNQNB0JGiKUUPbTWflKTPCqvS3YIsuS7RA9W3ZrsiOEqQ1CYI8sW0vzM_mC_w-4N9EmTomDm5uAJTGfFi0RcIhwlFHbl7W6wtgxWwh5ZuB1amJkfF1AfzuYwE4ToUvgHT2oCUg6QLiI2hAT8cF4TjwVmy1lXO4W7fLav-De4hyw2IQGZeCNXWFDXum35gez6tYcilJhCZ2p3yvWOVZe7-J9C9/3we/8Pjqa0d7RzGFpdTgQltgGA/h0/pZN-SMhykeg98-FARdBvzKbaXV5ShfvUsk1mWSim56k) A local Phoenix voter said they received a fundraising email from Sinema, highlighting “all she’s done” for Arizona. Of course Sinema’s email didn’t mention her obstruction of voting rights and abortion rights while doing Wall Street’s bidding. **“I saw the email asking for donations and laughed out loud.”** Asking voters for support after YEARS of obstruction and corruption would be laughable if it weren’t so despicable. **[Sinema sold Arizona out–help us let everyone know and make sure she pays for it in 2024 >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zx7oqECsSOyZ_494QGwvgRRH6fuHanSLq-cs2i_J7RNybWWWE8GLKwuSPhRep1TTcLcKqswT5OScahwkZlTwuwfgmNhspquTudXwePdn3ZLR9Rwv-OT6bVYI2DMxXxToFq0DH2B540yX4H7U0XLTd95E8vI6LW626vPkgCI-BYr5qkxUtgJlDgX7ZMflyVCc3xiNzEDwHu9AuxKLZ7_2biXwC0_FcZne_ymQZS2_5tFhwfqDNrD3pVTzSnGYVXUoOIPeQZ8RGaSSQxWHkedYcpArdye6HYHUzUG9jmyWXpd6VmkWVLVOPZcGa__22jmKjAj4Hm9ANoBzwCgSfW_0Kh/3we/8Pjqa0d7RzGFpdTgQltgGA/h1/XoP275XJQNCtrHqnXBbK-0pNmv4klke_gNKsoTCAyxc)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zx7oqECsSOyZ_494QGwvgR-1a3_JiUSvAnTgZxWMHLv0ozeHSLLhkosRNonwrgUHvHsBZCXvRRuSZuAVN2jOnVJDDS6V7PMxdxOo2ijuzBRoV68a0dag-UDqSYzEteNyCaGO8eNWIi6BP6ucCDEs5mdYitgRWNbC3rv_AZL7LxytJTbRRburGNme6XrNCwQNuFf00HSAVox4XJHcYx1CxFsyB2ub_H0HezkiuscuvfZDbEGVQ-0moq9nfSOmizOtJ_pPdrZBHXRDTIOxz8ZSZsevQJ9nxUnTenuTxg6xH94QNSAGFUP9gPfRJSdPt6O4op5iHZ7OPpyD8Yq_fR90dEhrP5cZEW3V4pyEnyhaA5DKPiaJvsSvGz1rqd0Ned2aw/3we/8Pjqa0d7RzGFpdTgQltgGA/h2/eElEqzIV_ahBGgkC8LVJHekS-mLU7EzgN9gujU3in40)

Sinema sure has nerve to reach out to Arizona voters. For years, she’s been hampering Democrats’ ability to make progress and cozying up to Republicans and Wall Street donors. She’s blocked crucial legislation from voting rights to abortion to immigration reform. Not to mention all the times she’s weakened President Biden’s domestic agenda, including preventing Democrats from passing affordable child care and paid family leave.
Sinema’s entire career has been unnecessarily antagonistic toward her own constituents – refusing to meet with many of the groups who helped elect her, and even limiting the constituent meetings she does accept to 3 minutes per Arizonan. Meanwhile, she jets off to Paris and Barcelona and London on her Wall Street donors’ dime.
**The only way Sinema can secure support these days is through obstructing progress in exchange for big money checks.****[Help us replace Sinema with someone better – like Ruben Gallego – who will always put Arizonans first >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zx7oqECsSOyZ_494QGwvgReg37_6GImBhEGEVJHlxyRbU220NjIONWmHceECdDPh91bwEh20y8O15490ZLsXRZ8YNqFnwyjrqRjNQ2jvjoDBs4AqafEc7XbaWZLW6DtlOAew6zjGl8CrLFdvKXPIeMuVy3ewritTuPFUf51_ixYI-rAWPijlowe45OTVXsT0SSfLZUCbZvzBBw4a1IkXOH5Xz_OPgqG57ZQUFrWT5QjcwYlFal718iLzWy2swRIxFNCSWW_VOebBK8bb-CuFTRTcKYjRJey7spR5A8tyQLdOrSqGfhAbYNTnsN7RSlOuECCwLBwwKlstW0l-siAK-y/3we/8Pjqa0d7RzGFpdTgQltgGA/h8/OZde1Owskx-ahwPSGperOkyadvuYRjvTgLhu6HRvfpI)**
We’re going to laugh Sinema all the way out of the Senate,
-Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024

clean_body: Sinema is trying to raise money off the people she betrayed | | | Peter – As if taking millions in checks from Wall Street, billionaires, pharma, and Republicans weren’t enough to pad her war chest–Sinema is STILL trying to fundraise off hard working, everyday Arizonans. A local Phoenix voter said they received a fundraising email from Sinema, highlighting “all she’s done” for Arizona. Of course Sinema’s email didn’t mention her obstruction of voting rights and abortion rights while doing Wall Street’s bidding. “I saw the email asking for donations and laughed out loud.” Asking voters for support after YEARS of obstruction and corruption would be laughable if it weren’t so despicable. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Sinema sure has nerve to reach out to Arizona voters. For years, she’s been hampering Democrats’ ability to make progress and cozying up to Republicans and Wall Street donors. She’s blocked crucial legislation from voting rights to abortion to immigration reform. Not to mention all the times she’s weakened President Biden’s domestic agenda, including preventing Democrats from passing affordable child care and paid family leave. Sinema’s entire career has been unnecessarily antagonistic toward her own constituents – refusing to meet with many of the groups who helped elect her, and even limiting the constituent meetings she does accept to 3 minutes per Arizonan. Meanwhile, she jets off to Paris and Barcelona and London on her Wall Street donors’ dime. The only way Sinema can secure support these days is through obstructing progress in exchange for big money checks. We’re going to laugh Sinema all the way out of the Senate, -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 | | Sent via . name: Mazie Hirono
subject: May is AANHPI Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I have never forgotten where I came from, who I fight for, and why I fight for them. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63669574/407578907/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230522_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTAwNzgtZTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pY8B0aTlUGm7Fu1hhU3nRFF4trVK1t2hGUOmbB3QSw=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63669575/407578908/695776560?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230522_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTAwNzgtZTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pY8B0aTlUGm7Fu1hhU3nRFF4trVK1t2hGUOmbB3QSw=) Aloha Peter, May is AANHPI Heritage Month, when we recognize and honor the significant historical, social, and cultural impact that generations of Asian Americans, Native Hawaiians, and Pacific Islanders have made to our country. Our country’s AANHPI community includes over 45 ethnicities and more than 100 language dialects, and continues to be the fastest growing ethnic group in the United States. **As the first Asian American woman elected to the Senate — and the only immigrant currently serving in the chamber — I have never been more aware of the importance of representation.**[_**I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, will you split a donation of any amount between my reelection campaign and HER Time so we can preserve our razor-thin Senate majority and continue fighting for justice and equality for all?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63669576/407578909/695776560?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230522_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTAwNzgtZTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pY8B0aTlUGm7Fu1hhU3nRFF4trVK1t2hGUOmbB3QSw=) For most of my career, I engaged in this work stolidly and without much fuss. In the cultures I was raised in, we were not rewarded for speaking up, or speaking out. So I focused on doing the work, and letting the work speak for itself. This led many to say, when I began speaking out about the awful actions by the Trump Administration, and the awful behavior by Trump himself, that I had “found my voice.” **This could not be further from the truth. I _chose_ to use my voice. **I couldn’t stand by while the Trump administration ripped children out of the arms of their parents, incited white supremacists, and packed the nation’s courts with demagogues who would later overturn _Roe v. Wade_. His bullying behavior, and his interest in tearing our country apart by our differences, instead of investing in the diversity that makes us stronger, had to be called out. This interest in exposing our differences was never limited to Donald Trump. This is the GOP’s agenda. It was there in the way they embraced calling COVID-19 “the China virus,” it was there when they spoke out against President Biden’s intention to nominate a Black woman to the Supreme Court, and it is still there now, as they stonewall Julie Su, an Asian American woman immigrant nominated to serve as Secretary of Labor. **As long as Republicans — whether in the House, the Senate, or the supermajority of right wing ideologues on the Supreme Court — continue to try to tear us apart, I will continue to speak out bluntly about the danger they pose to the AANHPI community, immigrants, and other vulnerable groups.** [_**Peter, my work has always been powered by grassroots supporters like you, and I wouldn’t have it any other way. Please consider splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and HER Time today to help us protect our razor-thin Democratic majority and ensure we can keep fighting together in the U.S. Senate.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63669577/407578910/695776560?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230522_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTAwNzgtZTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pY8B0aTlUGm7Fu1hhU3nRFF4trVK1t2hGUOmbB3QSw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mazie Hirono and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63669578/407578911/695776560?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230522_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTAwNzgtZTRmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pY8B0aTlUGm7Fu1hhU3nRFF4trVK1t2hGUOmbB3QSw=)

body:

subject: ALERT: Grassroots Committee Co-Chair Slams Grassroots on Air
body:
In a bizarre on-air appearance, IL GOP Grassroots Committee Co-Chair Larry Smith tells grassroots they're just "Keyboard Warriors"

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/0c95eb0aee21/alert-grassroots-committee-co-chair-slams-grassroots-on-air?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Grassroots Committee Co-Chair Larry Smith Slams Grassroots as "Keyboard Warriors that Never Built Anything in Their Life" During Radio Interview (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/il-gop-grassroots-committee-co-chair-larry-smith-slams-grassroots-as-keyboard-warriors-that-never-built-anything-in-their-life-during-radio-interview.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During an appearance on Saturday with Black and Right Radio (https://www.facebook.com/blackandrightradio/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) host John Anthony, the co-chair of the IL GOP Grassroots Committee Larry Smith defended his support for embattled IL GOP chairman Don Tracy and admitted that he doesn’t know who the grassroots are, saying “I’m trying to find them,” in a bizarre interview meant to repair his image with the constituency he’s supposed to represent after voting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/larry-smith-and-rhonda-belford-were-key-votes-in-saving-don-tracys-job-during-saturdays-gop-meeting-in-blow-to-the-grassroots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) last Saturday that he had confidence in Tracy’s leadership.

Throughout the interview, Smith repeatedly
defended (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/il-gop-grassroots-committee-co-chairs-larry-smith-and-rhonda-belford-disrespect-the-grassroots-and-defend-don-tracy-as-calls-for-their-resignations-grow.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his vote during the last state central committee meeting in support of Tracy, saying, “his head is in the right spot; his heart is in the right spot.”

https://youtu.be/8PTOJCxOgfo?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

And he reiterated that, “it doesn’t seem to be a good time to be changing horses when this horse is actually working it — he’s, I mean Don’s a humble guy all things considered.”

https://youtu.be/mwgq9agZyWo?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Earlier on Saturday, just hours before Smith’s radio interview, Tracy spoke to a group of Republicans in Lake County where he publicly slammed his favorite target: the grassroots.

As the caller pointed out, who was at the event with Tracy,

“..he [Tracy] brought up the fact that everybody’s pointing at him, but he goes, ‘Where are the grassroots? We don’t need people sitting in their chairs’...”

https://youtu.be/DVIMetFSdLA?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The caller then concluded his comments, with Smith still on the line, by saying, “bottom line is, I’m behind him [Tracy] right now 100 percent, so thank you [to Smith] for supporting him.”

And this exchange led to Smith’s most cringeworthy moment during his hour-long interview as he responded to the caller’s comments about Tracy slamming the grassroots only hours earlier.

Did Smith, the co-chair of the IL GOP grassroots committee defend the grassroots?

No.

Instead, he referred to the grassroots base of the party as “keyboard warriors that never built anything in their life,” setting off a firestorm of negative comments on social media from grassroots activists who had tuned in hoping the grassroots committee co-chair would defend the conservative-base of the party – the base he’s supposed to be representing.

“But you’ve got these keyboard warriors that never built anything in their life; now there are some people out there, but I’m trying to find them because we can’t work with them and meet their needs until we sit and talk about – first of all, what it is the IL GOP is....there are structural ways we can work together and things that we can do that support their interests...”

https://youtu.be/MpKOZSo6m-g?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Smith also repeatedly referred to the grassroots condescendingly as “they, them and their,” proving once again that the IL GOP views the conservative-base of the party as “steerage (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-views-grassroots-as-steerage-3rd-class-citizens.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,” or third-class citizens.

It’s “We the People,” but to Smith and the IL GOP, it’s “They, the People.”

And while Smith and his fellow IL GOP leaders sit in their first-class cabins with ocean views, the grassroots base of the party – the “they, them and their,” take their seats below deck, in the “steerage” with views of the boiler and engine rooms.

What Smith should have done was defend the grassroots during his radio interview – but instead, all he did was offend them.

It’s also sad that Smith was clueless that just hours earlier, Tracy was slamming the grassroots publicly during a GOP event.

And how does Smith respond? He slams the grassroots too, calling them “keyboard warriors.”

It’s clear after this interview that Smith is not a representative of the grassroots – he’s a representative of one person – and that’s Don Tracy.

And until the Republican Party of Illinois has a chairman and grassroots committee co-chairs that actually
support (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and respect the grassroots – we’ll never win.

And the elections results prove it.
https://youtu.be/_B-5aeI8XIE?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7d87c9f297-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_05_22_07_34&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7d87c9f297-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

---
Just like ordinary businesses and families across the country have bills to pay, so does Congress. Typically, we do this by passing bipartisan legislation to lift the “debt ceiling” — the statutory limit on how much money the government can spend to pay off its debts.
When we do this, we’re paying for things that the American people have already mandated us to — like Social Security benefits, infrastructure improvements, and more.
But if we don’t pay our bills in time, we’ll default on our debt. **And that would be catastrophic.** Millions of people would lose their jobs, and the economy would enter a tailspin.
Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen has said that Congress has just over _one week_ to raise the debt ceiling and avoid default.
But Republicans' debt ceiling bill, what we Democrats call the “Default on America Act,” requires cuts to veterans’ services, health care, child care, Medicaid, SNAP benefits, and more.
**This isn’t theoretical.** In my district alone, this proposal would potentially eliminate healthcare coverage for 200,000 people and slash funding for crumbling NYCHA facilities.
Meanwhile, they explicitly call for the Trump Tax Cuts to continue — which overwhelmingly benefit the top 1% of Americans.
Republicans aren’t just trying to use this moment as an excuse to force through their extremist, political agenda — they’re targeting the people who would suffer the most from a default.
**It’s cruel, it’s irresponsible, it’s un-American, and we can’t let it happen.**
As long as Republicans continue playing this dangerous stunt, I’m going to continue fighting to protect benefits for seniors, children, and veterans in New York and across the country. But I need you with me.

clean_body: An update on the debt ceiling negotiations | Hi Peter, The Republicans’ extortion of the American people has reached a crisis point and we are getting dangerously close to a default on our past debts. We must stand up to their effort to use the threat of a default to cut essential services that Americans depend on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Just like ordinary businesses and families across the country have bills to pay, so does Congress. Typically, we do this by passing bipartisan legislation to lift the “debt ceiling” — the statutory limit on how much money the government can spend to pay off its debts. When we do this, we’re paying for things that the American people have already mandated us to — like Social Security benefits, infrastructure improvements, and more. But if we don’t pay our bills in time, we’ll default on our debt. And that would be catastrophic. Millions of people would lose their jobs, and the economy would enter a tailspin. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen has said that Congress has just over one week to raise the debt ceiling and avoid default. But Republicans' debt ceiling bill, what we Democrats call the “Default on America Act,” requires cuts to veterans’ services, health care, child care, Medicaid, SNAP benefits, and more. This isn’t theoretical. In my district alone, this proposal would potentially eliminate healthcare coverage for 200,000 people and slash funding for crumbling NYCHA facilities. Meanwhile, they explicitly call for the Trump Tax Cuts to continue — which overwhelmingly benefit the top 1% of Americans. Republicans aren’t just trying to use this moment as an excuse to force through their extremist, political agenda — they’re targeting the people who would suffer the most from a default. It’s cruel, it’s irresponsible, it’s un-American, and we can’t let it happen. As long as Republicans continue playing this dangerous stunt, I’m going to continue fighting to protect benefits for seniors, children, and veterans in New York and across the country. But I need you with me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support. — Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

subject: Strengthening the economy and creating jobs

It’s one of my main priorities in Congress. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63670338/407581788/1130754827?refcode=EM_FR_230522FR_N_MK_90DA_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWIxYTA2My1lOGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ivIgvtWAqw1Yfn4LUamzYG0ajw8F5rqK-YwqfTDOz94=)

Strengthening the economy and creating jobs has been my top priority since I was first elected.

Northern Ohio's economy has been hit particularly hard as a result of unfair trade agreements, recklessness on Wall Street, and federal policies that benefit large corporations and the wealthy instead of the middle class.

It’s more than politics for me. Just last week, I rebuked the Biden administration because of their decision to classify solar technology made with Chinese subcomponents as American-made. The administration must not allow China to undercut domestic manufacturers and the workers who power them with our own tax code.

**It’s plain and simple: Democrats and Republicans need to come together to focus on the American people's number one priority – creating jobs.** That’s what I’ll continue to focus on in Congress.

**[I’m going to keep fighting for the people of Ohio, and I want you alongside me as we fight to keep this seat away from Kevin McCarthy. Peter,

As one of my top supporters, I want to tell you a little bit about what I believe is a winning strategy to hold my seat in 2024 – when we will take back the House majority. Here’s the plan:

**First,** we will continue our tradition of outstanding constituent services. I am fortunate enough to have a truly committed and caring team in my district office, and I constantly receive compliments from people about the service they received in navigating federal agencies, getting overdue IRS refunds, applying for all kinds of federal grants, and more.

**Second,** I intend to continue to work in Washington in as bipartisan a manner as I possibly can. It's not easy, but I have forged strong relationships across the aisle with enough Republicans that I am proud to say that I earned a top 12% bipartisan score from the independent Lugar Center, and that 77% of the bills I signed on to last term were bipartisan bills.

**Third,** I intend to work hard on legislation and in my committees. I am not a drama queen or a rabble rouser. In my district, people have a strong work ethic and expect the same from their elected officials. My goal is to be known for my hard work and to dig deep on issues that matter to the people of my district.

There’s one more very important piece of our strategy to win, and that's where you come in: my House race was the most expensive in Pennsylvania last year, and with Republicans already running attack ads against me, it’s shaping up to be even more expensive this time. I don’t take corporate PAC money; I rely on supporters like you to ensure I have the resources to defend myself against partisan attacks. **That’s why I’m asking you to continue your support for my re-election campaign with an investment of $10 or more right away.[_Can I count on you to chip in today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63670462/407582001/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230522-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTdiYjk3Mi1lOGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aE3gUlpJOV7LGHrPR_5bNgyU0c9DCXa4XMAoQl96cJg=)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I am asking you to join our movement if you agree with these DAY ONE Executive Orders. | | Fellow American, I have big plans for DAY ONE of my presidency. If you want to: | 🚫 | | GUT the managerial class ---|---|--- 🚫 | | REDUCE the federal government 🚫 | | END affirmative action Every dollar helps get us one step closer to the presidential debate stage in August. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Climate-solving beavers are being brutally hunted
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785237?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Another Monday, which means it’s back to the grind for many of us. But do you know who is _**always busy**_ working without any weekends off? _**BEAVERS! **_ Imagine that you’re a beaver, diligent and meticulous by nature. You take your duties seriously because you’re responsible for gathering mud, logs, and rocks down to the water where you will carefully construct your masterpiece: a dam that will serve as a “beaver lodge,” a home and shelter to keep you and your family safe from predators, which you’re happy to share with other wetland wildlife. Although your species has adapted these engineering skills for your own survival, this dam will have far-reaching impacts -- because these amazing structures actually _**help protect the entire planet**_ by playing a crucial role in combating the harms of climate change! As you’re lugging wood pieces on your normal route, you suddenly hear an unfamiliar bang followed by a loud crash. Has a tree fallen? You place down your heavy load and go to investigate -- **only to find a fellow beaver on the ground, fur covered in blood and flinching.** Before you can react, you are bombarded by a group of men with large metal objects pointed right at you... then, ***BOOM*.** _**Something strikes your chest, excruciating pain rushes over you, and everything goes dark.**_ You take your last breath through your little buck-teeth and can’t help but wonder:_****_who will finish building the dam?__ Friend, innocent beavers are being _**VIOLENTLY SLAUGHTERED** _like this right now, with _**TENS OF THOUSANDS**_ being __**_trapped, snared, and shot dead_ **every year for their meat and fur. And if cruel hunters continue massacring these precious animals, we could lose not only a beloved mammal but also a key solution to climate change. [**Please, Friend, these furry animals are counting on you to be their voice today. Will you help SAVE climate-solving beavers from being BRUTALLY HUNTED on public lands?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785238?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785239?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**Greenhouse gases, droughts, flooding, wildfires, and habitat destruction**_ \--**_all devastating consequences of human-driven climate change. _**
But beavers help mitigate ALL of these environmental threats by providing **vital services to our planet** \-- like _carbon drawdown, water storage, natural firebreaks, and wildlife shelter._
_**THOUSANDS**_ of species,**including many endangered,** depend on beavers to keep our wetlands healthy. Beaver dams and ponds slow down water flow, keeping it on land longer and making it available to _**both animals and people**_ and even acting as a natural filtration system that improves the water quality itself.
Scientists have known for years that this _**keystone species**_ plays a critical role in **fighting climate change.** But the federal government has __**FAILED**__ to protect these ecosystem engineers from **merciless hunters** out to profit off of the dead carcasses of these _**climate-saving superheroes.**_
_So now, Friend, it’s up to environmentalists like YOU to defend these helpless critters before it’s too late._**We urgently need 4,502 more signatures by 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT.[TAKE ACTION NOW: DEMAND an executive order to BAN beaver hunting immediately! >> ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785240?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785239?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting beavers and our planet,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

subject: North Carolina’s abortion ban

body:
_**FIRST:**_ North Carolina Republicans rushed through an extreme abortion ban.

_**THEN:**_ Senate Democrats went on offense, using every tool we had to try to stop this ban. Our fight made national news.

_**AFTER:**_ Our Democratic Governor Roy Cooper VETOED this harmful legislation.

_**NOW:**_ Republicans in the legislature just voted to override the Governor’s veto.

This harmful legislation doesn’t represent the will of the people, and it doesn’t represent North Carolina values. That is why I—and the entire North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus—will continue to fight for reproductive rights.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zak=20Malamed?=
subject: If I’ve learned anything, it’s this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zak for Congress
body:
#
It's been an incredible first week in my campaign to defeat George Santos.
If I've learned anything during the whirlwind of the last week, it's that this movement can and _will_ unseat Santos and send a real advocate focused on getting our community's needs met in Washington -- rather than someone on an ego trip.
Below, you can read why I think I'm the best candidate for the job, and how you can help us get our democracy back on track. [But if you're ready to support this movement now, you can click here to chip in and become one of the first Founding Donors of our campaign.](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=d2b93d08f8&e=15d98230e6)
Thanks for taking the time,
Zak
* * *
I just announced my candidacy for New York's 3rd Congressional District. **Yes, that means I 'll be the Democrat running against George Santos.**
In just a moment, I'll ask for your help to defeat him ([you can donate here](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=7060b28ee4&e=15d98230e6)). But before I do, please allow me a few seconds to introduce myself, tell you why I'm running, and convince you that this race is both important _and_ winnable.
I'm Zak Malamed, and I was raised right here in the district and attended Great Neck Public Schools from K-12. From an early age, my family instilled three principles in me: service, struggle and sacrifice. My grandmother immigrated to New York to pursue the American dream. My grandparents struggled and sacrificed to provide opportunity for their kids in a new home. My father worked in the garment industry before it collapsed and he had to start over. My mother was an educator who turned into a caretaker when some of her closest friends fell ill to cancer. These are the people who've taught me everything -- how to work hard, to care for others, to give back to the community that gave to you. I've spent the last four years campaigning and defeating MAGA extremists across the country in some of the most competitive districts and states with my organization The Next 50. Now, I'm being called to run myself and defeat George Santos so we can restore opportunity and pride in our district.
---
Unseating George Santos isn't just about restoring dignity to the office. It's an important bellwether in our national fight against right-wing extremism. And, while this district might have voted Republican last year, it's wide open now.
But the Republicans will not give up easily, because NY-03 is the key to holding their majority in the House. We fully expect them to raise millions of dollars to bolster Santos. And that's why I need you.
[**Will you be one of the very first Founding Donors to help me unseat George Santos? Make a donation now to get us started with strength.**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=4882946551&e=15d98230e6)
**[Chip in $5»](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=6c354b1123&e=15d98230e6)**
New York's 3rd isn't the same district it was when I was growing up. Home prices and rents are up. Local businesses struggle with inflation. Our neighbors feel more transience than security. Folks are rightfully angry and scared about the change.
It is that frustration and fear that carried George Santos - and MAGA Republicans like him - to victory across Queens and Long Island. But MAGA extremism isn't the answer.
I haven't given up on government's ability to adapt to the needs of a new generation - and meet the challenges of the moment. I have lived those challenges. In Congress, I'll be a Representative who prioritizes whatever work it takes to build a future we all can see ourselves in, because I know exactly what it's like to look ahead and have serious doubts about what's doable in the given circumstances.
I'm running because I'm called to serve the community that gave so much to me. We can win because I know what it takes to run a competitive campaign and I've done it in districts all across this country. But we can only pull this off if we can gather strong grassroots support from Day One.
[**Please donate to be one of our first Founding Donors to unseat George Santos.**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=dd672302e7&e=15d98230e6)
Before I go, I just wanted to thank you for allowing me to introduce myself and tell you about the importance of this race. I promise to fight hard to win this campaign on your behalf and for the good of all my neighbors here in New York's 3rd.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being one of our first supporters.
--
**Zak Malamed**
Candidate for NY-03
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=58271beb33&e=15d98230e6)
**[Donate](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=6e00827568&e=15d98230e6)**
---
Paid for by Zak for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=9bec16b14b&e=15d98230e6&c=879925f4fc). Mail us: Zak for Congress, PO Box 220421, Great Neck, NY 11022.

subject: He's Done His Part to Screw is Up!
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Good Morning and Happy Monday! **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-j/) **Missing Chemicals** Approximately **[30 tons of a chemical used as both fertilizer and an ingredient in explosives, went missing](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-t/)** when it was shipped by rail from Wyoming to California last month. **He's Done His Part** Biden has announced that **[if the US defaults on its debt](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-i/)** he will be blameless. Meanwhile, at the G7 meeting in Japan, **[he's reading from a script](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-d/)** , like an actor in a bad movie. **'Human' Error** An error by a printing company **[has made every registered voter in Nassau County, New York, a Democrat,](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-h/)** based on the voter ID cards received in the mail this week in the Republican-leaning county.

**Taking Control** This brave woman was a **[victim of a heinous crime, and now she teaches women how to shoot](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-k/)** and protect themselves. _I just love this!_ **No Excuse!**
## Rep. Lauren Boebert blasted Senator John Fetterman's "unbecoming" decision**[to attend a Senate press conference while wearing a hoodie and shorts.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-u/)**
**Not About Race** Ex-Marine Daniel Penny **[has spoken out for the first time](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-o/)** since the tragedy on the NYC F Train earlier this month. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* [**Oh dear**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-m/)
* The perfect **[product endorsement.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-c/)**
* My**[mistake](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-q/).**
* Meet **[Suzanne.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-aljtyjk-trhiujldw-a/)**

clean_body: It’s been a while | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Hey, It’s Ted Budd here. First, I’d like to say thank you for being on Team Budd — because of supporters like you, we were able to win a hard-fought race in a tough political environment. I am honored to be your Senator. Your continued support ensures that we have the resources we need to combat the Woke Left, stop the Biden agenda, and fight for our American way of life. Without you, our freedoms would be in peril. We can’t win this fight without your help. | With your support, we can stop out-of-control spending, secure our Southern border, defend parental rights in education, restore American strength, and protect the sanctity of life. Thanks in advance, Ted Budd | Senator Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Collin Steele
subject: What we’re hearing from #TeamLizzie
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Last month, Lizzie asked you about the issues that matter most to you and your hopes for the future. I want to check back in and share some of the responses we’ve heard so far.
Gun violence, reproductive freedom, and voting rights were the issues people brought up most often as issues that concern them. When sharing their hopes for the future, people said they want our communities safe from gun violence and want to live in a country where women have the freedom to make their own decisions about what’s best for their health, bodies, and futures.
Many people also said they want to see us move beyond political divisions and work collaboratively to find common ground and solve big problems.
Who we elect determines how we address those issues—or whether we address them at all. Lizzie’s fighting for smart, thoughtful solutions: She has led on efforts to protect access to abortion care, and consistently voted to protect our right to vote, to protect our communities from gun violence, including the first federal gun-safety legislation signed into law in nearly 30 years. She has also worked collaboratively where she can, and delivered bipartisan solutions to her district and our country.

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9Pxkl7g6s02WsvnLwKmG2g2]

I noticed that we haven’t heard from you yet. As Lizzie’s Political Director, I know that Lizzie and our whole team want to hear your thoughts—on these issues or any others that might be on your mind right now. Take our brief survey here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/9Pxkl7g6s02WsvnLwKmG2g2]
Talk soon,
Collin
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF LIZZIE FLETCHER, A JOINT FUNDRAISING COMMITTEE AUTHORIZED BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS AND LEADING PEOPLE FORWARD PAC.

subject: Maximize your impact
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BUILDING BRIDGES PAC Building Bridges PAC
body:
Michigan Democrats are hard at work getting things done. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63671578/407585802/-99881904?refcode=EM_FR_230522FR_N_GW_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGIyYTIyNy1lY2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72Vm9YvvThNNlopQoPIRqn5OtUJ-LWEW74QYY8YRegY=)
---
We are just five months into 2023, and Michigan Democrats are hard at work getting things done.

But here’s the truth: From the top of the ticket to local elections, MAGA extremists are working to solidify their dangerous agenda for years to come. **They don’t just want to win these elections, they want to dismantle our democracy, threaten our personal freedoms, and set Michigan back for generations.**

That's why I’m asking for your help by making a monthly recurring contribution today to start building our ground game for 2024 and support our Democratic candidates. When you invest your resources in Building Bridges PAC, you’re helping to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight for our values and priorities.

There’s a lot we need to do and prepare for in the coming months – everything from running our digital program to knocking doors to talk to Michiganders. We have to be sure we have the resources we need to do all of it.

**[I’m asking you to set up a monthly recurring contribution of whatever you can today to help us plan for the coming months and defend our hard-fought progress. Can we count on you to be one of 250 monthly sustainers we’re aiming to get by the end of the day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63671579/407585803/-99881904?refcode=EM_FR_230522FR_N_GW_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGIyYTIyNy1lY2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72Vm9YvvThNNlopQoPIRqn5OtUJ-LWEW74QYY8YRegY=)** [GIVE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63671580/407585804/-99881904?refcode=EM_FR_230522FR_N_GW_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGIyYTIyNy1lY2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72Vm9YvvThNNlopQoPIRqn5OtUJ-LWEW74QYY8YRegY=) [GIVE $5 ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63671581/407585805/-99881904?refcode=EM_FR_230522FR_N_GW_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGIyYTIyNy1lY2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72Vm9YvvThNNlopQoPIRqn5OtUJ-LWEW74QYY8YRegY=) Thank you,

Gretchen Whitmer

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Add your name to be an official citizen cosponsor of my bill the People Over Parking Act of 2023.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63671780/407586781/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjJjOTRmMC1lY2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlS3HejaBpx3M5t8LZktf83vxWppXmDdhiq-JhIWuCc=)
Friends -
Earlier this month, I submitted the People Over Parking Act of 2023 to Congress, a bill in the U.S. House of Representatives that eliminates parking minimums across the country in transit-rich zones.
This is an important bill for our climate and a step toward increasing affordable housing, so I am very proud to be introducing it in the House.
While we confront a nationwide housing crisis — running 3.8 million homes short of demand — eliminating parking requirements will allow families and first-time homeowners to access affordable housing near public transportation.
Eliminating parking requirements will lower the costs to build new homes and businesses, and therefore make homes more affordable and accessible and create sustainable transit-oriented communities.
It’s good housing and climate policy.
This bill is important to me because it’s bills like these that will directly help the lives of Americans long-term. It is a step toward eliminating economic inequality in transit-rich and high-density areas, while also actively protecting our environment.
[**So please add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of my People Over Parking Act of 2023.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63671781/407586782/-1330466811?refcode2=922c94f0-ecf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230522-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjJjOTRmMC1lY2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlS3HejaBpx3M5t8LZktf83vxWppXmDdhiq-JhIWuCc=&emci=e3166931-e8f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=922c94f0-ecf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63671782/407586783/-1330466811?refcode2=922c94f0-ecf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230522-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjJjOTRmMC1lY2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KlS3HejaBpx3M5t8LZktf83vxWppXmDdhiq-JhIWuCc=&emci=e3166931-e8f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=922c94f0-ecf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)**
Adding your name may seem like a small act, but knowing I have your support is meaningful to me and helps show other members of Congress that the people support this idea.
Thank you for listening,
Robert

[**On Wednesday, May 24, join us and our West Coast partners at 6pm for our virtual event, Cashing in on Clean Energy: Save Money and the Climate.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63672226/407588207/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0MzM4YTkyLWVlZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EZvUEiriwn5EuNwIRfnoNmzLCDMcE-HvaIONAv3fj2w=&emci=101f1fa4-c7f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=54338a92-eef8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) **We’ll be going over benefits for making energy efficient upgrades and for transitioning to clean energy. Think tax credits, rebates, and other benefits for: window upgrades, energy efficiency projects, electric vehicles, and more!** All of this will be made available with President Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan (ACEP). ACEP includes the historic climate investments passed in the Inflation Reduction Act and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Framework. At the webinar, you’ll be learning how you can save money and the climate from our invited speakers:
\- _Matthew Davis from League of Conservation Voters_ , who will discuss the opportunities created by ACEP
\- _Lashelle Johnson from League of Conservation Voters_ , who will provide an overview of how ACEP prioritizes most impacted communities
\- _Amanda Sachs and Jamal Lewis from Rewiring America_ , who will outline funding allocations. If you’re thinking about retrofitting your home, making sustainable upgrades, what you can do to help fight against climate disasters, or how to save money on your utility bills, [**register now**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63672227/407588208/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU0MzM4YTkyLWVlZjgtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EZvUEiriwn5EuNwIRfnoNmzLCDMcE-HvaIONAv3fj2w=&emci=101f1fa4-c7f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=54338a92-eef8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)! Britney VanCitters

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Putting an end to the Republican gridlock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Republicans are holding our economy hostage to force their extreme agenda.
#
Peter,
Negotiations for our nation's economic future and the current debt ceiling are well underway and we're racing towards the June 1 deadline. Republicans are holding our economy hostage to force their extreme agenda.
Republicans are trying to force through drastic cuts that could take jobs from 780,000 people, nutrition assistance from 1.2 million women, infants, and children, and Medicaid coverage from up to 21 million Americans. Surrendering to these extremist demands sets a dangerous precedent that emboldens Republicans to pursue additional, anti-democratic hostage taking.
We can't let that happen. That's why I am leading the Congressional Progressive Caucus in calling on the President to consider invoking the 14th Amendment during this crisis.
**But in order to make an impact, I need as much support and momentum as possible to amplify this call for action.**[**Can you add your name to our petition to support a key solution to halt major cuts to domestic priorities and put an end to Republicans gridlock on our economy?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/stop-republicans-save-economy/?source=em20230522-2512&t=1&akid=2512%2E420207%2Ex5ubXg)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/stop-republicans-save-economy/?source=em20230522-2512&t=2&akid=2512%2E420207%2Ex5ubXg)**
Right-wing Republicans like Kevin McCarthy are more invested in meeting with bank executives and setting unrealistic demands including proposing deep cuts to key federal programs in exchange for raising the debt ceiling.
We can't afford to have _any_ leadership in office who would rather send our economy into a spiraling recession, than raise the debt ceiling and put our country back on track. **And we can't afford to miss out on this moment to urge Republicans to set personal interests aside and show up for everyday Americans.**
[**Add your name to our petition today to ensure that our government makes the best choice for the future of working people and refuse Republicans threat of destroying our economy.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/stop-republicans-save-economy/?source=em20230522-2512&t=3&akid=2512%2E420207%2Ex5ubXg)
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230522-2512-footer&t=4&refcode2=2512_420207_x5ubXg&akid=2512%2E420207%2Ex5ubXg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2512%2E420207%2Ex5ubXg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2512%2E420207%2Ex5ubXg)

name: Sherrod
subject: I'm asking you to have a little faith in me, rumpled suit and all.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63672285/407588523/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk224-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2FjODhjYy1lZWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxbuSGofGpRwWi5hAdzx0O-cnvNiVyVIJ-ziUt7Lsjw=)
_"Rumpled." "Disheveled." "Wrinkled."_

Each morning when I wake up, the first thing on my mind is fighting for Ohioans and the Dignity of Work – not competing for the Senate’s best dressed. That’s why sometimes, “rumpled,” “wrinkled,” and “disheveled” are the words used to describe me.

And I get it, friend. Most days, you're much more likely to find me in a Guardians sweatshirt or t-shirt than a suit and tie.

I'm running for reelection to continue fighting for the Dignity of Work – all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, work for tips or earn a salary, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I'll fight for you. And fighting for all workers doesn’t require the perfect wardrobe.
**Today though, I'm asking you to have a little faith in me and our campaign, rumpled suit and all. Because the truth is, I'm in the fight of my life to defend Ohio's seat and our Democratic Senate majority._CNN_ is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and a GOP millionaire just launched his campaign to defeat me.**
**That's why I'm personally asking for your help today, friend: [Will you chip in $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue? Contributions from grassroots supporters like you are critical to powering our campaign to victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63672286/407588524/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk224-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2FjODhjYy1lZWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxbuSGofGpRwWi5hAdzx0O-cnvNiVyVIJ-ziUt7Lsjw=)**
Thanks for being on our team.

In disheveled, but earnest solidarity,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63672287/407588525/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk224-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2FjODhjYy1lZWY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxbuSGofGpRwWi5hAdzx0O-cnvNiVyVIJ-ziUt7Lsjw=)

subject: re: Supreme Court and Social Security -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING: Supreme Court to hear a case that could "threaten to END" Social Security!**

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=3&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10834%2E9716520%2EZXUYgn)
**We urgently need to know where you stand:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10834%2E9716520%2EZXUYgn)
---
| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10834%2E9716520%2EZXUYgn)
---

It's clear, team: With _Roe_ overturned, **_NOTHING_** is safe from the _ultra_ -conservative Supreme Court majority.

**And now, they're about to hear a case that experts say could _"threaten to end"_ Social Security!** **_65 million Americans_ could LOSE the benefits they earned.**

We can’t let the Supreme Court attack this _**bedrock**_ of Americans' retirement, so we need to take action -- _now._ We’ve launched an urgent Live Poll to PROVE that the American people support Social Security. _But we’re still 31 responses short in Pennsylvania!_

**Please answer before midnight:****Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the constitutionality of Social Security?**

| | [Yes](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10834%2E9716520%2EZXUYgn)
---
| [No](http://go.dscc.org/go/12716?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230522-SupremeCourtUpdate-SCOTUSSocialSecurityRF2-Pros-sl1&akid=10834%2E9716520%2EZXUYgn)

Team DSCC

| | I'll cut to the chase, Peter — last week was a big one for abortion rights. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63672717/407590223/-347688492?sourceid=1050100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM4NTI1OC1mM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqBATJWngb5bHG-e7mZTKNzVdWTLvqZyE2q1JXDufyM=&emci=96f96151-f3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4f385258-f3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) I'll cut to the chase, Peter — last week was a big one for abortion rights. Here's what happened:
* _TWO_ states just approved restrictive abortion bans: **North Carolina** and **Nebraska**. **South Carolina** is working on its own even tougher ban, which just passed the state House and is headed to the Republican-controlled state Senate. Bans in both Carolinas would make Virginia the _last_ Southern state without abortion restrictions — and force Southern patients to travel even further to receive care.
* A federal appeals court heard arguments about access to **mifepristone** , and appears poised to side with the anti-choice extremists who launched the original lawsuit. This comes nearly six weeks after a conservative district court judge ordered the FDA to pull its decades-long approval of mifepristone, and about five weeks after the Supreme Court blocked that judge's ruling.
* We'll end with some good news: **Michigan Gov.**(and longtime EMILYs List candidate!) **Gretchen Whitmer** signed legislation prohibiting companies from retaliating against employees who seek or receive abortions. This is a perfect example of why it's so important to elect pro-choice fighters like Gov. Whitmer _everywhere_.

I've said it a thousand times before and I'll say it a thousand times again: the best way to restore, protect, and expand abortion rights across the country is to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot, all across the country. **Donate now to join the fight:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-More-Women-This-May](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63672724/407590235/-347688492?sourceid=1050100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM4NTI1OC1mM2Y4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vqBATJWngb5bHG-e7mZTKNzVdWTLvqZyE2q1JXDufyM=&emci=96f96151-f3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4f385258-f3f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thanks,

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: BREAKING: George Santos charged by Justice Department in federal probe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46037?t=6&akid=7909%2E878179%2EVbAYCt) Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan.

Earlier this month, we learned that federal prosecutors had filed criminal charges against George Santos.

During his campaign and his brief time in office, Santos is reported to have broken campaign finance laws, violated federal conflict of interest laws, stolen cash meant for an Iraq War veteran’s dying dog, masterminded a credit card fraud scheme, and lied about where he went to school and worked.

He also lied about being Jewish, claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust, and that his mother survived the attacks on the World Trade Center on 9/11.

**No matter what happens in his criminal case, one thing is certain: George Santos cannot represent the people of New York’s 3rd District in Congress.** [**That’s why I’m running against him. But I need your help to send him packing: Will you contribute $10 or more, split between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign, to help me build a movement to remove Santos from Congress?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46038?t=7&akid=7909%2E878179%2EVbAYCt) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Anna Kaplan and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/46039?t=8&akid=7909%2E878179%2EVbAYCt)

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7909%2E878179%2EVbAYCt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7909%2E878179%2EVbAYCt).**

subject: Do they really think you’d believe this?

| | Remember all those essays you wrote in school, friend? Everyone remembers the rules: You had to stick to the facts and you had to cite your sources. Simply, you couldn’t just _make up whatever you wanted_. **[Unfortunately, those rules don’t apply to the Democrat Super PAC targeting our district.](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=e920f6d59e56471ba3825e75815007b2&_e=i2q74GVZzSxFY7L8ZtNhULiu0_R-qgthXeC_z6e21k2pe2LNT4fD85c7zwpThIVQ7AWLMXj9Anpe5uRtyJGSuPiBpUvvrlaxbT1B-Lv-0LcfjPC52VVrbhRQ82zry6p5WzeYvjFkgAjl8_mvh3X40_lBQtOQaHqn6ey5I-7DbZdSXzhINWMv4_Q-x9gvAzNgFPuNkgDzDpCid2sDuz5zKWdUvhR6QlwUR1NgWrWCZUwPRPzQGIZct9u7pR8Mzx1bFiyicghlGOrspThcGf2PpmYmZ-nI16HhBGSIyXK7D6rH87VZkoQCjdIU5xaV2u6IfKgEDnOLk0bkpKlcdtqFM4akhNzfn29b2kz10hlnRQdc75o6gyf5TeFjfr94rohI)** We’re still 18 months out from the election, and **yet another** Radical Liberal Dark-Money Group has emerged from the shadows to launch a smear campaign against Rep. Kean, and this one’s a doozy. Let’s take a look at the facts: ✔️ The ad doesn’t state what Tom actually helped pass in Congress (because they’re lying)✔️ There isn’t a single source cited for any of the ad’s claims (because they’re lying)✔️ The claims made in the ad were _already_ debunked (because they’re lying)
---
[**CLICK HERE TO FIGHT BACK**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=e920f6d59e56471ba3825e75815007b2&_e=i2q74GVZzSxFY7L8ZtNhULiu0_R-qgthXeC_z6e21k2pe2LNT4fD85c7zwpThIVQ7AWLMXj9Anpe5uRtyJGSuPiBpUvvrlaxbT1B-Lv-0LcfjPC52VVrbhRQ82zry6p5WzeYvjFkgAjl8_mvh3X40_lBQtOQaHqn6ey5I-7DbZdSXzhINWMv4_Q-x9gvAzNgFPuNkgDzDpCid2sDuz5zKWdUvhR6QlwUR1NgWrWCZUyNj70HnjgxuKIrvFfNcIhMYgTT20h1epNGsE3tv_kmbCAA5QrhGiZksMTUAYrme1SkBLyS6uzQGKTbhXhomruuC1COvlZ7vr6Or7AMkw43NW-7FTbFHFyXfIs-VL6jlFAmHuUrCVlx9kx2D1jKlpNR)
---
Meanwhile in the real world, the debt ceiling bill that this ad wants to sound so scary had already passed... _weeks ago._ And the cherry on top of this big bowl of lies, friend?__ The claims made were called out by [factcheck.org](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=e920f6d59e56471ba3825e75815007b2&_e=i2q74GVZzSxFY7L8ZtNhULiu0_R-qgthXeC_z6e21k2pe2LNT4fD85c7zwpThIVQ7AWLMXj9Anpe5uRtyJGSuPiBpUvvrlaxbT1B-Lv-0LcfjPC52VVrbhRQ82zry6p5WzeYvjFkgAjl8_mvh3X40_lBQtOQaHqn6ey5I-7DbZdSXzhINWMv4_Q-x9gvAzNgFPuNkgDzDpCid2sDuz5zKWdUvhR6QlwUR1NgWrWCZUxLc_L5JEB3jfbusuh8ecXzoI00fZ1wRAzjIATzVvHpF-8oiwRC32u_wtHbsAV1-WHtEFjS3Dv2mAo22U4pt0Q7btOGpEUuXelko9aHi9KxfTp7mzuReUDkhAHV2wMtoDq_3bHZIfx-7WRsMXVJutzn) as lies long before the ad even hit the airwaves:

Because they know Tom is truly fighting to better our economy for the people of New Jersey and the only way they can take this seat back is through lies, deceit, and a whole lot of Dark-Money. That’s why we need your help to fight back.

clean_body: | | | | | Remember all those essays you wrote in school, friend? Everyone remembers the rules: You had to stick to the facts and you had to cite your sources. Simply, you couldn’t just make up whatever you wanted. We’re still 18 months out from the election, and yet another Radical Liberal Dark-Money Group has emerged from the shadows to launch a smear campaign against Rep. Kean, and this one’s a doozy. Let’s take a look at the facts: ✔️ The ad doesn’t state what Tom actually helped pass in Congress (because they’re lying)✔️ There isn’t a single source cited for any of the ad’s claims (because they’re lying)✔️ The claims made in the ad were already debunked (because they’re lying) Meanwhile in the real world, the debt ceiling bill that this ad wants to sound so scary had already passed... weeks ago. And the cherry on top of this big bowl of lies, friend? The claims made were called out by as lies long before the ad even hit the airwaves: Why? Because they know Tom is truly fighting to better our economy for the people of New Jersey and the only way they can take this seat back is through lies, deceit, and a whole lot of Dark-Money. That’s why we need your help to fight back. This isn’t the first time they’ve tried to smear Tom as someone that he’s not, and it definitely won’t be the last. Thank you, Team Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. name: Voting Rights Alert (via the NDRC)
subject: Republicans think they can get away with this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

After the 2020 election, Donald Trump’s Big Lie motivated Republican lawmakers in nearly half of all states to pass new restrictive election laws. You may remember public outrage sparked by some of the most extreme bills – like the Georgia law that included a ban on _passing out water_ to people waiting in line to vote.

**But now, Republicans are taking a new approach:** | **_Under the Radar, Right-Wing Push to Tighten Voting Laws Persists_**

“Republican-led legislatures have continued to pass significant restrictions on access to the ballot . . . Behind the efforts is **a network of billionaire-backed advocacy groups** that has formed a new hub of election advocacy within the Republican Party.”

“The groups have largely dropped the push for expansive laws, **shifting instead to a strategy one leader describes as ‘radical incrementalism’** – a step-by-step approach intended to be more politically palatable than the broad legislation that provoked widespread protest in 2021.”

_– The New York Times_

subject: I first ran for President because I believed we were in a battle for the soul of this nation. I still believe that to be true:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to help build a winning campaign from the ground up and stop MAGA Republicans from taking this country backward. | | |
---
Peter, In 2020, 81 million Americans voted to move our country forward. Since then, we’ve helped create over 12 million jobs, lowered prescription drug prices for millions of seniors, and passed the largest effort to tackle the climate crisis in our history. But we’ve got a lot more to do. And there is so much at stake. MAGA forces are determined to take this country backward -- backward to an America where there is no right to choose, no right to privacy, no right to contraception, and no right to marry who you love. _That’s not who we are._ MAGA Republicans believe that for them to succeed, everyone else has to fail. **I believe America is big enough for all of us to succeed. That is the nation we’re building: a nation where no one is left behind.** **[If you agree, Peter, please consider making a contribution to our campaign today. Every dollar you contribute will help us hire staff, open field offices, and run ads to get our message out to voters ahead of 2024:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ymOoaZ2Tr-ojHUJEEb0iKbe46rgXAelUYiv0eD9jFoyIzlD58zhHvtdSE4fpvKt0e-VKZvsYH0NUjk4TbacKUi4mVrBynfZEGQLsv7y8H3TKmvJptZisH5gJgtdY01PzfkYDcohPhCnMjjw-Zp-uOA2uB4Qxd7jYtaNgL_Xqbs1GzcXyL4j2P-wIpGLjlN-FAuywTy6qj5r62xyK70PNdTz9PWlp6ymGWxuSgsP2Lk1NJ_HovQDFDDcF2t1H7C4hSw5kmGFHKYE0FH2eC3tIvwA4rhhawhJ2RGl8qJEATWIncjyc4Zz1jXHDAT1C1USUwdHLUA4lReckoIPpP1NiFqTF8FxnVM1W5pRRavAApjDZaWrMz8HYKwVWMLT_Oi_K92E480kNjMTeG7Jqfax3MZEWVzLChA43A0_vNoqYFMEdiDQNFBtu_bnA2zMgo5GGEw9uT6sdTYXtcqk0GrT_buuh3R42SOm50OHz1ocCbctA/3we/9vP3sOLqR72gXev7yqTwLQ/h0/_01ALjagocqc2qYwVkFsp3N9HFrQu190P-qyffH9pss)**

I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63673468/407593164/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdlNmRmZi1mOGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXkRDf9oeH_Q09JhiuNDgZXeaqvyFCWqvg6DixEwevQ=&emci=b6ae67d3-53f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ec7e6dff-f8f8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63673469/407593165/1656513743?refcode=E-20230521-AllredSplit-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdlNmRmZi1mOGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXkRDf9oeH_Q09JhiuNDgZXeaqvyFCWqvg6DixEwevQ=) Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63673470/407593166/1656513743?refcode=E-20230521-AllredSplit-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdlNmRmZi1mOGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXkRDf9oeH_Q09JhiuNDgZXeaqvyFCWqvg6DixEwevQ=) After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63673471/407593167/1656513743?refcode=E-20230521-AllredSplit-graphic-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdlNmRmZi1mOGY4LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CXkRDf9oeH_Q09JhiuNDgZXeaqvyFCWqvg6DixEwevQ=) **It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. **We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly.** He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark.
