If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

name: Team Alex Padilla
subject: Need your help to hold the Senate for Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Can you split a donation — of $3 or another amount — between Alex Padilla and Senator Sherrod Brown of Ohio?
#

Hi there,
[**Can you split a donation — of $5 or another amount — between Alex Padilla and Senator Sherrod Brown of Ohio?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-may23-brown.nDleDG&refcode=em230522-1-sp&t=1&akid=1307%2E159979%2E8XfLvn)
Sorry to be so direct, but there are a few reasons why your donations is so important, particularly today:
**FIRST:** Democrats only have a 1-seat majority in the Senate, and we’re defending **twice** as many seats as Republicans. That means it’s _absolutely critical_ we do everything we can to support incumbents like Sherrod, who’s facing a difficult race in a state that Donald Trump won in 2016 and 2020.
**SECOND:** Both Sherrod and Alex rely on grassroots supporters like you to power their work — and Sherrod’s already got a GOP opponent who’s planning to pour millions of dollars of his own money into the race. **We’re counting on you — and thousands of grassroots supporters alongside you — to help match up to the millions the GOP is spending to try to take back the Senate.**
**THIRD:** Our end-of-month deadline is coming up very soon. And before it gets here, we need to hit our fundraising goals and make sure Sherrod has the resources to run a strong campaign and that Alex has the resources to support Democrats across the country.
[**So please, consider making a $5 donation today. It would mean a lot to Alex, to Sherrod, and to our chances of holding the Senate and enacting progressive policies that would make a real difference in the lives of Californians, Ohioans, and ALL Americans.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-may23-brown.nDleDG&refcode=em230522-1-sp&t=2&akid=1307%2E159979%2E8XfLvn)
**[SPLIT $5 TODAY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-may23-brown.nDleDG&refcode=em230522-1-sp&amount=5&t=3&akid=1307%2E159979%2E8XfLvn)**
Thank you so much for your support.
\- Team Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: A story about the Missouri I grew up in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
... and why Josh Hawley doesn’t know a thing about it.
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I know I’ve emailed you a lot lately about Josh Hawley’s new book, but I wanted to take just a little more of your time today to tell you about the Missouri I grew up in — and why, just like his take on manhood, Hawley doesn’t know a thing about it.
So before I ask you to **[chip in $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj) will you please give me a moment to explain more?**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)**
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)
**The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another.** To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians.
**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a U.S. Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re on board to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can start off strong and keep getting our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we keep up our record-breaking grassroots momentum, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33424?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=9&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33424?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=10&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33424?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=11&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33424?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=12&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33424?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=13&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33424?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=14&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33423?refcode=em20230522-3160&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=15&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)
---
If we keep working together, we can take back power for working Missourians and everyday people all across the country.
Thank you,
— Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230522-3160-footer&t=16&refcode2=3160_614464_lsCfbj&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=17&akid=3160%2E614464%2ElsCfbj). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Please read: Why I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63673578/407593759/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjFhNmE4ZTQtZmFmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W2WJxt_VqL4ObZ0R40HoiLbtvCEo_e4Ry9ihQus_c4w=) Hi there,

I’m reaching out to share something with you – an op-ed I wrote for the _Pasadena Star-News_ about why I’m in the race for CA-30. **[You can check it out here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63673579/407593760/-41517407?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjFhNmE4ZTQtZmFmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W2WJxt_VqL4ObZ0R40HoiLbtvCEo_e4Ry9ihQus_c4w=&emci=1fa6a8e4-faf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=21a6a8e4-faf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63673580/407593761/-41517407?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjFhNmE4ZTQtZmFmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W2WJxt_VqL4ObZ0R40HoiLbtvCEo_e4Ry9ihQus_c4w=&emci=1fa6a8e4-faf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=21a6a8e4-faf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)
Here are some highlights:

**I’m running because the diverse and vibrant communities of our district deserve a representative who knows the unique needs and challenges of each neighborhood.** Through my time in the Assembly and in local government, I have worked tirelessly to improve the lives of my neighbors – tackling issues like ending the gun violence epidemic, climate change, and workplace harassment head on.

**I’m running because I worry every day about the nation my 9-year-old daughter is inheriting.** Will growing inequality and a shrinking middle class prevent her from one day buying a home and retiring with security? Will she lose access to the reproductive rights my mother and I have fought for our whole lives? I won’t sit idly by and wait to find out – I’ll fight as hard as I can for a brighter future.

**I’m running to represent you and our communities, not special interests, and as such, I will not take a penny of corporate PAC money.** It’s our relationship, my understanding of your experiences, perspective, and values that I will be taking with me to Washington.

If you’d like to learn more about my reasons for entering this important race, please take a few moments to **[read the full op-ed here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63673581/407593762/-41517407?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjFhNmE4ZTQtZmFmOC1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=W2WJxt_VqL4ObZ0R40HoiLbtvCEo_e4Ry9ihQus_c4w=&emci=1fa6a8e4-faf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=21a6a8e4-faf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=8447100)** and perhaps share it with a friend or neighbor.

Thanks for taking the time!

Best,

Laura

clean_body: | = Hi there, I’m reaching out to share something with you – an op-ed I wrote for the Pasadena Star-News about why I’m in the race for CA-30. Here are some highlights: I’m running because the diverse and vibrant communities of our district deserve a representative who knows the unique needs and challenges of each neighborhood. Through my time in the Assembly and in local government, I have worked tirelessly to improve the lives of my neighbors – tackling issues like ending the gun violence epidemic, climate change, and workplace harassment head on. I’m running because I worry every day about the nation my 9-year-old daughter is inheriting. Will growing inequality and a shrinking middle class prevent her from one day buying a home and retiring with security? Will she lose access to the reproductive rights my mother and I have fought for our whole lives? I won’t sit idly by and wait to find out – I’ll fight as hard as I can for a brighter future. I’m running to represent you and our communities, not special interests, and as such, I will not take a penny of corporate PAC money. It’s our relationship, my understanding of your experiences, perspective, and values that I will be taking with me to Washington. If you’d like to learn more about my reasons for entering this important race, please take a few moments to and perhaps share it with a friend or neighbor. Thanks for taking the time! Best, Laura P.S. Next week, our campaign will be up against an end-of-month fundraising deadline. It’s critical that our finances stay on track so that we have the resources we need to run a winning campaign. = | = | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to .
